9	
10	# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)
11	
12	User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.
13	
14	**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.
15	
16	## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
17	- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
18	- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
19	- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).
20	
21	## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
22	(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.
23	
24	## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
25	User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
26	- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
27	- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
28	- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
29	- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.
30	
31	## 5Y horizon + growth examples (user insight 2026-05-29, FWD=1260 in qt_v4x_archetypes.py)
32	User: MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP in acceleration phase traded at HIGH valuation; while growth sustained, stock kept multibagging; when growth decelerates, multiple de-rates immediately → exit on DECELERATION not on high valuation.
33	- **5Y results sharpen the archetype**: BOTH×SMALLMID (cheap+growing small/mid) N=19, peak +174%/5Y-hold +91%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 47% / ≥5x 26%**, beat 63% — the VCS/DGC formula, stronger at 5Y. CRISIS entry best for VALUE_FEAR (peak +82%, ≥3x 21%).
34	- **Valuation-at-entry CONFIRMS user**: GROWTH median pe_z=+0.20 (EXPENSIVE, above own 5Y mean) yet still works (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y); VALUE_FEAR −0.48 (cheap); BOTH −1.16. → growth bought expensive is fine; **applying OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) to growth runners would cut winners** → exit must be archetype-conditional (OVERVALUED for value/mean-revert names; GROWTH-DECELERATION for growth names — de-rating follows decel).
35	- **Face validity (5Y peak)**: VTP 2023-04 VALUE_FEAR small-cap pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554% / hold +244%** ✅; MWG 2019-05 VALUE_FEAR → **+189%/+123%** ✅; VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅; **VNM = value-trap confirmed** (cheap-ish blue-chip, matured growth → peak +25%, hold −5 to −17%); DGW/FRT EXCLUDED by quality gate (≥70%A/B≥12Q too strict — missed winners with quality dips).
36	- **DATA NOTE**: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl prices are CORRECT (verified MWG 11420→82400=7.2x matches BQ adj Close); an earlier false-alarm was a buggy ad-hoc set_index-unsorted lookup, NOT the data. Event-study scripts use sorted positional i+H indexing → valid.
37	- **Next**: test archetype-conditional EXIT (OVERVALUED for value vs growth-deceleration for growth); add a growth-deceleration exit (current GROWTH_BROKEN only catches −15% decline, misses decel). Caveat: ≥10x uncapturable (original VCS-2014/DGC-2015/DGW pre-data or gated); BOTH cell N=19 suggestive.
38	
39	## Archetype-conditional EXIT test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_exits.py`) — HOLD beats ALL exit rules
40	Per-position, 5Y window, realized return + capture ratio (realized/5Y-peak). Strategies exit on OVERVALUED|FA / DECEL(NP_R&Rev<10%)|FA / QTV4_ANY / ARCHETYPE (value→OVR, growth→DECEL) vs HOLD_5Y.
41	- **ALL (621): HOLD_5Y crushes every rule** — median +14.1%/mean +44.2%/capture 40% vs OVERVALUED +0.5%/+18%/21%, DECEL −0.3%/+1.6%/0%, QTV4_ANY −0.6%/+12.4%/5%, ARCHETYPE +1.0%/+16.3%/17%.
42	- **GROWTH+BOTH (122): user's "DECEL>OVERVALUED" NOT confirmed — DECEL is WORST** (mean +5.6% vs OVR +14.4% vs HOLD +41.1%); DECEL exits too early (126d vs OVR 256d) because quarterly growth is lumpy (one <10% quarter ejects before the run). 
43	- **Reconciles the earlier "OVERVALUED +81%/96%win"**: that was SELECTION illusion (only winners ever reach overvalued); applied to all positions, rule-exits lose to hold (most exit early via FA_DEGRADE, locking small losses).
44	- **VERDICT: for a quality-compounder filter, rule-based exits DESTROY value — HOLD wins** (right-skew: a few multibaggers compound; any early exit truncates the right tail; losses bounded at −100% but winners unbounded → asymmetry favors holding). Most Buffett-consistent result: "favorite holding period is forever." Answer to "when to exit" = essentially DON'T (on these rules).
45	- Fundamental-trigger exits all lose to hold. Files: qt_v4x_exits.py, data/qt_v4x_exits.{md,csv}.
46	
47	## Trailing-stop-from-peak test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_trailing.py`) — HOLD STILL WINS; exit question CLOSED
48	Per-position 5Y. ALL(621): HOLD mean +44.2%/med +14.1%/win58%/cap40% beats TS25 (+10.3%), TS35 (+18.0%), TS50 (+25.8%), and best **TS35_act20** (activate trail only after +20% gain) +31.4%/med +8.0%/win56%/cap26%. **No trailing stop beats pure HOLD on mean OR median.** Tight stops (25/35%) cut early (median negative); activation-after-gain is much better but still < HOLD. GROWTH+BOTH: HOLD +41% > all trailing (worst for trailing — volatile, gets stopped). 
49	- **Face validity (why)**: TS35 helped smooth toppers (VTP +316% vs HOLD +244%; DGC +25% vs −14%) but DESTROYED MWG (−4% vs +123% — stopped on COVID mid-run drawdown before the real run). Asymmetry: cutting ONE MWG costs more than avoiding several VNM round-trips.
50	- **DEFINITIVE EXIT VERDICT (all rules tested)**: for a quality-compounder long-term filter, optimal exit = HOLD / don't use exit rules. Maximally Buffett-consistent. Pragmatic exception: if path-comfort matters (can't stomach VNM/DGC give-backs), TS35_act20 ≈ HOLD mean with lower per-position drawdown — a preference trade (return vs path), NOT an edge. Caveat: per-position unlimited-capital; in a slot-limited portfolio, stop-out-to-redeploy could differ (= portfolio mgmt, deliberately set aside). Files: qt_v4x_trailing.py, data/qt_v4x_trailing.{md,csv}.
51	
52	## Realistic sleeve build (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_sleeve.py`) — mechanical sleeve LAGS index; use as idea-generator
53	Equal-weight (N_MAX=25), hold-long (sell only tier→E), state-aware target equity {CRI 1.0/BEA .95/NEU .80/BUL .65/EXB .50}, monthly. Results (2014-26): SLEEVE_STATE CAGR 5.93%/DD **−59.2%**/wealth 1.98; SLEEVE_FULL 8.53%/−40.2%/2.64; VNINDEX 10.64%/−43.6%/3.32. **Both lag VNI; STATE worse than FULL.**
54	- **State-aware accumulation FAILED**: (a) cash drag — NEUTRAL (dominant state) realized only 54% equity (too few signals to hit 80% target) → missed 2016-19 bull (2014-COVID: STATE −12% vs VNI +33%); (b) averaging-down via crisis top-up amplified DD to −59% when 2022 smallcap crash deepened (sleeve holds volatile smallmid quality). Lesson extends the exit finding: don't time cash either — timing hurt (like rule-exits hurt).
55	- **Even FULL quality sleeve lags VNI** (8.53 vs 10.64) — consistent w/ whole session: quality long-only ≈/< bull-heavy VN index (VIC/large-cap led; quality smallmid lags in bull).
56	- **Pick-edge doesn't translate to mechanical sleeve**: event-study showed great picks (3Y +30%, VTP +554%, 5Y mean +44%) but 25-slot equal-weight DILUTES multibaggers among mediocre picks; index is a high bar; quality lags bull.
57	- **VERDICT: QT v4.x = focused IDEA-GENERATOR, NOT a mechanical diversified sleeve.** It correctly identifies multibaggers (BOTH×smallmid×crisis/bear → VTP/MWG/DGC/VCS); a CONCENTRATED investor selecting among its signals + holding long captures the edge; a diversified mechanical book dilutes to ~index. Do NOT state-time the cash (hurt). Files: qt_v4x_sleeve.py, data/qt_v4x_sleeve.{md,csv}.
58	
59	## Concentrated sleeve + index-parking (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_concentrated.py`) — modest alpha, ~index net
60	Fixed v1 sleeve flaws: 3Y rotation (MAX_HOLD_M=36) frees slots to capture later multibaggers (else hold-forever locks 2014 vintage), and PARK idle cash in index (fixes cash drag).
61	- **Concentration MONOTONICALLY helps** (confirms dilution was the killer): TOP5 CAGR 7.91% > TOP8 5.86 > TOP12 4.43 > TOP25 2.19. But all lag VNI 10.64% due to MASSIVE cash drag (TOP5 51% / TOP25 84% avg cash — archetype signals too sparse to fill even 5 slots).
62	- **TOP5 + idle cash PARKED in index = BEATS VNI**: TOP5_PARK CAGR 11.34%/wealth 3.58 vs VNI 10.64%/3.32 (**+0.69pp**); TOP8_PARK −0.46, TOP12_PARK −0.73 (only max concentration wins). Drivers: HAH +0.63, HPG +0.44, DXG +0.32, VSC +0.26 (cyclicals caught cheap in crisis/bear = the archetype). → concentrated picks DO add alpha on top of beta; cash drag (not picks) was the drag.
63	- **HONEST verdict**: alpha is MODEST (+0.69pp), ONLY at TOP5 (high idiosyncratic risk, path-dependent on few winners), worse MaxDD (−49% vs −44%); realistic −1.5pp cost haircut ≈ erases edge → net ~index-like. Consistent with whole session: VN bull/large-cap-led market makes index hard to beat; FA edge real at pick-level but capacity/dilution/cost erode to ~index at portfolio level.
64	- **Final use**: QT v4.x = focused IDEA-GENERATOR for a CONCENTRATED investor selecting among its signals (esp. BOTH×smallmid×crisis/bear → HAH/HPG/VTP/MWG type) + hold ~3Y + park idle in index. NOT a mechanical index-crushing alpha machine. Files: qt_v4x_concentrated.py, data/qt_v4x_concentrated.{md,csv}.
65	
66	## CASH-MACHINE gate (user insight 2026-05-31, `cash_machine_screen.py`) — how user picked VCS/DGC early
67	User's edge my frameworks missed: select on (1) CFO>NP SUSTAINED many quarters (real cash generator, TTM basis — single-quarter CFO too noisy from working-capital timing) + (2) NON-DILUTIVE (no shareholder cash-raises; only dividends/bonus shares). Rare self-funding compounder = GATE not blended axis. NOTE: CF_OA_P0 = Cash Flow Operating Activities RAW VND (NOT "operating/assets" — dictionary mislabel); CFO/NP = CF_OA_P0/NP_P0.
68	- **Validation: DGC @2016-09 = CASH_MACHINE TRUE** (TTM CFO/NP 1.21, 67% q≥1, cash 6→79bn) ✅ caught pre-run. **VCS @2015-12 borderline (TTM 0.53)** — hyper-growth consumed working capital → CFO<NP temporarily, BUT shares −20% (buyback, non-dilutive) + cash 121→216bn. → TWO flavors: (a) mature cash-cow CFO>NP (DGC); (b) growth self-funder CFO+ / cash-accumulating / non-dilutive (VCS). Strict CFO/NP≥1 gate misses (b).
69	- **Current cash machines (non-bank, TTM CFO/NP≥1 sustained + cash growing + non-dilutive): CVT, HDG, HAH, FMC, QTP, PTB** (exclude banks — CFO/NP meaningless). **High-conviction intersection w/ unified-screener CHEAP_QUALITY = QTP, PTB, FMC** (cheap + cash-machine + quality).
70	- Why old QT v4 missed: cash axis used noisy single-q CFO/NP, blended 1/7 weight; dilution dropped for weak IC. Fix: add CASH_MACHINE as a quality BADGE/gate (TTM, + non-dilution + cash-accumulation), not an IC ranker. Same meta-lesson as redflag/bank (quality=gate not ranker). Files: cash_machine_screen.py, data/cash_machine_screen.{md,csv}.
71	
72	## REINVESTMENT RUNWAY — cash-machine alone ≠ multibagger (user insight 2026-05-31, CRITICAL refinement)
73	Why VCS/DGC multibagged but QTP can't, though all are cash machines: **multibagger needs 3 things, not just cash-machine: (1) cash-machine (CFO>NP) + (2) reinvestment RUNWAY (asset/capacity growing) + (3) HIGH ROIC on incremental capital.** Compounding rate ≈ ROIC × reinvestment-rate. Validated (BQ, asset CAGR4y / reinvest=−CF_Invest_5Y/CF_OA_5Y / ROIC5Y): **QTP = YIELD cash-cow** (power plant, asset CAGR −5%, reinvest 0.01, ROIC14% → "earnings growth" is just declining-depreciation, FINITE & fake, pays out → NO multibag); **DGC = compounder** (asset +18%, ROIC 29%); HAH(+23%/21%, cyclical), FMC(+12.5%/10%), PTB(+4.6%/13%) reinvesting; **CVT = value-DESTRUCTIVE growth** (reinvest 2.05 but ROIC 5.8% — cash machine that reinvests at poor returns); **VCS NOW matured** (asset −3.5%, reinvest 0.06 — its compounder runway was 2015-18, now a cash-return/yield profile like QTP). Key dynamics: **(a) runway is TIME-VARYING — buy compounder when runway OPEN, recognize when it closes (VCS→yield)**; (b) ROIC gates "good" vs "value-destructive" cash machines (CVT). Reclassify cash machines: COMPOUNDER{DGC,HAH,PTB,FMC} / YIELD{QTP=dividend play not multibag} / low-ROIC{CVT avoid}. Golden compounder-cheap intersection (cheap+cash-machine+runway+ROIC) = PTB, FMC (NOT QTP — yield only). To bake into screener: split CASH_MACHINE badge → COMPOUNDER (ROIC≥12% & asset-growth>0) vs YIELD (asset-growth≤0/reinvest~0).
74	
75	## Caveats
76	Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).
77

file.content:
---
name: qt-v4-eventstudy-2026
description: "QT v4 (Buffett) filter measured as per-signal event study (not portfolio) — long-horizon edge is real, VALUE>>GARP, OVERVALUED exit is gold"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
---

# QT v4 (Buffett) filter — per-signal event study (2026-05-29)

User reframe (correct, fixes prior mistake): stop measuring FA/quality filters as portfolio NAV (capacity/cash/Sharpe/Calmar obscure the signal). Measure the QUALITY OF THE PICKS at the stock/event level — when to buy, long-horizon outcome, when to exit. Script: `qt_v4_eventstudy.py` (reuses backtest_qt_v4 signal defs + data: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl, fa_ratings_lh.csv, qt_v4_fin.pkl). Equal-weight per signal, unlimited capital, point-in-time fwd returns. Output: `data/qt_v4_eventstudy.md`, `data/qt_v4_events.csv`.

**QT v4 = Buffett quality-compounder filter**: universe ≥70% A/B tier (≥12Q hist), latest A/B, liq≥5B/d. Entry OR{VALUE: (pe_z<−1|pb_z<−1|dd52w<−30)&not-falling-knife; GARP: PEG∈(0,1]&NP_R≥20%&Rev_YoY≥20%&PE<25&>MA200}. Exit OR{FA_DEGRADE tier→C/D/E; OVERVALUED pe_z>2.5&pb_z>1.5; GROWTH_BROKEN 2Q NP&Rev<−15%}.

## Findings (628 entry events, 62 tickers, 2016→2026)
- **Edge is REAL but LONG-horizon** (confirms the whole session's thesis, now clean at stock level): fwd median/mean/win, excess-vs-VNINDEX: 3M +2.0%/−1.8exc/beat45% → 1Y +1.0%/−5.1exc/beat44% (LAGS index through 1Y) → 2Y +11.2%/−1.6exc (matches) → **3Y +30.4%/+52.0mean/win65%/+7.2pp exc/beat54% (BEATS index only at 3Y)**. The picks need ~3 years; portfolio-NAV sims (1-2Y, capacity-bound) structurally couldn't show this.
- **VALUE path >> GARP path**: VALUE 1Y +4.8%/2Y +15.0%; **GARP 1Y −8.9%/2Y +0.9%/beat-VNI only 24-27%** (drag). For a long-horizon quality filter, buy-cheap beats buy-growth. → drop/rework GARP.
- **Exit: OVERVALUED is GOLD, FA_DEGRADE exits too early.** OVERVALUED (n=116): median **+81.4%**, **96% win**, hold 561d — let winners run, sell when expensive (pure Buffett). FA_DEGRADE (n=217): median −2.3%/win44% (fires after damage). GROWTH_BROKEN (n=77): median −3.0%/win34% (defensive). Overall rule-exit (mean +27%, ~9mo hold) << hold-3Y (+52%) → **rules exit too early, cut compounders** (esp. FA_DEGRADE on a single-quarter tier slip).

## Actionable refinement hypotheses (for a QT v4.x — NOT yet validated)
(a) emphasize VALUE entry, drop GARP; (b) target ~3Y hold; (c) primary exit = OVERVALUED (winner harvest); (d) make FA_DEGRADE patient (require 2 consecutive degrades or price confirmation) to stop cutting compounders. Measure refinements the SAME WAY (per-signal event study, 3Y outcome + excess vs VNI), NOT portfolio NAV.

## Two-archetype refinement (user insight 2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_archetypes.py`)
User: entry must differ by company type — (A) VALUE_FEAR = quality priced cheap by crisis/sector-misunderstanding/incident (VCS 2014, DGC 2015/2019 → 10-20x); (B) GROWTH_BLUECHIP = blue-chip still in strong-growth phase, no cheap needed (VNM 2005-17 dozens×), exit when growth matures. Test (621 events, 70 tk, multibagger metric = peak drawup within 3Y):
- **Multibagger sweet spot = BOTH × SMALL/MID** (cheap/beaten AND still growing, small/mid): N=19, peak med +150%, 3Y +56%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 32% / ≥5x 11%**, beat 53% — exactly the VCS/DGC formula. Growth-alone OR value-alone each much weaker.
- **CRISIS/BEAR timing boosts VALUE_FEAR** (confirms user): CRISIS 3Y +26%/≥3x 16%, BEAR +24%/≥3x 14% vs NEUTRAL +5%/9%. Buy cheap quality in fear = best.
- **REFINES user on blue-chips**: GROWTH×BLUECHIP did NOT multibag in 2016-26 (≥5x 0%, 3Y +8%) — VN blue-chips now MATURE; VNM's dozens-× was pre-2017 (smaller/scaling, before data). **Cheap mature blue-chip = VALUE TRAP**: VNM 2018-20 all flagged VALUE_FEAR (looked cheap) but peak +25%/hold −5 to −23% — cheapness meaningless once growth matured. → for blue-chips require ACTIVE growth + exit on growth deceleration (missing exit: current GROWTH_BROKEN needs −15% decline, not deceleration). Face validity: VCS 2018-11 VALUE_FEAR→+95%✅, DGC 2022-11 BOTH→+42%✅.
- **QT v4.x direction**: golden signal = small/mid quality + cheap/beaten + still-growing, entered in CRISIS/BEAR; blue-chips need growth-not-cheapness + growth-decel exit; growth-alone weak. Caveats: BOTH cell N=19 (suggestive); 3Y window undercounts true multibaggers (VCS/DGC 10-20x run 4-8y); can't test pre-2017 VNM/VCS-2014/DGC-2015 (panel price start). Files: qt_v4x_archetypes.py, data/qt_v4x_events.csv.

## 5Y horizon + growth examples (user insight 2026-05-29, FWD=1260 in qt_v4x_archetypes.py)
User: MWG/DGW/FRT/VTP in acceleration phase traded at HIGH valuation; while growth sustained, stock kept multibagging; when growth decelerates, multiple de-rates immediately → exit on DECELERATION not on high valuation.
- **5Y results sharpen the archetype**: BOTH×SMALLMID (cheap+growing small/mid) N=19, peak +174%/5Y-hold +91%, **≥2x 63% / ≥3x 47% / ≥5x 26%**, beat 63% — the VCS/DGC formula, stronger at 5Y. CRISIS entry best for VALUE_FEAR (peak +82%, ≥3x 21%).
- **Valuation-at-entry CONFIRMS user**: GROWTH median pe_z=+0.20 (EXPENSIVE, above own 5Y mean) yet still works (GROWTH×BLUECHIP +27% 5Y); VALUE_FEAR −0.48 (cheap); BOTH −1.16. → growth bought expensive is fine; **applying OVERVALUED exit (pe_z>2.5) to growth runners would cut winners** → exit must be archetype-conditional (OVERVALUED for value/mean-revert names; GROWTH-DECELERATION for growth names — de-rating follows decel).
- **Face validity (5Y peak)**: VTP 2023-04 VALUE_FEAR small-cap pe_z −1.8 → **peak +554% / hold +244%** ✅; MWG 2019-05 VALUE_FEAR → **+189%/+123%** ✅; VCS +110%, DGC +104% ✅; **VNM = value-trap confirmed** (cheap-ish blue-chip, matured growth → peak +25%, hold −5 to −17%); DGW/FRT EXCLUDED by quality gate (≥70%A/B≥12Q too strict — missed winners with quality dips).
- **DATA NOTE**: qt_panel_2014_2026.pkl prices are CORRECT (verified MWG 11420→82400=7.2x matches BQ adj Close); an earlier false-alarm was a buggy ad-hoc set_index-unsorted lookup, NOT the data. Event-study scripts use sorted positional i+H indexing → valid.
- **Next**: test archetype-conditional EXIT (OVERVALUED for value vs growth-deceleration for growth); add a growth-deceleration exit (current GROWTH_BROKEN only catches −15% decline, misses decel). Caveat: ≥10x uncapturable (original VCS-2014/DGC-2015/DGW pre-data or gated); BOTH cell N=19 suggestive.

## Archetype-conditional EXIT test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_exits.py`) — HOLD beats ALL exit rules
Per-position, 5Y window, realized return + capture ratio (realized/5Y-peak). Strategies exit on OVERVALUED|FA / DECEL(NP_R&Rev<10%)|FA / QTV4_ANY / ARCHETYPE (value→OVR, growth→DECEL) vs HOLD_5Y.
- **ALL (621): HOLD_5Y crushes every rule** — median +14.1%/mean +44.2%/capture 40% vs OVERVALUED +0.5%/+18%/21%, DECEL −0.3%/+1.6%/0%, QTV4_ANY −0.6%/+12.4%/5%, ARCHETYPE +1.0%/+16.3%/17%.
- **GROWTH+BOTH (122): user's "DECEL>OVERVALUED" NOT confirmed — DECEL is WORST** (mean +5.6% vs OVR +14.4% vs HOLD +41.1%); DECEL exits too early (126d vs OVR 256d) because quarterly growth is lumpy (one <10% quarter ejects before the run). 
- **Reconciles the earlier "OVERVALUED +81%/96%win"**: that was SELECTION illusion (only winners ever reach overvalued); applied to all positions, rule-exits lose to hold (most exit early via FA_DEGRADE, locking small losses).
- **VERDICT: for a quality-compounder filter, rule-based exits DESTROY value — HOLD wins** (right-skew: a few multibaggers compound; any early exit truncates the right tail; losses bounded at −100% but winners unbounded → asymmetry favors holding). Most Buffett-consistent result: "favorite holding period is forever." Answer to "when to exit" = essentially DON'T (on these rules).
- Fundamental-trigger exits all lose to hold. Files: qt_v4x_exits.py, data/qt_v4x_exits.{md,csv}.

## Trailing-stop-from-peak test (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_trailing.py`) — HOLD STILL WINS; exit question CLOSED
Per-position 5Y. ALL(621): HOLD mean +44.2%/med +14.1%/win58%/cap40% beats TS25 (+10.3%), TS35 (+18.0%), TS50 (+25.8%), and best **TS35_act20** (activate trail only after +20% gain) +31.4%/med +8.0%/win56%/cap26%. **No trailing stop beats pure HOLD on mean OR median.** Tight stops (25/35%) cut early (median negative); activation-after-gain is much better but still < HOLD. GROWTH+BOTH: HOLD +41% > all trailing (worst for trailing — volatile, gets stopped). 
- **Face validity (why)**: TS35 helped smooth toppers (VTP +316% vs HOLD +244%; DGC +25% vs −14%) but DESTROYED MWG (−4% vs +123% — stopped on COVID mid-run drawdown before the real run). Asymmetry: cutting ONE MWG costs more than avoiding several VNM round-trips.
- **DEFINITIVE EXIT VERDICT (all rules tested)**: for a quality-compounder long-term filter, optimal exit = HOLD / don't use exit rules. Maximally Buffett-consistent. Pragmatic exception: if path-comfort matters (can't stomach VNM/DGC give-backs), TS35_act20 ≈ HOLD mean with lower per-position drawdown — a preference trade (return vs path), NOT an edge. Caveat: per-position unlimited-capital; in a slot-limited portfolio, stop-out-to-redeploy could differ (= portfolio mgmt, deliberately set aside). Files: qt_v4x_trailing.py, data/qt_v4x_trailing.{md,csv}.

## Realistic sleeve build (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_sleeve.py`) — mechanical sleeve LAGS index; use as idea-generator
Equal-weight (N_MAX=25), hold-long (sell only tier→E), state-aware target equity {CRI 1.0/BEA .95/NEU .80/BUL .65/EXB .50}, monthly. Results (2014-26): SLEEVE_STATE CAGR 5.93%/DD **−59.2%**/wealth 1.98; SLEEVE_FULL 8.53%/−40.2%/2.64; VNINDEX 10.64%/−43.6%/3.32. **Both lag VNI; STATE worse than FULL.**
- **State-aware accumulation FAILED**: (a) cash drag — NEUTRAL (dominant state) realized only 54% equity (too few signals to hit 80% target) → missed 2016-19 bull (2014-COVID: STATE −12% vs VNI +33%); (b) averaging-down via crisis top-up amplified DD to −59% when 2022 smallcap crash deepened (sleeve holds volatile smallmid quality). Lesson extends the exit finding: don't time cash either — timing hurt (like rule-exits hurt).
- **Even FULL quality sleeve lags VNI** (8.53 vs 10.64) — consistent w/ whole session: quality long-only ≈/< bull-heavy VN index (VIC/large-cap led; quality smallmid lags in bull).
- **Pick-edge doesn't translate to mechanical sleeve**: event-study showed great picks (3Y +30%, VTP +554%, 5Y mean +44%) but 25-slot equal-weight DILUTES multibaggers among mediocre picks; index is a high bar; quality lags bull.
- **VERDICT: QT v4.x = focused IDEA-GENERATOR, NOT a mechanical diversified sleeve.** It correctly identifies multibaggers (BOTH×smallmid×crisis/bear → VTP/MWG/DGC/VCS); a CONCENTRATED investor selecting among its signals + holding long captures the edge; a diversified mechanical book dilutes to ~index. Do NOT state-time the cash (hurt). Files: qt_v4x_sleeve.py, data/qt_v4x_sleeve.{md,csv}.

## Concentrated sleeve + index-parking (2026-05-29, `qt_v4x_concentrated.py`) — modest alpha, ~index net
Fixed v1 sleeve flaws: 3Y rotation (MAX_HOLD_M=36) frees slots to capture later multibaggers (else hold-forever locks 2014 vintage), and PARK idle cash in index (fixes cash drag).
- **Concentration MONOTONICALLY helps** (confirms dilution was the killer): TOP5 CAGR 7.91% > TOP8 5.86 > TOP12 4.43 > TOP25 2.19. But all lag VNI 10.64% due to MASSIVE cash drag (TOP5 51% / TOP25 84% avg cash — archetype signals too sparse to fill even 5 slots).
- **TOP5 + idle cash PARKED in index = BEATS VNI**: TOP5_PARK CAGR 11.34%/wealth 3.58 vs VNI 10.64%/3.32 (**+0.69pp**); TOP8_PARK −0.46, TOP12_PARK −0.73 (only max concentration wins). Drivers: HAH +0.63, HPG +0.44, DXG +0.32, VSC +0.26 (cyclicals caught cheap in crisis/bear = the archetype). → concentrated picks DO add alpha on top of beta; cash drag (not picks) was the drag.
- **HONEST verdict**: alpha is MODEST (+0.69pp), ONLY at TOP5 (high idiosyncratic risk, path-dependent on few winners), worse MaxDD (−49% vs −44%); realistic −1.5pp cost haircut ≈ erases edge → net ~index-like. Consistent with whole session: VN bull/large-cap-led market makes index hard to beat; FA edge real at pick-level but capacity/dilution/cost erode to ~index at portfolio level.
- **Final use**: QT v4.x = focused IDEA-GENERATOR for a CONCENTRATED investor selecting among its signals (esp. BOTH×smallmid×crisis/bear → HAH/HPG/VTP/MWG type) + hold ~3Y + park idle in index. NOT a mechanical index-crushing alpha machine. Files: qt_v4x_concentrated.py, data/qt_v4x_concentrated.{md,csv}.

## CASH-MACHINE gate (user insight 2026-05-31, `cash_machine_screen.py`) — how user picked VCS/DGC early
User's edge my frameworks missed: select on (1) CFO>NP SUSTAINED many quarters (real cash generator, TTM basis — single-quarter CFO too noisy from working-capital timing) + (2) NON-DILUTIVE (no shareholder cash-raises; only dividends/bonus shares). Rare self-funding compounder = GATE not blended axis. NOTE: CF_OA_P0 = Cash Flow Operating Activities RAW VND (NOT "operating/assets" — dictionary mislabel); CFO/NP = CF_OA_P0/NP_P0.
- **Validation: DGC @2016-09 = CASH_MACHINE TRUE** (TTM CFO/NP 1.21, 67% q≥1, cash 6→79bn) ✅ caught pre-run. **VCS @2015-12 borderline (TTM 0.53)** — hyper-growth consumed working capital → CFO<NP temporarily, BUT shares −20% (buyback, non-dilutive) + cash 121→216bn. → TWO flavors: (a) mature cash-cow CFO>NP (DGC); (b) growth self-funder CFO+ / cash-accumulating / non-dilutive (VCS). Strict CFO/NP≥1 gate misses (b).
- **Current cash machines (non-bank, TTM CFO/NP≥1 sustained + cash growing + non-dilutive): CVT, HDG, HAH, FMC, QTP, PTB** (exclude banks — CFO/NP meaningless). **High-conviction intersection w/ unified-screener CHEAP_QUALITY = QTP, PTB, FMC** (cheap + cash-machine + quality).
- Why old QT v4 missed: cash axis used noisy single-q CFO/NP, blended 1/7 weight; dilution dropped for weak IC. Fix: add CASH_MACHINE as a quality BADGE/gate (TTM, + non-dilution + cash-accumulation), not an IC ranker. Same meta-lesson as redflag/bank (quality=gate not ranker). Files: cash_machine_screen.py, data/cash_machine_screen.{md,csv}.

## REINVESTMENT RUNWAY — cash-machine alone ≠ multibagger (user insight 2026-05-31, CRITICAL refinement)
Why VCS/DGC multibagged but QTP can't, though all are cash machines: **multibagger needs 3 things, not just cash-machine: (1) cash-machine (CFO>NP) + (2) reinvestment RUNWAY (asset/capacity growing) + (3) HIGH ROIC on incremental capital.** Compounding rate ≈ ROIC × reinvestment-rate. Validated (BQ, asset CAGR4y / reinvest=−CF_Invest_5Y/CF_OA_5Y / ROIC5Y): **QTP = YIELD cash-cow** (power plant, asset CAGR −5%, reinvest 0.01, ROIC14% → "earnings growth" is just declining-depreciation, FINITE & fake, pays out → NO multibag); **DGC = compounder** (asset +18%, ROIC 29%); HAH(+23%/21%, cyclical), FMC(+12.5%/10%), PTB(+4.6%/13%) reinvesting; **CVT = value-DESTRUCTIVE growth** (reinvest 2.05 but ROIC 5.8% — cash machine that reinvests at poor returns); **VCS NOW matured** (asset −3.5%, reinvest 0.06 — its compounder runway was 2015-18, now a cash-return/yield profile like QTP). Key dynamics: **(a) runway is TIME-VARYING — buy compounder when runway OPEN, recognize when it closes (VCS→yield)**; (b) ROIC gates "good" vs "value-destructive" cash machines (CVT). Reclassify cash machines: COMPOUNDER{DGC,HAH,PTB,FMC} / YIELD{QTP=dividend play not multibag} / low-ROIC{CVT avoid}. Golden compounder-cheap intersection (cheap+cash-machine+runway+ROIC) = PTB, FMC (NOT QTP — yield only). To bake into screener: split CASH_MACHINE badge → COMPOUNDER (ROIC≥12% & asset-growth>0) vs YIELD (asset-growth≤0/reinvest~0).

## Caveats
Quality universe = 62 names with ≥12Q A/B history → mild survivorship (delisted/never-quality excluded by construction); edge is conditional on "already a quality name." 3Y horizon N=302 (entries ≤~2023). This is signal-quality (the right altitude for a long-term FILTER), distinct from deployable-portfolio (separate question — would need capital/position sizing, where prior sims showed capacity binds).

content.content:
1	---
2	name: cyclical-commodity-framework-2026
3	description: Commodity-cyclical stock framework (rubber/steel/phosphorus/urea) — buy at commodity TROUGH not peak; contrarian; QT v4 excludes these by design
4	metadata: 
5	  node_type: memory
6	  type: project
7	  originSessionId: 23c2ffe0-ced2-4d30-bcff-e0b6aa1c8435
8	---
9	
10	# Cyclical-commodity stock framework (2026-05-29)
11	
12	Context: QT v4 (Buffett compounder) excludes commodity cyclicals by design (their quality oscillates → fail pct_AB≥70% gate). User insight: cyclicals (DRI rubber, DGC phosphorus, HPG steel, DCM/DPM urea) need a COMMODITY-PRICE-driven framework — track world commodity price + buy when valuation low + price dislocated. Built first prototype for RUBBER.
13	
14	## Commodity price snapshots (web-fetched, ~end-May-2026)
15	- **Rubber** ~$2.39/kg ($2,390/t), **95th pctile 5Y, near highest since 2017, +40% YoY → elevated/strong**. Group: DRI/PHR/DPR/GVR/TRC/HRC.
16	- **Yellow phosphorus** >30,000 ¥/t, elevated but volatile (US export ban surge Mar-2026 then cooled). DGC — but DGC earnings WEAK (NP −49%/Rev −24%) despite elevated P4 (base effect from 2022 peak).
17	- **Urea** ~$443/t, **fell 35%/month (correcting from Apr-2026 $700 spike)** → fertilizer timing unfavorable now. DCM/DPM.
18	- **Steel HRC** China ~$460/t (FOB), +moderate; HPG earnings booming (NP +169%) → steel cycle favorable for HPG.
19	Data: `data/rubber_monthly.csv` (IndexMundi USD/kg 2006-2026, the only full history ingested so far).
20	
21	## RUBBER prototype — VALIDATED but CONTRARIAN (`rubber_cyclical.py`)
22	Event study, 1,016 monthly obs across 6 rubber stocks, fwd 1Y/2Y by rubber regime (price vs trailing-36m median = GOOD/WEAK) × stock drawdown:
23	- **rubber WEAK + stock DEEP dd<−25% → 1Y +37%/win79%, 2Y +69%/win87%** (best). rubber WEAK any-dd: +18%/+37%. ALL: +7%/+21%. **rubber GOOD → 1Y −0%/2Y +2% (poor)**.
24	- **KEY: buy at the commodity TROUGH (price weak/depressed) + stock beaten down, NOT when commodity is strong/elevated.** Classic cyclical mean-reversion — by the time the commodity is clearly "good/uptrend," the upside is priced. This REFINES the user's "buy when commodity uptrend" → actually buy commodity-WEAK + stock-dislocated (the trough, before uptrend obvious).
25	- Stock dislocation is the DOMINANT driver; commodity-weak is an added tailwind. DRI face validity: 04/2025 Close 10,800/dd−33%/PB 1.23 in market crisis → +31% 1Y (rubber was elevated then — stock-cheapness carried it; intraday low 8,390 → +80%).
26	- **⚠️ CURRENT caution**: rubber at 95th pctile → rubber stocks at EXPENSIVE end of cycle → poor expected forward per this pattern. Good entries (rubber weak) were 2019-20, 2023 — passed. DRI already +80% from Apr-2025 low.
27	- Caveats: monthly autocorrelated obs; "GOOD→poor" partly driven by 2011 super-peak crash; IndexMundi monthly ≠ exact VN rubber price. Directional, not a clean backtest.

29	## Multi-group generalization (2026-05-29, `cyclical_multi.py`) — contrarian pattern GENERALIZES
30	Ingested monthly histories: `data/{urea,dap,iron_ore}_monthly.csv` (IndexMundi 2006-2026 USD/t). Yellow phosphorus P4 = NO clean history (SunSirs current ~33,600¥/t≈$4,600 only; procurementresource Q1-2026 ~$4,250) → DGC uses DAP as partial phosphate-chain proxy. Steel: iron_ore as ferrous proxy (NOTE: iron ore is HPG's INPUT/cost, not output — "weak=good margins" logic differs from rubber where commodity=revenue; HRC would be truer).
31	**"commodity WEAK + stock deep-dd<−25%" is the BEST bucket in ALL 4 groups** (fwd 1Y/2Y): rubber +37/+69, steel(iron) +34/+60, urea +17/+27 (win 84-86%), DAP +26/+79 (win 88%). GOOD regime mediocre/poor in all (rubber −0/+2, steel −12/−17, urea +10/+21, DAP +14/+30). Buy-the-trough is universal across commodities, not just rubber.
32	**CURRENT positioning (2026-03 data)**: STEEL/HPG = iron ore WEAK (pctile 0.35) → FAVORABLE (cheap input, only group at buy-zone; HPG NP +169% fits); RUBBER pctile 0.95 + UREA pctile 0.90(correcting −35%/mo) = EXPENSIVE end, caution; DAP pctile 0.65 = neutral. Caveats: monthly autocorrelated, small cells, 2008/2011 super-cycle influence, DGC P4-proxy weak, screening-not-advice.
33	
34	## SunSirs parser attempt (2026-05-29) — data is IMAGE-only, route CLOSED for series
35	Tried scraping SunSirs for HRC + P4 history. Technically succeeded: bypassed anti-bot (HW_CHECK cookie = static 32-hex in page → set cookie, refetch). BUT SunSirs exposes NO series data — history is a server-rendered IMAGE (`graph.100ppi.com/?w=&h=&c=p&id=708&state=english`, id 708=P4 / 195=HRC), and even the image is only ~3 months; page text shows only ~6 days spot. **Conclusion: free SunSirs cannot provide multi-year P4/HRC monthly series.** Image read: P4 now ~33,600¥/t, +40%/3mo, at 3-mo high → with anchors (2021 peak ~60k, 2023 trough ~23k) P4 is MID-cycle recovering, NOT trough → DGC not at ideal contrarian buy-zone. **Resolution: HPG/steel → iron-ore proxy (have, sufficient); P4/DGC → needs PAID feed (SunSirs/SMM API) or manual quarterly, stays on DAP proxy + spot monitoring.** Don't re-chase free P4/HRC scraping — it's a data-availability wall, not technical.

41	## MARGIN-CYCLE detector — commodity CONSUMERS (converters), INVERSE of producers (2026-05-31, `margin_cycle_detector.py`)
42	User insight (BMP +3x since 2022): a converter (input=raw commodity) with PRICING POWER earns windfall margin when input is at cyclical LOW. Signal = GPM percentile vs OWN history (observable footprint, no commodity price needed). BUY when GPM at cyclical LOW (margin crushed=input peak→reverts up) for a brand (through-cycle ROE≥12); CAUTION at GPM peak (compression risk). **BMP validated**: 2021Q3 GPM 4.5% (trough, PVC peak)=MARGIN_BOTTOM=the BUY → NP ×7-8; NOW GPM 47.2% pctile 0.98=MARGIN_PEAK=caution (buying after ×3 = buying peak margin; PVC recovery→compress). Producer framework (buy commodity-low) + margin-cycle consumer (buy margin-crushed/input-high) cover both sides. Files: margin_cycle_detector.py, data/margin_cycle_detector.{md,csv}.

44	## EXPORT/TAM = deepest runway determinant (user insight 2026-05-31)
45	Why some compounders sustain & others slow: **runway depends on TAM.** (1) EXPORT (DGC/VCS, global market ~unlimited) → durable runway → sustained multibagger; (2) DOMESTIC S-CURVE (MWG smartphones 2014-19, VNM 2007-15, FRT/Long Châu pharma 2022-now) → explosive during market-CAPTURE then SATURATES & slows sharply — buy in capture phase, recognize saturation; (3) DOMESTIC STRUCTURAL (HPG — developing-country infra/public-investment/urbanization) → long domestic runway b/c country itself grows. EXPORT tag manual (BQ no export%; vnstock may have segment data — future).
46	
47	## Rubber STRUCTURAL deficit + DRI/PHR valuation (user challenge 2026-05-31) — percentile blind to structural shift
48	User challenge to "rubber 95th pctile=avoid": price depends on supply-demand + oil anchor, not mean-reversion. **VERIFIED (ANRPC)**: global NR deficit ~400k t 2026 = 6TH CONSECUTIVE YEAR; 600-800k/yr deficit to 2028; supply can't ramp (7-yr tree maturity, 30-yr lifespan, NO replanting during 2014-20 low-price years, yields −15% since 2015, land→durian/IP, SE-Asia drought). Pure rubber-price leverage. **PHR ≠ DRI: it's an ASSET-PLAY** — lumpy NP spikes (421/228/224/259/279bn quarters) = LAND COMPENSATION (rubber land→IP conversion, multi-yr pipeline VSIP III/NTC) + recurring IP rental (NTC/Tân Bình stakes) + rubber. PE13/PB2.02 premium prices land/IP optionality; **PE/PEG/margin MISLEADING → value PHR on NAV/SOTP** (land at market >> book cost; +IP annuity). New framework gap: **ASSET_PLAY/SOTP flag** (lumpy non-operating NP / NP-revenue decorrelation / land-heavy → NAV not earnings-multiple) — screener mis-handles land-banks/holdcos as operating cos. PHR land-NAV not in BQ (cost basis) → needs external estimate.
50	
51	## BUILT + WIRED: structural overlay + asset-play (2026-05-31)
52	**(1) `cyclical_structural.py`** — STRUCTURE dict per commodity (rubber=DEFICIT/oil-anchored, iron_ore=RESPONSIVE, urea=AMPLE-soft, dap=BALANCED) + Brent cost-anchor (now $104, pctile 0.91 — HIGH). Verdict = pctile × structure × oil. **Rubber 0.95 reclassified AVOID-new → ELEVATED-SUPPORTED** (6yr deficit + oil floor → sustains); **urea 0.90 stays cyclical-PEAK AVOID** (ample/soft, no support) — overlay distinguishes structurally-elevated (hold) from cyclically-high (revert). Validated PHR=ASSET_PLAY (corr+0.46/turn0.30, land-comp NP), DRI=operating (corr+0.80, NP tracks rubber); also flags DPR + IP/RE cluster (KBC/BCM/NLG/IDC/NTC/DXG); banks excluded (route precedence). **Both WIRED into unified_screener**: cyclical eval uses CYC_STRUCT verdict; ASSET_PLAY→NAV badge on non-bank rows. 54	## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)
55	Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). Next: ingest historical series for steel HRC (SunSirs China), phosphorus (SunSirs), urea (TradingEconomics/IndexMundi) and repeat the event study. Files: `rubber_cyclical.py`, `data/rubber_monthly.csv`, `data/rubber_cyclical_obs.csv`.

# Cyclical-commodity stock framework (2026-05-29)

Context: QT v4 (Buffett compounder) excludes commodity cyclicals by design (their quality oscillates → fail pct_AB≥70% gate). User insight: cyclicals (DRI rubber, DGC phosphorus, HPG steel, DCM/DPM urea) need a COMMODITY-PRICE-driven framework — track world commodity price + buy when valuation low + price dislocated. Built first prototype for RUBBER.

## Commodity price snapshots (web-fetched, ~end-May-2026)
- **Rubber** ~$2.39/kg ($2,390/t), **95th pctile 5Y, near highest since 2017, +40% YoY → elevated/strong**. Group: DRI/PHR/DPR/GVR/TRC/HRC.
- **Yellow phosphorus** >30,000 ¥/t, elevated but volatile (US export ban surge Mar-2026 then cooled). DGC — but DGC earnings WEAK (NP −49%/Rev −24%) despite elevated P4 (base effect from 2022 peak).
- **Urea** ~$443/t, **fell 35%/month (correcting from Apr-2026 $700 spike)** → fertilizer timing unfavorable now. DCM/DPM.
- **Steel HRC** China ~$460/t (FOB), +moderate; HPG earnings booming (NP +169%) → steel cycle favorable for HPG.
Data: `data/rubber_monthly.csv` (IndexMundi USD/kg 2006-2026, the only full history ingested so far).

## RUBBER prototype — VALIDATED but CONTRARIAN (`rubber_cyclical.py`)
Event study, 1,016 monthly obs across 6 rubber stocks, fwd 1Y/2Y by rubber regime (price vs trailing-36m median = GOOD/WEAK) × stock drawdown:
- **rubber WEAK + stock DEEP dd<−25% → 1Y +37%/win79%, 2Y +69%/win87%** (best). rubber WEAK any-dd: +18%/+37%. ALL: +7%/+21%. **rubber GOOD → 1Y −0%/2Y +2% (poor)**.
- **KEY: buy at the commodity TROUGH (price weak/depressed) + stock beaten down, NOT when commodity is strong/elevated.** Classic cyclical mean-reversion — by the time the commodity is clearly "good/uptrend," the upside is priced. This REFINES the user's "buy when commodity uptrend" → actually buy commodity-WEAK + stock-dislocated (the trough, before uptrend obvious).
- Stock dislocation is the DOMINANT driver; commodity-weak is an added tailwind. DRI face validity: 04/2025 Close 10,800/dd−33%/PB 1.23 in market crisis → +31% 1Y (rubber was elevated then — stock-cheapness carried it; intraday low 8,390 → +80%).
- **⚠️ CURRENT caution**: rubber at 95th pctile → rubber stocks at EXPENSIVE end of cycle → poor expected forward per this pattern. Good entries (rubber weak) were 2019-20, 2023 — passed. DRI already +80% from Apr-2025 low.
- Caveats: monthly autocorrelated obs; "GOOD→poor" partly driven by 2011 super-peak crash; IndexMundi monthly ≠ exact VN rubber price. Directional, not a clean backtest.

## Multi-group generalization (2026-05-29, `cyclical_multi.py`) — contrarian pattern GENERALIZES

**"commodity WEAK + stock deep-dd<−25%" is the BEST bucket in ALL 4 groups** (fwd 1Y/2Y): rubber +37/+69, steel(iron) +34/+60, urea +17/+27 (win 84-86%), DAP +26/+79 (win 88%). GOOD regime mediocre/poor in all (rubber −0/+2, steel −12/−17, urea +10/+21, DAP +14/+30). Buy-the-trough is universal across commodities, not just rubber.
**CURRENT positioning (2026-03 data)**: STEEL/HPG = iron ore WEAK (pctile 0.35) → FAVORABLE (cheap input, only group at buy-zone; HPG NP +169% fits); RUBBER pctile 0.95 + UREA pctile 0.90(correcting −35%/mo) = EXPENSIVE end, caution; DAP pctile 0.65 = neutral. Brent $104 = 2-edged: lifts rubber/synthetic floor (producers win) but squeezes plastic-consumer margins (BMP margin-cycle + oil-up = compression — two detectors warn together). **(2) `asset_play_detector.py`** — flags ASSET_PLAY (NP↔Rev corr low + NP CV high + asset-turn<0.5 → value on NAV/SOTP). Validated PHR=ASSET_PLAY (corr+0.46/turn0.30, land-comp NP), DRI=operating (corr+0.80, NP tracks rubber); also flags DPR + IP/RE cluster (KBC/BCM/NLG/IDC/NTC/DXG); banks excluded (route precedence). **Both WIRED into unified_screener**: cyclical eval uses CYC_STRUCT verdict; ASSET_PLAY→NAV badge on non-bank rows. Now DRI=ELEVATED-SUPPORTED(operating), PHR=ELEVATED-SUPPORTED+ASSET_PLAY→NAV. Files: cyclical_structural.py, asset_play_detector.py, data/{cyclical_structural,asset_play,brent_monthly}.csv. **PROPAGATED into dna_card.py too** (reads cyclical_structural.csv + asset_play.csv): cards now show structural verdict (e.g. DPR "rubber 0.95 [DEFICIT]→ELEVATED-SUPPORTED", DCM "urea [AMPLE/soft]→cyclical-PEAK") + ⚑ASSET_PLAY→NAV line (DPR/PHR land-banks). unified_screener + dna_card fully consistent (both read the 2 CSVs).

## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)
Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). Next: ingest historical series for steel HRC (SunSirs China), phosphorus (SunSirs), urea (TradingEconomics/IndexMundi) and repeat the event study. Files: `rubber_cyclical.py`, `data/rubber_monthly.csv`, `data/rubber_cyclical_obs.csv`.

content.text:
The cached screener output (refreshed 2026‑05‑29/31) has everything I need — full 8L routing, verdicts, and the engine/cash‑machine/asset‑play overlays. Rather than re-run the whole pipeline for a 2‑day‑old snapshot, I'll assemble the 20-name list directly from it, applying the 8L selection logic (route → correct-lens valuation → engine/runway → moat/cash-machine → structural/event gate).

## Danh sách 20 cổ phiếu — Hệ thống 8L (snapshot ~2026‑05‑29/31)

**Thị trường: NEUTRAL** (Ngũ Hành) — không phải timing lý tưởng (crisis/bear là điểm mua tốt nhất cho quality), nên đây là **screening, không phải lệnh mua**. Danh sách cân bằng 3 route, ưu tiên profile 8L mạnh nhất.

### 🟢 Nhóm 1 — GOLDEN COMPOUNDER (cheap_quality + engine COMPOUNDER) — lõi danh mục

| # | Mã | Route | 8L đọc | Định giá | LiqB |
|---|-----|-------|--------|----------|------|
| 1 | **SCS** | Compounder | ⭐ Profile mạnh nhất universe: moat **STRONG** (độc quyền hạ tầng hàng không, GPM 78%/ROE 47%) + COMPOUNDER + DURABLE | PE6.4 pe_z‑0.9 | 7 |
| 2 | **HAH** | Compounder | ★★ Cash‑machine◆ + COMPOUNDER (asset +23%/ROIC 21%); *caveat: cyclical shipping* | PE8.0 PEG0.28 ROE26% | 48 |
| 3 | **PTB** | Compounder | ★★ Cash‑machine◆ + COMPOUNDER (đá+gỗ), reinvest ROIC 13% | PE7.4 PEG0.23 ROE16% | 4 |
| 4 | **TLG** | Compounder | COMPOUNDER + moat BRAND (Thiên Long); ⚠ margin gần peak | PE9.7 PEG0.21 ROE19% | 6 |
| 5 | **NTP** | Compounder | COMPOUNDER nhựa, ROE20% | PE9.9 PEG0.49 | 9 |
| 6 | **DHA** | Compounder | COMPOUNDER đá XD, dd‑31% (chiết khấu sâu) | PE6.3 PEG0.84 ROE18% | 2 |
| 7 | **NNC** | Compounder | COMPOUNDER đá, dd‑38% (rẻ + dislocated) | PE6.4 PEG0.04 ROE16% | 2 |

### 🔵 Nhóm 2 — COMPOUNDER chất lượng khác (BUY‑zone)

| # | Mã | 8L đọc | Định giá | LiqB |
|---|-----|--------|----------|------|
| 8 | **VNM** | Moat BRAND mạnh nhưng runway MATURE (bão hòa nội địa) → định giá rẻ + lợi suất, không multibag | PE12.0 pe_z‑1.4 ROE29% | 225 |
| 9 | **PVT** | Vận tải dầu, dòng tiền ổn (engine LOWROIC nhưng cheap+thanh khoản lớn) | PE9.1 PEG0.19 | 190 |
| 10 | **BWE** | Nước (LOWROIC_GROWTH nhưng PEG0.20, phòng thủ) | PE8.8 pe_z‑1.1 | 7 |
| 11 | **FMC** | Cash‑machine◆ thủy sản XK; ⚠ moat WEAK (commodity GPM12%, rủi ro DRC‑like) | PE6.0 pe_z‑1.5 ROE16% | 1 |
| 12 | **QTP** | ⚠ Engine **YIELD◆** — cash‑cow điện, KHÔNG runway → **cổ tức, không phải multibag** (đúng bài học QTP vs VCS) | PE5.0 pe_z‑1.3 | 7 |

### 🏦 Nhóm 3 — BANK (NPL‑gate CLEAN, lăng kính P/B‑vs‑ROE riêng)

| # | Mã | 8L đọc | Chất lượng tài sản | PB |
|---|-----|--------|-------------------|-----|
| 13 | **ACB** | CLEAN, NPL giảm | NPL0.97% cov114% ROE17% | 1.30 |
| 14 | **CTG** | CLEAN, ROE cao | NPL1.02% cov167% ROE22% | 1.44 |
| 15 | **MBB** | CLEAN (validated +9x từ 2017) | NPL1.42% cov92% ROE20% | 1.40 |
| 16 | **TCB** | CLEAN, CAR15% cao nhất | NPL1.09% cov129% ROE15% | 1.31 |

### ⚙️ Nhóm 4 — CYCLICAL thép (chỉ nhóm duy nhất ở commodity TROUGH)

| # | Mã | 8L đọc | Tín hiệu | LiqB |
|---|-----|--------|----------|------|
| 17 | **HPG** | Quặng sắt pctile **0.35 WEAK** = input rẻ → biên tốt; NP +169%; đầu ngành | iron_ore WEAK, dd‑21% PB1.45 | 666 |
| 18 | **NKG** | TROUGH_BUY: quặng rẻ + cổ phiếu dd‑31% PB0.8 | TROUGH_BUY | 44 |
| 19 | **HSG** | Tôn, ACCUMULATE (input rẻ, PB0.88) | iron_ore WEAK, dd‑23% | 43 |

### 💎 Nhóm 5 — Asset‑play / Special‑situation (1 suất, định giá theo NAV không theo PE)

| # | Mã | 8L đọc | Lưu ý |
|---|-----|--------|-------|
| 20 | **DGC** | **SPECIAL_SITUATION** — Q1/26 NP‑49% là **sự kiện** (mỏ apatite Khai Trường 25 bị đình chỉ điều tra + lãnh đạo bị khởi tố), KHÔNG phải value‑trap. Moat phốt pho còn nguyên. Turnaround rủi ro cao: chờ mỏ mở lại + lưu huỳnh hạ nhiệt | dd‑55% PB1.12 — định giá rủi ro‑sự kiện ◆ |

---

### Cân bằng & nguyên tắc 8L áp dụng
- **7 Compounder + 5 quality‑khác + 4 Bank + 3 Cyclical‑thép + 1 Special** → phủ cả 3 route, không lệch ngành.
- **Mỗi mã được soi đúng lăng kính**: bank theo NPL/PB‑ROE (không theo PEG), thép theo regime quặng sắt (không theo PE‑level — bẫy PE chu kỳ), compounder theo multi‑lens cheap + engine/runway.
- **Engine overlay phân biệt**: QTP=YIELD (cổ tức), FMC moat WEAK (rủi ro), so với SCS/HAH/PTB = compounder thật ◆.
- **Event overlay**: DGC không bị AVOID mù — đã verify là special‑situation.

### ⚠️ Cảnh báo quan trọng
1. **Thanh khoản**: nhiều GOLDEN nhỏ (DHA/NNC ~2B, PTB 4B) — khó giải ngân lớn. Nhóm thanh khoản cao: HPG, VNM, PVT, GAS‑class, các bank.
2. **Timing NEUTRAL** — không phải CRISIS/BEAR (điểm mua quality tốt nhất theo FA‑horizon study). Đây là **danh sách theo dõi/tích lũy**, không phải tín hiệu all‑in.
3. **Cyclical thép** = nhóm duy nhất ở commodity trough (rubber 0.95 / urea 0.90 = đắt, đã loại).
4. Snapshot ~29–31/05/2026; nếu muốn refresh số live, chạy lại pipeline: `bank_lens_v3.py → cash_machine_screen.py → ... → unified_screener.py`.

Bạn muốn tôi (a) **refresh số liệu live** bằng cách chạy lại pipeline, (b) **xuất DNA card 8 chiều** cho từng mã trong 20 mã này (`dna_card.py`), hay (c) **xếp hạng/chấm điểm tổng hợp** để ra top‑N ưu tiên?

content.text: Let me refresh the live data. First I'll read the screener to understand its data dependencies, then run the pipeline.

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	unified_screener.py — one screener, auto-routes each ticker to the right framework
4\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
5	Each company type needs its own valuation lens (validated this research stream):
6	  BANK        (ICB 8355)        → NPL/coverage/CAR GATE + P/B-vs-ROE  (real vnstock data, cached)
7	  CYCLICAL    (commodity map)   → commodity-trough + stock dislocation (contrarian)
8	  COMPOUNDER  (everything else) → multi-lens cheap (PEG/pe_z/pb_z) + value-trap guard
9	Router assigns each ticker, runs its lens, emits a NORMALIZED verdict + action.
10	
11	Inputs reused: data/bank_lens_v3.csv (banks), data/{rubber,iron_ore,urea,dap}_monthly.csv
12	(commodity regime), BQ ticker (compounder + cyclical-stock valuation), fa_ratings_lh (quality gate).
13	Output: data/unified_screener.md + .csv
14	"""
15	import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
16	import sys
17	try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
18	except Exception: pass
19	import os, subprocess, tempfile
20	from io import StringIO
21	import numpy as np, pandas as pd
22	WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
23	PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
24	# commodity cyclicals → which commodity series drives them
25	COMMODITY_MAP={
26	 "DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
27	 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore",
28	 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
29	 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}  # DGC/CSV = phosphate-chain proxy (real P4 has no series)
30	
31	# ---- EVENT overrides: temporary event-driven disruptions (NOT structural) ----
32	# Mechanical VALUE_TRAP/cmdty flags can't see a one-off event + forward recovery.
33	# Manually-curated; each needs independent verification (WebSearch) before trusting.
34	EVENTS={
35	 "DGC":{"type":"SPECIAL_SITUATION","note":"Q1/26 −49% NP: Khai truong 25 apatite mine SUSPENDED (investigation) + chairman family (Dao Huu Huyen+son) prosecuted/arrested (illegal mining/waste). New board=founder family. Moat intact (dominant VN phosphorus, sells out). SWING VAR=mine-access restoration + sulfur cost (spiked ~2x ME war). Bull: temp event, franchise irreplaceable (Buffett bad-quarter). Bear: mine access permanently curtailed=structural raw-material loss."},
36	 "PAT":{"type":"SPECIAL_SITUATION","note":"DGC-group apatite arm; same event (mine/maintenance/legal). Q1/26 disrupted, ROE_tr still 46%. Same swing vars as DGC."},
37	}
38	
39	def bq(sql):
40	    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
41	    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=300,shell=True)
42	    finally:
43	        try: os.unlink(tmp)
44	        except: pass
45	    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))
46	
47	# ---- banks (cached real-data lens v3) ----
48	bank=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))
49	bank_set=set(bank["ticker"])
50	# engine classification (cash-machine + reinvestment-runway + ROIC) for compounders
51	try:
52	    eng=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv"))
53	    ENGINE={r["ticker"]:(r["engine"],bool(r["machine"])) for _,r in eng.iterrows()}
54	except Exception: ENGINE={}
55	# refinement 1: structural overlay for cyclicals (percentile × supply-structure × oil)
56	try:
57	    cs=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","cyclical_structural.csv"))
58	    CYC_STRUCT={r["ticker"]:(r["verdict"],r["structure"],r["pctile"],r["commodity"]) for _,r in cs.iterrows()}
59	except Exception: CYC_STRUCT={}
60	# refinement 2: asset-play / SOTP names (value on NAV not earnings) — exclude banks
61	try:
62	    ap=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","asset_play.csv"))
63	    ASSET_PLAY=set(ap[ap["verdict"]=="ASSET_PLAY"]["ticker"]) - bank_set
64	except Exception: ASSET_PLAY=set()
65	
66	# ---- quality universe (compounder candidates) from fa_ratings_lh ----
67	fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv")).sort_values(["ticker","quarter"])
68	fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int); fa["qn"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
69	fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qn"]*100
70	last=fa.groupby("ticker").tail(1)
71	quality=set(last[(last["pct_AB"]>=70)&(last["qn"]>=12)&(last["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))]["ticker"])
72	
73	# universe = quality compounders ∪ commodity cyclicals ∪ banks
74	universe=sorted(quality | set(COMMODITY_MAP) | bank_set)
75	nonbank=[t for t in universe if t not in bank_set]
76	tks="','".join(nonbank)
77	
78	# ---- pull valuation for non-bank tickers ----
79	val=bq(f"""WITH latest AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
80	hi AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi52 FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
81	SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
82	 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
83	 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
84	 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB
85	FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker""")
86	val=val.set_index("ticker")
87	
88	# ---- commodity regimes ----
89	comm_state={}
90	for com in set(COMMODITY_MAP.values()):
91	    c=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data",f"{com}_monthly.csv")); c.columns=["m","p"]
92	    c["med36"]=c["p"].rolling(36,min_periods=18).median()
93	    c["pctile5y"]=c["p"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
94	    comm_state[com]={"good":bool(c["p"].iloc[-1]>c["med36"].iloc[-1]),"pctile":float(c["pctile5y"].iloc[-1])}
95	
96	# ---- per-ticker evaluation ----
97	def eval_compounder(t):
98	    if t not in val.index: return ("COMPOUNDER","?","no data","")
99	    r=val.loc[t]; pe,pez,pbz,npy,roe,dd=r["PE"],r["pe_z"],r["pb_z"],r["np_yoy"],r["ROE5Y"],r["dd52"]
100	    peg=(pe/(npy*100)) if (pd.notna(npy) and npy>0 and pe>0) else np.nan
101	    hist=(pez<-1) or (pbz<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(pe<10) or (r["PB"]<1.2)
102	    trap=(pd.notna(npy) and npy<-0.15)
103	    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
104	    if trap and (hist or absc): v="VALUE_TRAP"; act="AVOID"
105	    elif n>=2: v="CHEAP_QUALITY"; act="BUY-zone"
106	    elif n==1: v="CHEAP_1lens"; act="WATCH"
107	    else: v="NOT_CHEAP"; act="WATCH" if roe>=12 else "PASS"
108	    detail=f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%" if pd.notna(peg) else f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%"
109	    return (v,act,detail,"⚠" if trap else "")
110	
111	def eval_cyclical(t):
112	    com=COMMODITY_MAP[t]; cs=comm_state[com]
113	    if t not in val.index: return (f"CYCLICAL/{com}","?","no stock data","")
114	    r=val.loc[t]; dd=r["dd52"]; pb=r["PB"]; deep=(pd.notna(dd) and dd<-0.25)
115	    pct=cs["pctile"]
116	    # STRUCTURAL overlay (refinement 1): percentile × supply-structure × oil-anchor
117	    if t in CYC_STRUCT:
118	        sv,struct,_,_=CYC_STRUCT[t]
119	        if pct<0.40 and deep: v="TROUGH_BUY"; act="BUY-zone"
120	        elif pct<0.40: v="cmdty_CHEAP"; act="ACCUMULATE/watch"
121	        elif "ELEVATED-SUPPORTED" in sv: v=f"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED({struct})"; act="HOLD/selective (not avoid)"
122	        elif "cyclical-PEAK" in sv: v=f"cmdty_PEAK({struct})"; act="AVOID-new (reverts)"
123	        else: v="cmdty_MID"; act="WAIT"
124	        detail=f"{com} pctile{pct:.2f} [{struct}] | stock dd{dd*100:+.0f}% PB{pb}"
125	        return (v,act,detail,"")
126	    # fallback (no structural data)
127	    if pct<0.40 and deep: v="TROUGH_BUY"; act="BUY-zone"
128	    elif pct<0.40: v="cmdty_CHEAP"; act="ACCUMULATE/watch"
129	    elif pct>0.80: v="cmdty_EXPENSIVE"; act="AVOID-new (late cycle)"
130	    else: v="cmdty_MID"; act="WAIT"
131	    detail=f"{com} pctile{pct:.2f}({'GOOD' if cs['good'] else 'WEAK'}) | stock dd{dd*100:+.0f}% PB{pb}"
132	    return (v,act,detail,"")
133	
134	def eval_bank(t):
135	    r=bank[bank["ticker"]==t].iloc[0]; g=r["gate"]
136	    act={"CLEAN":"BUY-eligible","WATCH":"WATCH","AVOID":"AVOID"}[g]
137	    # CLEAN + cheap-for-ROE (roe/pb high) → BUY
138	    roepb=r["ROE"]/r["PB"] if r["PB"]>0 else 0
139	    if g=="CLEAN" and roepb>0.12: act="BUY-zone"
140	    detail=f"NPL{r['NPL']*100:.2f}% cov{r['coverage']*100:.0f}% CAR{(r['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(r['CAR']) else float('nan')):.0f}% ROE{r['ROE']*100:.0f}% PB{r['PB']:.2f} (4qNPL{r['NPL_chg4q']:+.1f}pp)"
141	    flag="⚠" if g=="AVOID" else ""
142	    return (g,act,detail,flag)
143	
144	rows=[]
145	for t in universe:
146	    if t in bank_set: route="BANK"; v,act,det,fl=eval_bank(t)
147	    elif t in COMMODITY_MAP: route="CYCLICAL"; v,act,det,fl=eval_cyclical(t)
148	    else: route="COMPOUNDER"; v,act,det,fl=eval_compounder(t)
149	    # EVENT_CHECK overlay: VALUE_TRAP is never a blind AVOID — flag for manual event review
150	    if v=="VALUE_TRAP": act="EVENT_CHECK (verify: structural vs one-off?)"
151	    # explicit event overrides (verified special situations)
152	    if t in EVENTS:
153	        v="SPECIAL_SITUATION"; act="EVENT-driven → manual"; fl="◆"; det=det+" | EVENT: "+EVENTS[t]["note"][:90]+"..."
154	    liq=val.loc[t,"liqB"] if t in val.index else np.nan
155	    eng_lbl=""
156	    if route!="BANK" and t in ENGINE:   # engine badge for non-banks (banks use bank lens)
157	        e,cm=ENGINE[t]; eng_lbl=e+("◆" if cm else "")  # ◆ = also a strict cash-machine
158	    if t in ASSET_PLAY:                  # refinement 2: value on NAV not earnings-multiple
159	        eng_lbl=(eng_lbl+" ASSET_PLAY→NAV").strip(); det=det+" | ASSET_PLAY: value on NAV/SOTP (lumpy non-op NP, asset-heavy)"
160	    rows.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":v,"action":act,"engine":eng_lbl,"liqB":liq,"detail":det,"flag":fl})
161	out=pd.DataFrame(rows)
162	act_rank={"BUY-zone":0,"BUY-eligible":1,"ACCUMULATE/watch":2,"WATCH":3,"WAIT":4,"AVOID-new (late cycle)":5,"PASS":6,"AVOID":7}
163	out["ar"]=out["action"].map(act_rank).fillna(9)
164	out=out.sort_values(["route","ar","ticker"])
165	
166	lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
167	P("# Unified screener — auto-routed by company type (3 frameworks)")
168	P(f"universe {len(out)} | BANK {sum(out.route=='BANK')} · CYCLICAL {sum(out.route=='CYCLICAL')} · COMPOUNDER {sum(out.route=='COMPOUNDER')}")
169	P("commodity regimes: "+", ".join(f"{k}={v['pctile']:.2f}{'GOOD' if v['good'] else 'WEAK'}" for k,v in comm_state.items()))
170	P("")
171	for route in ["COMPOUNDER","CYCLICAL","BANK"]:
172	    g=out[out["route"]==route]
173	    P(f"## {route}  ({len(g)})")
174	    P(f"{'tkr':<6}{'verdict':<15}{'engine':<14}{'action':<22}{'liqB':>6}  detail")
175	    for _,r in g.iterrows():
176	        P(f"{r['ticker']:<6}{r['verdict']:<15}{r['engine']:<14}{r['action']:<22}{(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {r['detail']} {r['flag']}")
177	    P("")
178	P("## TOP actionable (action=BUY-zone, by route)")
179	for route in ["COMPOUNDER","CYCLICAL","BANK"]:
180	    g=out[(out["route"]==route)&(out["action"]=="BUY-zone")&((out["liqB"]>=2)|out["liqB"].isna())]
181	    P(f"  {route}: "+(", ".join(g['ticker'].tolist()) or "none"))
182	# GOLDEN = cheap + multibagger-engine (COMPOUNDER) + strict cash-machine(◆), liquid
183	gold=out[(out["verdict"]=="CHEAP_QUALITY")&(out["engine"].str.startswith("COMPOUNDER"))&(out["liqB"]>=2)]
184	goldcm=out[(out["verdict"]=="CHEAP_QUALITY")&(out["engine"]=="COMPOUNDER◆")&(out["liqB"]>=2)]
185	P("")
186	P("  ★ GOLDEN (cheap_quality + COMPOUNDER engine): "+(", ".join(gold['ticker'].tolist()) or "none"))
187	P("  ★★ + strict cash-machine◆: "+(", ".join(goldcm['ticker'].tolist()) or "none"))
188	P("")
189	P("Engine: COMPOUNDER (cash + asset-growth + ROIC≥12% = multibagger candidate) | YIELD (cash-cow no runway, e.g. QTP — dividend not multibag) | LOWROIC_GROWTH (grows but ROIC<12, value-destructive) | ◆=strict cash-machine(CFO>NP TTM). Banks excluded from engine (own lens).")
190	P("Routing: BANK=ICB8355(vnstock NPL-gate) | CYCLICAL=commodity map(trough+dislocation) | COMPOUNDER=else(multi-lens cheap).")
191	P("Caveat: snapshot ~2026-05-29; screening not advice; banks from cached vnstock v3; DGC/CSV use DAP proxy; cyclical needs commodity at trough (most now mid/high except iron-ore).")
192	out.drop(columns=["ar"]).to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"),index=False)
193	with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
194	P("Saved data/unified_screener.{md,csv}")

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
unified_screener.py — one screener, auto-routes each ticker to the right framework\[BINARY_STRIPPED]
Each company type needs its own valuation lens (validated this research stream):
  BANK        (ICB 8355)        → NPL/coverage/CAR GATE + P/B-vs-ROE  (real vnstock data, cached)
  CYCLICAL    (commodity map)   → commodity-trough + stock dislocation (contrarian)
  COMPOUNDER  (everything else) → multi-lens cheap (PEG/pe_z/pb_z) + value-trap guard
Router assigns each ticker, runs its lens, emits a NORMALIZED verdict + action.

Inputs reused: data/bank_lens_v3.csv (banks), data/{rubber,iron_ore,urea,dap}_monthly.csv
(commodity regime), BQ ticker (compounder + cyclical-stock valuation), fa_ratings_lh (quality gate).
Output: data/unified_screener.md + .csv
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import os, subprocess, tempfile
from io import StringIO
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
PROJECT="[REDACTED]"; BQ_BIN=r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
# commodity cyclicals → which commodity series drives them
COMMODITY_MAP={
 "DRI":"rubber","PHR":"rubber","DPR":"rubber","GVR":"rubber","TRC":"rubber","HRC":"rubber",
 "HPG":"iron_ore","HSG":"iron_ore","NKG":"iron_ore","SMC":"iron_ore","POM":"iron_ore",
 "DCM":"urea","DPM":"urea",
 "DDV":"dap","LAS":"dap","DGC":"dap","CSV":"dap"}  # DGC/CSV = phosphate-chain proxy (real P4 has no series)

# ---- EVENT overrides: temporary event-driven disruptions (NOT structural) ----
# Mechanical VALUE_TRAP/cmdty flags can't see a one-off event + forward recovery.
# Manually-curated; each needs independent verification (WebSearch) before trusting.
EVENTS={
 "DGC":{"type":"SPECIAL_SITUATION","note":"Q1/26 −49% NP: Khai truong 25 apatite mine SUSPENDED (investigation) + chairman family (Dao Huu Huyen+son) prosecuted/arrested (illegal mining/waste). New board=founder family. Moat intact (dominant VN phosphorus, sells out). SWING VAR=mine-access restoration + sulfur cost (spiked ~2x ME war). Bull: temp event, franchise irreplaceable (Buffett bad-quarter). Bear: mine access permanently curtailed=structural raw-material loss."},
 "PAT":{"type":"SPECIAL_SITUATION","note":"DGC-group apatite arm; same event (mine/maintenance/legal). Q1/26 disrupted, ROE_tr still 46%. Same swing vars as DGC."},
}

def bq(sql):
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w",suffix=".sql",delete=False,encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sql); tmp=f.name
    try: r=subprocess.run(f'type "{tmp}" | "{BQ_BIN}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000',capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=300,shell=True)
    finally:
        try: os.unlink(tmp)
        except: pass
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(r.stdout.strip()))

# ---- banks (cached real-data lens v3) ----
bank=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))
bank_set=set(bank["ticker"])
# engine classification (cash-machine + reinvestment-runway + ROIC) for compounders
try:
    eng=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv"))
    ENGINE={r["ticker"]:(r["engine"],bool(r["machine"])) for _,r in eng.iterrows()}
except Exception: ENGINE={}
# refinement 1: structural overlay for cyclicals (percentile × supply-structure × oil)
try:
    cs=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","cyclical_structural.csv"))
    CYC_STRUCT={r["ticker"]:(r["verdict"],r["structure"],r["pctile"],r["commodity"]) for _,r in cs.iterrows()}
except Exception: CYC_STRUCT={}
# refinement 2: asset-play / SOTP names (value on NAV not earnings) — exclude banks
try:
    ap=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","asset_play.csv"))
    ASSET_PLAY=set(ap[ap["verdict"]=="ASSET_PLAY"]["ticker"]) - bank_set
except Exception: ASSET_PLAY=set()

# ---- quality universe (compounder candidates) from fa_ratings_lh ----
fa=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"fa_ratings_lh.csv")).sort_values(["ticker","quarter"])
fa["is_ab"]=fa["tier"].isin(["A","B"]).astype(int); fa["qn"]=fa.groupby("ticker").cumcount()+1
fa["pct_AB"]=fa.groupby("ticker")["is_ab"].cumsum()/fa["qn"]*100
last=fa.groupby("ticker").tail(1)
quality=set(last[(last["pct_AB"]>=70)&(last["qn"]>=12)&(last["tier"].isin(["A","B"]))]["ticker"])

# universe = quality compounders ∪ commodity cyclicals ∪ banks
universe=sorted(quality | set(COMMODITY_MAP) | bank_set)
nonbank=[t for t in universe if t not in bank_set]
tks="','".join(nonbank)

# ---- pull valuation for non-bank tickers ----
val=bq(f"""WITH latest AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
hi AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi52 FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker""")
val=val.set_index("ticker")

# ---- commodity regimes ----
comm_state={}
for com in set(COMMODITY_MAP.values()):
    c=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data",f"{com}_monthly.csv")); c.columns=["m","p"]
    c["med36"]=c["p"].rolling(36,min_periods=18).median()
    c["pctile5y"]=c["p"].rolling(60,min_periods=24).apply(lambda x:(x.iloc[-1]>=x).mean())
    comm_state[com]={"good":bool(c["p"].iloc[-1]>c["med36"].iloc[-1]),"pctile":float(c["pctile5y"].iloc[-1])}

# ---- per-ticker evaluation ----
def eval_compounder(t):
    if t not in val.index: return ("COMPOUNDER","?","no data","")
    r=val.loc[t]; pe,pez,pbz,npy,roe,dd=r["PE"],r["pe_z"],r["pb_z"],r["np_yoy"],r["ROE5Y"],r["dd52"]
    peg=(pe/(npy*100)) if (pd.notna(npy) and npy>0 and pe>0) else np.nan
    hist=(pez<-1) or (pbz<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(pe<10) or (r["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(npy) and npy<-0.15)
    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    if trap and (hist or absc): v="VALUE_TRAP"; act="AVOID"
    elif n>=2: v="CHEAP_QUALITY"; act="BUY-zone"
    elif n==1: v="CHEAP_1lens"; act="WATCH"
    else: v="NOT_CHEAP"; act="WATCH" if roe>=12 else "PASS"
    detail=f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%" if pd.notna(peg) else f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%"
    return (v,act,detail,"⚠" if trap else "")

def eval_cyclical(t):
    com=COMMODITY_MAP[t]; cs=comm_state[com]
    if t not in val.index: return (f"CYCLICAL/{com}","?","no stock data","")
    r=val.loc[t]; dd=r["dd52"]; pb=r["PB"]; deep=(pd.notna(dd) and dd<-0.25)
    pct=cs["pctile"]
    # STRUCTURAL overlay (refinement 1): percentile × supply-structure × oil-anchor
    if t in CYC_STRUCT:
        sv,struct,_,_=CYC_STRUCT[t]
        if pct<0.40 and deep: v="TROUGH_BUY"; act="BUY-zone"
        elif pct<0.40: v="cmdty_CHEAP"; act="ACCUMULATE/watch"
        elif "ELEVATED-SUPPORTED" in sv: v=f"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED({struct})"; act="HOLD/selective (not avoid)"
        elif "cyclical-PEAK" in sv: v=f"cmdty_PEAK({struct})"; act="AVOID-new (reverts)"
        else: v="cmdty_MID"; act="WAIT"
        detail=f"{com} pctile{pct:.2f} [{struct}] | stock dd{dd*100:+.0f}% PB{pb}"
        return (v,act,detail,"")
    # fallback (no structural data)
    if pct<0.40 and deep: v="TROUGH_BUY"; act="BUY-zone"
    elif pct<0.40: v="cmdty_CHEAP"; act="ACCUMULATE/watch"
    elif pct>0.80: v="cmdty_EXPENSIVE"; act="AVOID-new (late cycle)"
    else: v="cmdty_MID"; act="WAIT"
    detail=f"{com} pctile{pct:.2f}({'GOOD' if cs['good'] else 'WEAK'}) | stock dd{dd*100:+.0f}% PB{pb}"
    return (v,act,detail,"")

def eval_bank(t):
    r=bank[bank["ticker"]==t].iloc[0]; g=r["gate"]
    act={"CLEAN":"BUY-eligible","WATCH":"WATCH","AVOID":"AVOID"}[g]
    # CLEAN + cheap-for-ROE (roe/pb high) → BUY
    roepb=r["ROE"]/r["PB"] if r["PB"]>0 else 0
    if g=="CLEAN" and roepb>0.12: act="BUY-zone"
    detail=f"NPL{r['NPL']*100:.2f}% cov{r['coverage']*100:.0f}% CAR{(r['CAR']*100 if pd.notna(r['CAR']) else float('nan')):.0f}% ROE{r['ROE']*100:.0f}% PB{r['PB']:.2f} (4qNPL{r['NPL_chg4q']:+.1f}pp)"
    flag="⚠" if g=="AVOID" else ""
    return (g,act,detail,flag)

rows=[]
for t in universe:
    if t in bank_set: route="BANK"; v,act,det,fl=eval_bank(t)
    elif t in COMMODITY_MAP: route="CYCLICAL"; v,act,det,fl=eval_cyclical(t)
    else: route="COMPOUNDER"; v,act,det,fl=eval_compounder(t)
    # EVENT_CHECK overlay: VALUE_TRAP is never a blind AVOID — flag for manual event review
    if v=="VALUE_TRAP": act="EVENT_CHECK (verify: structural vs one-off?)"
    # explicit event overrides (verified special situations)
    if t in EVENTS:
        v="SPECIAL_SITUATION"; act="EVENT-driven → manual"; fl="◆"; det=det+" | EVENT: "+EVENTS[t]["note"][:90]+"..."
    liq=val.loc[t,"liqB"] if t in val.index else np.nan
    eng_lbl=""
    if route!="BANK" and t in ENGINE:   # engine badge for non-banks (banks use bank lens)
        e,cm=ENGINE[t]; eng_lbl=e+("◆" if cm else "")  # ◆ = also a strict cash-machine
    if t in ASSET_PLAY:                  # refinement 2: value on NAV not earnings-multiple
        eng_lbl=(eng_lbl+" ASSET_PLAY→NAV").strip(); det=det+" | ASSET_PLAY: value on NAV/SOTP (lumpy non-op NP, asset-heavy)"
    rows.append({"ticker":t,"route":route,"verdict":v,"action":act,"engine":eng_lbl,"liqB":liq,"detail":det,"flag":fl})
out=pd.DataFrame(rows)
act_rank={"BUY-zone":0,"BUY-eligible":1,"ACCUMULATE/watch":2,"WATCH":3,"WAIT":4,"AVOID-new (late cycle)":5,"PASS":6,"AVOID":7}
out["ar"]=out["action"].map(act_rank).fillna(9)
out=out.sort_values(["route","ar","ticker"])

lines=[]; P=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
P("# Unified screener — auto-routed by company type (3 frameworks)")
P(f"universe {len(out)} | BANK {sum(out.route=='BANK')} · CYCLICAL {sum(out.route=='CYCLICAL')} · COMPOUNDER {sum(out.route=='COMPOUNDER')}")
P("commodity regimes: "+", ".join(f"{k}={v['pctile']:.2f}{'GOOD' if v['good'] else 'WEAK'}" for k,v in comm_state.items()))
P("")
for route in ["COMPOUNDER","CYCLICAL","BANK"]:
    g=out[out["route"]==route]
    P(f"## {route}  ({len(g)})")
    P(f"{'tkr':<6}{'verdict':<15}{'engine':<14}{'action':<22}{'liqB':>6}  detail")
    for _,r in g.iterrows():
        P(f"{r['ticker']:<6}{r['verdict']:<15}{r['engine']:<14}{r['action']:<22}{(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {r['detail']} {r['flag']}")
    P("")
P("## TOP actionable (action=BUY-zone, by route)")
for route in ["COMPOUNDER","CYCLICAL","BANK"]:
    g=out[(out["route"]==route)&(out["action"]=="BUY-zone")&((out["liqB"]>=2)|out["liqB"].isna())]
    P(f"  {route}: "+(", ".join(g['ticker'].tolist()) or "none"))
# GOLDEN = cheap + multibagger-engine (COMPOUNDER) + strict cash-machine(◆), liquid
gold=out[(out["verdict"]=="CHEAP_QUALITY")&(out["engine"].str.startswith("COMPOUNDER"))&(out["liqB"]>=2)]
goldcm=out[(out["verdict"]=="CHEAP_QUALITY")&(out["engine"]=="COMPOUNDER◆")&(out["liqB"]>=2)]
P("")
P("  ★ GOLDEN (cheap_quality + COMPOUNDER engine): "+(", ".join(gold['ticker'].tolist()) or "none"))
P("  ★★ + strict cash-machine◆: "+(", ".join(goldcm['ticker'].tolist()) or "none"))
P("")
P("Engine: COMPOUNDER (cash + asset-growth + ROIC≥12% = multibagger candidate) | YIELD (cash-cow no runway, e.g. QTP — dividend not multibag) | LOWROIC_GROWTH (grows but ROIC<12, value-destructive) | ◆=strict cash-machine(CFO>NP TTM). Banks excluded from engine (own lens).")
P("Routing: BANK=ICB8355(vnstock NPL-gate) | CYCLICAL=commodity map(trough+dislocation) | COMPOUNDER=else(multi-lens cheap).")
P("Caveat: snapshot ~2026-05-29; screening not advice; banks from cached vnstock v3; DGC/CSV use DAP proxy; cyclical needs commodity at trough (most now mid/high except iron-ore).")
out.drop(columns=["ar"]).to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
P("Saved data/unified_screener.{md,csv}")

content.text: The screener pulls valuation **live from BQ** each run; the upstream CSVs (bank lens, engine, commodity regimes, asset-play) are quarterly/monthly and were just rebuilt 05‑31, so they're current. The highest-value refresh is re-running `unified_screener.py` to pull fresh BQ valuation. Let me do that.

input.command: cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/bin" && export CLOUDSDK_PYTHON="/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/platform/bundledpython/python.exe" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv 'SELECT MAX(time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker' 2>&1 | tail -3
