content.text: Excellent — I have clean structured data. Now let me build a transparent composite 8L scoring model that ranks the full actionable universe route-aware, then take the prioritized top-20.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

content.text:
Both done. Here's the result.

## (a) Refresh — hoàn tất
- BQ `ticker` đã có dữ liệu đến **2026‑05‑29** (mới nhất; mốc cũ 04‑03 trong CLAUDE.md đã lạc hậu).
- Chạy lại `unified_screener.py` → pull định giá **live** từ BQ. Các lớp upstream (bank NPL‑gate vnstock, engine, commodity regime, asset‑play) vừa build 31‑05 nên còn nguyên giá trị. Kết quả ổn định so với snapshot cũ (giá đã chốt kỳ).

## (c) Xếp hạng tổng hợp 8L → TOP‑20 ưu tiên

Tôi viết `rank_8l.py` chấm điểm **route‑aware** (mỗi mã chấm bằng đúng lăng kính, đưa về thang ~0–100), trọng số mã hóa các phát hiện đã validate: rẻ (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER≫YIELD≫LOWROIC (L2/L6) + cash‑machine◆ (L3) + moat‑ROE (L4) + dislocation (mua sợ hãi); bank = NPL‑gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB‑vs‑ROE; cyclical = trough‑pctile + dislocation + PB thấp.

| # | Mã | Route | Điểm | Verdict / Engine | Đọc nhanh |
|---|-----|-------|:----:|------|-----------|
| 1 | **CTG** | Bank | 93 | CLEAN | NPL1.0% cov167% ROE22% PB1.44, NPL giảm — bank rẻ‑so‑ROE tốt nhất |
| 2 | **ACB** | Bank | 91 | CLEAN | NPL0.97% cov114% ROE17% PB1.30 |
| 3 | **HAH** | Compounder | 91 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER◆ | ★★ cash‑machine, asset+23%/ROIC21%, thanh khoản 48B (cyclical shipping) |
| 4 | **NCT** | Compounder | 90 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | ROE54%, pe_z‑2.1 rất rẻ — ⚠ liq 1B |
| 5 | **NKG** | Cyclical | 89 | TROUGH_BUY | thép, quặng pctile0.35 + dd‑31% PB0.8, liq44B |
| 6 | **MBB** | Bank | 87 | CLEAN | ROE20% NPL1.4% (validated +9x từ 2017) |
| 7 | **SMC** | Cyclical | 85 | TROUGH_BUY | thép dd‑34% PB0.8 — ⚠ liq 3B |
| 8 | **VCB** | Bank | 84 | CLEAN | tài sản pristine (NPL0.62/cov253) nhưng PB2.21 đắt |
| 9 | **NNC** | Compounder | 84 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | đá XD dd‑38%, PEG0.04 — ⚠ liq 2B |
| 10 | **TCL** | Compounder | 82 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | logistics ROE23% pe_z‑1.9 — ⚠ liq 1B |
| 11 | **TCB** | Bank | 80 | CLEAN | CAR15% cao nhất, ROE15% PB1.31 |
| 12 | **POM** | Cyclical | 79 | TROUGH_BUY | ⚠️ **PB0.0 / liq0 — nghi distressed/data lỗi, loại trên thực tế** |
| 13 | **PTB** | Compounder | 78 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER◆ | ★★ cash‑machine đá+gỗ, dd‑31% |
| 14 | **SCS** | Compounder | 78 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | ⭐ độc quyền hạ tầng HK GPM78%/ROE47%, moat STRONG |
| 15 | **DHA** | Compounder | 76 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | đá XD dd‑31% |
| 16 | **CTR** | Compounder | 73 | CHEAP_1lens+COMPOUNDER | Viettel Construction ROE30%, liq30B (chỉ rẻ 1‑lens) |
| 17 | **FPT** | Compounder | 72 | CHEAP_1lens+COMPOUNDER | dd‑36% (FTel deconsolidation = FA false‑negative, đã ghi nhận), liq681B |
| 18 | **NTP** | Compounder | 72 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | nhựa ROE20%, liq9B |
| 19 | **FMC** | Compounder | 72 | CHEAP+LOWROIC◆ | cash‑machine◆ nhưng ⚠ moat WEAK (thủy sản commodity) |
| 20 | **TLG** | Compounder | 71 | CHEAP+COMPOUNDER | Thiên Long moat BRAND; ⚠ biên gần peak |

**Phân bổ:** Bank 5 · Cyclical 3 · Compounder 12 — cân đối 3 route.

### So với danh sách hand‑picked ban đầu
Chấm điểm khách quan **đẩy lên**: NCT, TCL, POM, CTR, FPT (cao điểm theo lăng kính riêng); **đẩy ra khỏi top‑20**: VNM(67), QTP(66.5 — đúng, YIELD bị trừ runway −2), HPG(62), HSG(67), BWE(60.5), PVT(57), DGC(special‑situation, event risk không nằm trong điểm). Khác biệt hợp lý — điểm số thưởng "rẻ‑sâu × ROE × runway" nên các small‑cap chất lượng vọt lên.

### ⚠️ Lưu ý quan trọng khi đọc bảng
1. **POM (#12) đáng ngờ** — PB0.0 + liq0 → nhiều khả năng distressed/delisted hoặc dữ liệu lỗi. Thực tế nên **bỏ**, thay bằng #21 BID(71) hoặc #22 HSG(67).
2. **Thanh khoản**: NCT/TCL/NNC/DHA chỉ 1–2B → khó giải ngân lớn dù điểm cao. Nhóm deploy được: CTG/ACB/MBB/VCB/TCB (bank), HAH/NKG/FPT/HPG.
3. **State NEUTRAL** — điểm số là công cụ **ưu tiên**, không phải tín hiệu mua; edge FA/quality mạnh nhất ở CRISIS/BEAR (fa‑horizon study).
4. **SCS (#14)** có profile 8L tốt nhất về chất (moat STRONG + compounder + durable) nhưng điểm thấp hơn bank/thép vì không có dislocation sâu — điểm thưởng "mua đáy", còn SCS đang ở giá hợp lý.

Output đã lưu: `data/rank_8l.{md,csv}`, `data/unified_screener.{md,csv}`.

Bạn muốn tôi (i) **loại POM + chốt top‑20 sạch** để deploy, (ii) tách **2 rổ** (high‑liquidity deployable vs. small‑cap quality‑watch), hay (iii) chạy `dna_card.py` xuất hồ sơ 8 chiều cho nhóm top?

content.text:
Số liệu **chính xác, không phải lỗi dữ liệu**. POM thực sự:
- **8 quý lỗ liên tiếp** (2024Q2 → 2026Q1, NP âm mọi quý)
- Q1/2026: doanh thu 466bn, **‑54.7% YoY**; lỗ ‑179bn
- **PB = 0.0** ở các quý gần đây → vốn chủ sở hữu đã bị bào mòn/âm, không phải "rẻ" mà là **mất khả năng định giá theo sổ sách** (dấu hiệu insolvency)
- FSCORE rớt 8→3‑4

## Lý do hệ thống vẫn gợi ý POM — đây là lỗ hổng framework thật

Lăng kính **CYCLICAL** (`eval_cyclical`) chỉ kiểm tra **3 thứ**: (1) commodity ở đáy (quặng sắt pctile 0.35), (2) cổ phiếu dislocated (dd‑39% sâu), (3) PB. Nó **KHÔNG có cổng kiểm tra khả năng sống sót/solvency** — trong khi lăng kính COMPOUNDER lại CÓ value‑trap guard (`np_yoy < -0.15`). Logic contrarian "mua đáy chu kỳ" ngầm giả định **doanh nghiệp sống sót đến khi chu kỳ đảo chiều** — POM vi phạm chính giả định đó (falling knife / value trap kinh điển).

Tệ hơn, **chấm điểm của tôi xử lý PB=0.0 thành "rẻ nhất" → +10 điểm**, trong khi PB=0 nghĩa là vốn chủ âm/hỏng = nguy hiểm tối đa. Hai lỗi cộng dồn đẩy POM lên #12.

Trước khi vá, tôi phải kiểm tra 3 mã thép TROUGH_BUY/cheap khác (NKG, SMC, HSG, HPG) có cùng bệnh không:

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/bin" && export CLOUDSDK_PYTHON="/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/platform/bundledpython/python.exe" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv "
WITH q AS (
  SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.quarter, f.NP_P0, f.Revenue_YoY_P0, f.PB, f.FSCORE,
    f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f
  WHERE f.ticker IN ('NKG','SMC','HSG','HPG','POM')
)
SELECT q.ticker,
  SUM(CASE WHEN q.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS neg_q_last8,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN q.rn=1 THEN q.NP_P0/1e9 END),1) AS NP_latest_bn,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN q.rn=1 THEN q.PB END),2) AS PB_latest,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN q.rn=1 THEN q.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END),2) AS DebtEq,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN q.rn=1 THEN q.IntCov_P0 END),2) AS IntCov,
  MAX(CASE WHEN q.rn=1 THEN q.FSCORE END) AS FSCORE
FROM q WHERE q.rn<=8 GROUP BY q.ticker ORDER BY neg_q_last8 DESC"
input.description: Check solvency of steel TROUGH_BUY candidates

content.text:
Số liệu xác nhận POM là trường hợp **terminal distress duy nhất**, các mã thép kia an toàn:

| Mã | Lỗ/8 quý | NP gần nhất | PB | Nợ/VCSH | IntCov | Đọc |
|----|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|------|
| **POM** | **8/8** | ‑179bn | **0.0** | **‑7.61** (vốn chủ **ÂM**) | null (không trả nổi lãi) | ☠ Mất khả năng thanh toán |
| SMC | 5/8 | **+18.6bn** (đã có lãi lại) | 0.91 | 1.73 | 1.85 | Lỗ‑nhưng‑hồi phục + còn solvent ✓ |
| NKG | 1/8 | +22.3bn | 0.84 | 0.91 | 1.53 | Khỏe ✓ |
| HSG | 1/8 | +118.7bn | 0.88 | 0.72 | 2.44 | Khỏe ✓ |
| HPG | 0/8 | +8994bn | 1.35 | 0.65 | 9.07 | Rất khỏe ✓ |

POM có **vốn chủ sở hữu âm** (Nợ/VCSH ‑7.61) → đó là lý do PB=0. Logic contrarian "mua đáy chu kỳ" đúng cho NKG/SMC/HSG/HPG (lỗ chu kỳ nhưng sống sót), nhưng POM sẽ chết trước khi chu kỳ đảo chiều.

Tôi sẽ vá lỗ hổng này — thêm **cổng SOLVENCY/SURVIVAL** vào lăng kính cyclical (và toàn bộ non‑bank), đúng theo meta‑nguyên tắc "chất lượng/an toàn = GATE". Vá cả `unified_screener.py` lẫn `rank_8l.py`.

input.new_string:
# ---- pull valuation for non-bank tickers (+ SOLVENCY fields for survival gate) ----
val=bq(f"""WITH latest AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.time) mx FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.PB IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.ticker),
hi AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi52 FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker),
finq AS (SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.NP_P0, f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0, f.FSCORE,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f WHERE f.ticker IN ('{tks}')),
fin AS (SELECT finq.ticker,
  SUM(CASE WHEN finq.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) neg_q8,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END) DebtEq,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.IntCov_P0 END) IntCov,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.FSCORE END) FSCORE
  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB,
 fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker""")
val=val.set_index("ticker")

# ---- SOLVENCY / SURVIVAL gate (missing-gate fix, 2026-05-31) ----
# Contrarian "buy the cyclical trough" ASSUMES the company survives to the upturn.
# A name with negative/destroyed equity or sustained losses it can't service is a
# falling-knife (e.g. POM: 8/8 loss quarters, equity NEGATIVE -> PB=0, IntCov null).
# This gate applies to ALL non-bank routes (banks have their own NPL/CAR gate).
def distressed(t):
    if t not in val.index: return (False,"")
    r=val.loc[t]; pb=r["PB"]; deq=r.get("DebtEq"); ic=r.get("IntCov"); nq=r.get("neg_q8")
    if pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0: return (True,"PB<=0 (equity destroyed/negative)")
    if pd.notna(deq) and deq<0: return (True,f"negative equity (Debt/Eq {deq})")
    if pd.notna(nq) and nq>=6 and (pd.isna(ic) or ic<1):
        return (True,f"{int(nq)}/8 loss quarters + cannot service interest (IntCov {ic})")
    return (False,"")

-hi AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi52 FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker)
+hi AS (SELECT t.ticker,MAX(t.Close) hi52 FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('{tks}') AND t.time>=DATE_SUB(DATE '2026-05-29',INTERVAL 365 DAY) GROUP BY t.ticker),
+finq AS (SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.NP_P0, f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0, f.FSCORE,
+  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
+  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f WHERE f.ticker IN ('{tks}')),
+  SUM(CASE WHEN finq.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) neg_q8,
+  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END) DebtEq,
+  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.IntCov_P0 END) IntCov,
+  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.FSCORE END) FSCORE
+  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
-FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker""")
+ fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE
+FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
+# Contrarian "buy the cyclical trough" ASSUMES the company survives to the upturn.
+# A name with negative/destroyed equity or sustained losses it can't service is a
+# falling-knife (e.g. POM: 8/8 loss quarters, equity NEGATIVE -> PB=0, IntCov null).
+# This gate applies to ALL non-bank routes (banks have their own NPL/CAR gate).
+    if t not in val.index: return (False,"")
+    if pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0: return (True,"PB<=0 (equity destroyed/negative)")
+    if pd.notna(deq) and deq<0: return (True,f"negative equity (Debt/Eq {deq})")
+    if pd.notna(nq) and nq>=6 and (pd.isna(ic) or ic<1):
+        return (True,f"{int(nq)}/8 loss quarters + cannot service interest (IntCov {ic})")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

content.text:
✅ **Đã vá xong.** POM giờ bị cổng solvency chặn:

```
POM   DISTRESSED   AVOID (insolvency/falling-knife)   ☠ SOLVENCY: PB<=0 (equity destroyed/negative)
```

Cổng mới chỉ "bắt" đúng POM (NKG/SMC/HSG/HPG đều qua) — phẫu thuật chính xác, không loại nhầm mã lỗ‑chu‑kỳ‑lành‑mạnh nào.

## Nguyên nhân gốc (tóm tắt)
Không phải lỗi dữ liệu — số POM hoàn toàn đúng. Đây là **lỗ hổng thiết kế**: lăng kính CYCLICAL chỉ chấm "commodity ở đáy × cổ phiếu rớt sâu × PB" mà **thiếu cổng kiểm tra sống sót**. Logic "mua đáy chu kỳ" ngầm giả định DN sống đến lúc chu kỳ đảo chiều — POM vốn chủ âm (Nợ/VCSH ‑7.61), 8 quý lỗ, không trả nổi lãi → sẽ chết trước. Đúng meta‑nguyên tắc 8L: *an toàn = GATE*, mà cyclical lens lại sót gate này (compounder lens thì có value‑trap guard).

## Cách vá
1. **`unified_screener.py`** — thêm hàm `distressed()` chạy cho **mọi mã non‑bank** (bank đã có NPL‑gate riêng). Cờ DISTRESSED khi: PB≤0 / vốn chủ âm / ≥6 quý lỗ + không trả nổi lãi (IntCov<1). Cổng này có **quyền ưu tiên** trên mọi verdict "rẻ/đáy" (trừ special‑situation đã verify).
2. **`rank_8l.py`** — loại mọi mã action=AVOID/DISTRESSED; sửa lỗi chấm PB≤0 thành **‑10** (nguy hiểm) thay vì +10 (rẻ).

## TOP‑20 ưu tiên 8L (sau khi vá — POM out, BID vào #19)

| # | Mã | Route | Điểm | # | Mã | Route | Điểm |
|---|-----|-------|:--:|---|-----|-------|:--:|
| 1 | **CTG** | Bank | 93 | 11 | **TCB** | Bank | 80 |
| 2 | **ACB** | Bank | 91 | 12 | **SCS** | Compounder | 77.5 |
| 3 | **HAH** | Compounder | 91 | 13 | **PTB** | Compounder | 77.5 |
| 4 | **NCT** | Compounder | 90 | 14 | **DHA** | Compounder | 76 |
| 5 | **NKG** | Cyclical | 89 | 15 | **CTR** | Compounder | 73 |
| 6 | **MBB** | Bank | 87 | 16 | **FPT** | Compounder | 72.5 |
| 7 | **SMC** | Cyclical | 85 | 17 | **NTP** | Compounder | 72 |
| 8 | **VCB** | Bank | 84 | 18 | **FMC** | Compounder | 71.5 |
| 9 | **NNC** | Compounder | 83.5 | 19 | **BID** | Bank | 71 |
| 10 | **TCL** | Compounder | 81.5 | 20 | **TLG** | Compounder | 71 |

**Phân bổ:** Bank 6 · Cyclical 2 · Compounder 12. Cổng đã loại tổng 9 mã (bank AVOID 6, urea‑peak DCM/DPM, insolvency POM).

Cảm ơn bạn đã bắt lỗi này — nó là một gate thiếu thật sự, giờ bảo vệ cả hệ thống khỏi falling‑knife. Tôi sẽ lưu lại bài học này vào memory.

input.new_string:
## SOLVENCY/SURVIVAL gate — missing-gate fix (2026-05-31, user caught POM)
Cyclical lens flagged **POM as TROUGH_BUY** (iron-ore pctile0.35 + stock dd-39% + "PB0.0=cheap"). User (industry insider): POM = near-bankruptcy. **Verified BQ: 8/8 quarters NP<0, Q1/26 Rev -54.7% YoY, equity NEGATIVE (STLTDebt_Eq -7.61 → that's why PB=0, not "cheap"), IntCov null (can't service interest), FSCORE 3-4.** Root cause = **design gap, NOT data error**: contrarian "buy the cyclical trough" ASSUMES the company survives to the upturn; the CYCLICAL lens checked only commodity-pctile × stock-dislocation × PB with NO solvency/survival gate (the COMPOUNDER lens HAD a value-trap guard `np_yoy<-0.15`, cyclical didn't). Classic falling-knife. Also `rank_8l.py` scored PB≤0 as +10 ("cheapest") instead of distress. **FIX**: added `distressed()` gate to unified_screener applying to ALL non-bank routes (banks have own NPL/CAR gate) — flags DISTRESSED/AVOID when PB≤0 OR negative equity (Debt/Eq<0) OR (≥6 loss quarters AND IntCov<1/null); has precedence over any cheap/trough verdict except verified special-situations. Surgical: caught ONLY POM; NKG(1/8 loss, NP+22, IntCov1.53)/SMC(5/8 but NP+18.6 recovering, IntCov1.85)/HSG/HPG all pass = solvent cyclical-trough = legit contrarian. rank_8l now drops AVOID/DISTRESSED + scores PB≤0 as -10. **Meta-lesson: "buy the trough/fear" ALWAYS needs a survival gate — distinguish cyclical-loss-but-solvent (buy) from insolvent-dying (falling-knife). Distressed cyclicals can have the most attractive-looking pctile×dislocation×PB exactly because the market is pricing bankruptcy.** Files: unified_screener.py (distressed()), rank_8l.py. New TOP-20 after fix: BID replaces POM.

## SOLVENCY/SURVIVAL gate — missing-gate fix (2026-05-31, user caught POM)
Cyclical lens flagged **POM as TROUGH_BUY** (iron-ore pctile0.35 + stock dd-39% + "PB0.0=cheap"). User (industry insider): POM = near-bankruptcy. **Verified BQ: 8/8 quarters NP<0, Q1/26 Rev -54.7% YoY, equity NEGATIVE (STLTDebt_Eq -7.61 → that's why PB=0, not "cheap"), IntCov null (can't service interest), FSCORE 3-4.** Root cause = **design gap, NOT data error**: contrarian "buy the cyclical trough" ASSUMES the company survives to the upturn; the CYCLICAL lens checked only commodity-pctile × stock-dislocation × PB with NO solvency/survival gate (the COMPOUNDER lens HAD a value-trap guard `np_yoy<-0.15`, cyclical didn't). Classic falling-knife. Also `rank_8l.py` scored PB≤0 as +10 ("cheapest") instead of distress. **FIX**: added `distressed()` gate to unified_screener applying to ALL non-bank routes (banks have own NPL/CAR gate) — flags DISTRESSED/AVOID when PB≤0 OR negative equity (Debt/Eq<0) OR (≥6 loss quarters AND IntCov<1/null); has precedence over any cheap/trough verdict except verified special-situations. Surgical: caught ONLY POM; NKG(1/8 loss, NP+22, IntCov1.53)/SMC(5/8 but NP+18.6 recovering, IntCov1.85)/HSG/HPG all pass = solvent cyclical-trough = legit contrarian. rank_8l now drops AVOID/DISTRESSED + scores PB≤0 as -10. **Meta-lesson: "buy the trough/fear" ALWAYS needs a survival gate — distinguish cyclical-loss-but-solvent (buy) from insolvent-dying (falling-knife). Distressed cyclicals can have the most attractive-looking pctile×dislocation×PB exactly because the market is pricing bankruptcy.** Files: unified_screener.py (distressed()), rank_8l.py. New TOP-20 after fix: BID replaces POM.

## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)

lines: **(1) `cyclical_structural.py`** — STRUCTURE dict per commodity (rubber=DEFICIT/oil-anchored, iron_ore=RESPONSIVE, urea=AMPLE-soft, dap=BALANCED) + Brent cost-anchor (now $104, pctile 0.91 — HIGH). Verdict = pctile × structure × oil. **Rubber 0.95 reclassified AVOID-new → ELEVATED-SUPPORTED** (6yr deficit + oil floor → sustains); **urea 0.90 stays cyclical-PEAK AVOID** (ample/soft, no support) — overlay distinguishes structurally-elevated (hold) from cyclically-high (revert). Brent $104 = 2-edged: lifts rubber/synthetic floor (producers win) but squeezes plastic-consumer margins (BMP margin-cycle + oil-up = compression — two detectors warn together). **(2) `asset_play_detector.py`** — flags ASSET_PLAY (NP↔Rev corr low + NP CV high + asset-turn<0.5 → value on NAV/SOTP). Validated PHR=ASSET_PLAY (corr+0.46/turn0.30, land-comp NP), DRI=operating (corr+0.80, NP tracks rubber); also flags DPR + IP/RE cluster (KBC/BCM/NLG/IDC/NTC/DXG); banks excluded (route precedence). **Both WIRED into unified_screener**: cyclical eval uses CYC_STRUCT verdict; ASSET_PLAY→NAV badge on non-bank rows. Now DRI=ELEVATED-SUPPORTED(operating), PHR=ELEVATED-SUPPORTED+ASSET_PLAY→NAV. Files: cyclical_structural.py, asset_play_detector.py, data/{cyclical_structural,asset_play,brent_monthly}.csv. **PROPAGATED into dna_card.py too** (reads cyclical_structural.csv + asset_play.csv): cards now show structural verdict (e.g. DPR "rubber 0.95 [DEFICIT]→ELEVATED-SUPPORTED", DCM "urea [AMPLE/soft]→cyclical-PEAK") + ⚑ASSET_PLAY→NAV line (DPR/PHR land-banks). unified_screener + dna_card fully consistent (both read the 2 CSVs).
+## SOLVENCY/SURVIVAL gate — missing-gate fix (2026-05-31, user caught POM)

+Cyclical lens flagged **POM as TROUGH_BUY** (iron-ore pctile0.35 + stock dd-39% + "PB0.0=cheap"). User (industry insider): POM = near-bankruptcy. **Verified BQ: 8/8 quarters NP<0, Q1/26 Rev -54.7% YoY, equity NEGATIVE (STLTDebt_Eq -7.61 → that's why PB=0, not "cheap"), IntCov null (can't service interest), FSCORE 3-4.** Root cause = **design gap, NOT data error**: contrarian "buy the cyclical trough" ASSUMES the company survives to the upturn; the CYCLICAL lens checked only commodity-pctile × stock-dislocation × PB with NO solvency/survival gate (the COMPOUNDER lens HAD a value-trap guard `np_yoy<-0.15`, cyclical didn't). Classic falling-knife. Also `rank_8l.py` scored PB≤0 as +10 ("cheapest") instead of distress. **FIX**: added `distressed()` gate to unified_screener applying to ALL non-bank routes (banks have own NPL/CAR gate) — flags DISTRESSED/AVOID when PB≤0 OR negative equity (Debt/Eq<0) OR (≥6 loss quarters AND IntCov<1/null); has precedence over any cheap/trough verdict except verified special-situations. Surgical: caught ONLY POM; NKG(1/8 loss, NP+22, IntCov1.53)/SMC(5/8 but NP+18.6 recovering, IntCov1.85)/HSG/HPG all pass = solvent cyclical-trough = legit contrarian. rank_8l now drops AVOID/DISTRESSED + scores PB≤0 as -10. **Meta-lesson: "buy the trough/fear" ALWAYS needs a survival gate — distinguish cyclical-loss-but-solvent (buy) from insolvent-dying (falling-knife). Distressed cyclicals can have the most attractive-looking pctile×dislocation×PB exactly because the market is pricing bankruptcy.** Files: unified_screener.py (distressed()), rank_8l.py. New TOP-20 after fix: BID replaces POM.

Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). Next: ingest historical series for steel HRC (SunSirs China), phosphorus (SunSirs), urea (TradingEconomics/IndexMundi) and repeat the event study. Files: `rubber_cyclical.py`, `data/rubber_monthly.csv`, `data/rubber_cyclical_obs.csv`.

content.text:
Không phải lỗi dữ liệu — số POM hoàn toàn chính xác. Tôi đã kiểm chứng trên BigQuery và **đã vá lỗ hổng** ở câu trả lời trước. Tóm tắt thẳng vào câu hỏi của bạn:

## POM có lỗi dữ liệu không? → KHÔNG
Số liệu BQ khớp đúng những gì bạn nói:
- **8 quý lỗ liên tiếp** (2024Q2 → 2026Q1)
- Q1/2026 doanh thu **‑54.7% YoY**, lỗ ‑179bn
- **Vốn chủ sở hữu ÂM** (Nợ/VCSH = ‑7.61) → đây chính là lý do **PB hiển thị 0.0**, không phải "rẻ" mà là sổ sách đã vỡ
- IntCov = null (không trả nổi lãi vay), FSCORE rớt còn 3‑4

## Tại sao hệ thống vẫn gợi ý POM? → Lỗ hổng thiết kế (đã vá)
Lăng kính **CYCLICAL** chấm "mua đáy chu kỳ" chỉ dựa trên 3 yếu tố: quặng sắt ở đáy (pctile 0.35) × cổ phiếu rớt sâu (dd‑39%) × PB. Nó **thiếu cổng kiểm tra khả năng sống sót**. Logic contrarian này ngầm giả định doanh nghiệp sống đến lúc chu kỳ đảo chiều — POM thì sẽ phá sản trước. Nghịch lý: **cổ phiếu sắp chết lại có "điểm đáy × rớt sâu × PB thấp" đẹp nhất, chính vì thị trường đang định giá phá sản.**

Lỗi cộng thêm: phần chấm điểm xử lý PB=0.0 thành "rẻ nhất" (+10) thay vì nguy hiểm.

## Đã sửa
Thêm cổng **SOLVENCY/SURVIVAL** vào `unified_screener.py` (áp cho mọi mã non‑bank), chặn khi: PB≤0 / vốn chủ âm / ≥6 quý lỗ + không trả nổi lãi. Kết quả:

```
POM   DISTRESSED   AVOID (insolvency/falling-knife)   ☠ vốn chủ âm
```

Cổng chỉ bắt đúng POM — NKG/SMC/HSG/HPG (lỗ chu kỳ nhưng còn solvent) vẫn qua bình thường. Top‑20 mới: **BID thay POM**. Bài học "mua đáy/mua sợ hãi luôn cần cổng sống sót" đã được lưu vào memory để không tái phạm.

content.text:
The margin-cycle lens (L5) reveals the real story:

| | GPM hiện tại | Pctile | Vị trí chu kỳ biên | L5 verdict |
|---|:---:|:---:|---|---|
| **BMP** | 47.2% | **0.98** (gần đỉnh dải 4‑48%) | **MARGIN_PEAK** | CAUTION (biên đỉnh→nguy cơ nén) |
| **NTP** | 31.3% | **0.50** (giữa dải 19‑38%) | **MID** | neutral |

Let me check which BUY-zone names in our top-20 are also at margin peak — this is the systemic question.

Confirmed — this exposes a **real gap in our own top‑20**: TLG (rank 20, "BUY‑zone") is *also* at MARGIN_PEAK (GPM 50%, pctile 0.98) but escaped the warning. Let me answer your question precisely, then wire the L5 margin-cycle lens into the screener.

## Tại sao NTP vào, BMP ra — lý do thật

**Khác biệt cơ học duy nhất = bài test PEG:**
- NTP: PEG **0.49** (đạt) + PE9.9<10 (đạt) = 2 lăng kính rẻ → CHEAP_QUALITY
- BMP: PEG **1.53** (trượt) + PE9.0<10 (đạt) = 1 lăng kính → CHEAP_1lens (WATCH)

PEG = PE ÷ %tăng‑trưởng, mà tăng trưởng tính theo **YoY 1 quý**:
- NTP Q1/26: +20% (PEG 9.9/20 = 0.49)
- BMP Q1/26: **chỉ +6%** (PEG 9.0/6 = 1.51)

**Nhưng "+6%" của BMP là hiệu ứng nền (base effect):** quý cùng kỳ Q1/25 của BMP đã tăng vọt +51% — nền quá cao nên năm nay trông phẳng. Xét tuyệt đối BMP **lãi nhiều hơn** (304 tỷ vs NTP 254 tỷ) và ROE cao hơn (32% vs 21%). → **Lăng kính định giá đã "xử ép" BMP bằng một chỉ số PEG nhiễu 1‑quý** — đây là điểm yếu thật của lens (giống tinh thần lỗi POM nhưng nhẹ hơn).

**Tuy nhiên kết luận "NTP đáng mua hơn BMP lúc này" vẫn ĐÚNG — vì một lý do sâu hơn mà lens headline không dùng:**
- **BMP đang ở ĐỈNH BIÊN** (GPM 47%, pctile 0.98, sát đỉnh dải 4–48%). Lợi nhuận & ROE 32% bị thổi phồng bởi giá nhựa PVC (input) đang rẻ. **PE thấp trên EPS đỉnh chu kỳ = bẫy chu kỳ.** Đúng bài học BMP: thời điểm mua là đáy biên 2021–22 (GPM bị nén còn 4.5% → sau đó ×3), không phải lúc biên đỉnh.
- **NTP ở giữa chu kỳ** (GPM 31%, pctile 0.50) → lợi nhuận đã chuẩn hóa, còn dư địa.

→ Hai lăng kính tình cờ đồng thuận (NTP > BMP bây giờ), nhưng lens định giá đạt được bằng **may mắn** (PEG base‑effect), còn lens margin‑cycle (L5) đạt bằng **lý lẽ đúng**. Và L5 hiện **chưa được nối vào verdict của screener** → BMP thoát "BUY‑zone giả" nhờ ăn may PEG, còn TLG (cùng đỉnh biên) thì lọt thẳng vào top‑20. Tôi sẽ vá.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()
try:
    MC=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","margin_cycle_detector.csv")).set_index("ticker")["cycle"].to_dict()
except Exception: MC={}

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)

content.text:
✅ **Đã vá — và nó bắt được lỗi ngay trong top‑20 của chính chúng ta.**

Sau khi nối lăng kính **L5 margin‑cycle** vào screener:
- **BMP** → gắn cờ `⚠ L5 MARGIN_PEAK (GPM pctile 0.98): PE thấp trên EPS đỉnh chu kỳ = nguy cơ nén biên`
- **TLG** (đang ở **rank 20 BUY‑zone** trong top‑20 cũ!) → bị hạ xuống `WATCH (margin‑peak)` và **rớt khỏi top‑20** (71 → 59 điểm). Đây chính là false‑positive mà bạn giúp lộ ra: TLG cùng cảnh đỉnh biên như BMP (GPM 50%, pctile 0.98) nhưng trước đó lọt thẳng vào danh sách.
- **SAB** cũng bị gắn cờ margin‑peak.

## TOP‑20 sau khi vá (TLG out, HSG vào #20)

| # | Mã | Route | Điểm | # | Mã | Route | Điểm |
|---|-----|-------|:--:|---|-----|-------|:--:|
| 1 | CTG | Bank | 93 | 11 | TCB | Bank | 80 |
| 2 | ACB | Bank | 91 | 12 | SCS | Compounder | 77.5 |
| 3 | HAH | Compounder | 91 | 13 | PTB | Compounder | 77.5 |
| 4 | NCT | Compounder | 90 | 14 | DHA | Compounder | 76 |
| 5 | NKG | Cyclical | 89 | 15 | CTR | Compounder | 73 |
| 6 | MBB | Bank | 87 | 16 | FPT | Compounder | 72.5 |
| 7 | SMC | Cyclical | 85 | 17 | **NTP** | Compounder | 72 |
| 8 | VCB | Bank | 84 | 18 | FMC | Compounder | 71.5 |
| 9 | NNC | Compounder | 83.5 | 19 | BID | Bank | 71 |
| 10 | TCL | Compounder | 81.5 | 20 | **HSG** | Cyclical | 67 |

## Tóm tắt câu trả lời
- **NTP vào, BMP/TLG ra là ĐÚNG** — nhưng ban đầu hệ thống "đúng vì may" (NTP qua bài PEG nhờ tăng trưởng quý cao, BMP trượt PEG do hiệu ứng nền Q1/25 quá cao). Lý do **đúng về bản chất**: NTP ở giữa chu kỳ biên (GPM 31%, còn dư địa), BMP/TLG ở **đỉnh biên** (GPM 47–50%, pctile 0.98) — PE thấp trên lợi nhuận đỉnh chu kỳ là bẫy. Mua BMP/TLG là mua lúc biên đỉnh; lẽ ra mua khi biên bị nén (như BMP đáy 2021–22 → sau ×3).
- L5 trước đây chạy như detector rời, giờ đã **nối vào verdict screener + điểm số** (peak: −12đ + hạ BUY→WATCH; bottom: +8đ).

Tôi cập nhật memory ghi nhận lần tích hợp L5 này.

input.new_string:
## L5 margin-cycle WIRED into screener (2026-05-31, user caught BMP vs NTP)
User: BMP (South) & NTP (North) = same plastic-pipe duopoly, similar regional-monopoly moat — why NTP in top-20 BUY-zone but BMP only WATCH? **Root: the ONLY mechanical discriminator was PEG (NTP 0.49 pass vs BMP 1.53 fail), and PEG used SINGLE-QUARTER YoY growth (NTP +20% vs BMP +6%). BMP's +6% is a BASE EFFECT** (its year-ago Q1/25 was +51%, high base) — in absolute terms BMP earns MORE (304 vs 254bn) + higher ROE (32 vs 21%). So the valuation lens was UNFAIR to BMP via noisy 1Q PEG (lens weakness, same spirit as POM but mild). **BUT the sound reason still favors NTP now: BMP is at MARGIN PEAK** (GPM 47%, pctile 0.98, top of 4-48% range → EPS cyclically inflated by cheap PVC input; low PE on peak EPS = cyclical trap; right buy was 2021-22 PVC-crash trough → BMP then +3x), **NTP is MID-cycle** (GPM 31%, pctile 0.50, normalized + runway). Two lenses agree (NTP>BMP) but valuation got there by luck, margin-cycle (L5) by sound logic. **GAP exposed: L5 margin_cycle_detector ran STANDALONE, not wired into unified_screener verdict — so TLG (GPM 50%/pctile 0.98 = ALSO margin-peak) had sailed into the top-20 as clean BUY-zone.** FIX: wired L5 into unified_screener (MARGIN_PEAK → append ⚠ + downgrade BUY-zone→"WATCH (margin-peak)"; MARGIN_BOTTOM → ★ note "buy if brand") + rank_8l (peak −12, bottom +8). Result: BMP/SAB/TLG flagged MARGIN_PEAK; **TLG demoted out of top-20** (71→59), HSG enters #20. MARGIN_BOTTOM names (revert-up candidates if brand): SVI, VCS. **Meta: low PE alone is ambiguous for commodity-consumers — must read it against margin-cycle position; and single-quarter PEG is base-effect noisy (TODO: switch PEG to TTM growth via ticker_financial NP_P0..P7).** Files: unified_screener.py (MARGIN overlay), rank_8l.py (L5_margin), data/margin_cycle_detector.csv.

lines: ## SOLVENCY/SURVIVAL gate — missing-gate fix (2026-05-31, user caught POM)

Cyclical lens flagged **POM as TROUGH_BUY** (iron-ore pctile0.35 + stock dd-39% + "PB0.0=cheap"). User (industry insider): POM = near-bankruptcy. **Verified BQ: 8/8 quarters NP<0, Q1/26 Rev -54.7% YoY, equity NEGATIVE (STLTDebt_Eq -7.61 → that's why PB=0, not "cheap"), IntCov null (can't service interest), FSCORE 3-4.** Root cause = **design gap, NOT data error**: contrarian "buy the cyclical trough" ASSUMES the company survives to the upturn; the CYCLICAL lens checked only commodity-pctile × stock-dislocation × PB with NO solvency/survival gate (the COMPOUNDER lens HAD a value-trap guard `np_yoy<-0.15`, cyclical didn't). Classic falling-knife. Also `rank_8l.py` scored PB≤0 as +10 ("cheapest") instead of distress. **FIX**: added `distressed()` gate to unified_screener applying to ALL non-bank routes (banks have own NPL/CAR gate) — flags DISTRESSED/AVOID when PB≤0 OR negative equity (Debt/Eq<0) OR (≥6 loss quarters AND IntCov<1/null); has precedence over any cheap/trough verdict except verified special-situations. Surgical: caught ONLY POM; NKG(1/8 loss, NP+22, IntCov1.53)/SMC(5/8 but NP+18.6 recovering, IntCov1.85)/HSG/HPG all pass = solvent cyclical-trough = legit contrarian. rank_8l now drops AVOID/DISTRESSED + scores PB≤0 as -10. **Meta-lesson: "buy the trough/fear" ALWAYS needs a survival gate — distinguish cyclical-loss-but-solvent (buy) from insolvent-dying (falling-knife). Distressed cyclicals can have the most attractive-looking pctile×dislocation×PB exactly because the market is pricing bankruptcy.** Files: unified_screener.py (distressed()), rank_8l.py. New TOP-20 after fix: BID replaces POM.
+## L5 margin-cycle WIRED into screener (2026-05-31, user caught BMP vs NTP)

+User: BMP (South) & NTP (North) = same plastic-pipe duopoly, similar regional-monopoly moat — why NTP in top-20 BUY-zone but BMP only WATCH? **Root: the ONLY mechanical discriminator was PEG (NTP 0.49 pass vs BMP 1.53 fail), and PEG used SINGLE-QUARTER YoY growth (NTP +20% vs BMP +6%). BMP's +6% is a BASE EFFECT** (its year-ago Q1/25 was +51%, high base) — in absolute terms BMP earns MORE (304 vs 254bn) + higher ROE (32 vs 21%). So the valuation lens was UNFAIR to BMP via noisy 1Q PEG (lens weakness, same spirit as POM but mild). **BUT the sound reason still favors NTP now: BMP is at MARGIN PEAK** (GPM 47%, pctile 0.98, top of 4-48% range → EPS cyclically inflated by cheap PVC input; low PE on peak EPS = cyclical trap; right buy was 2021-22 PVC-crash trough → BMP then +3x), **NTP is MID-cycle** (GPM 31%, pctile 0.50, normalized + runway). Two lenses agree (NTP>BMP) but valuation got there by luck, margin-cycle (L5) by sound logic. **GAP exposed: L5 margin_cycle_detector ran STANDALONE, not wired into unified_screener verdict — so TLG (GPM 50%/pctile 0.98 = ALSO margin-peak) had sailed into the top-20 as clean BUY-zone.** FIX: wired L5 into unified_screener (MARGIN_PEAK → append ⚠ + downgrade BUY-zone→"WATCH (margin-peak)"; MARGIN_BOTTOM → ★ note "buy if brand") + rank_8l (peak −12, bottom +8). Result: BMP/SAB/TLG flagged MARGIN_PEAK; **TLG demoted out of top-20** (71→59), HSG enters #20. MARGIN_BOTTOM names (revert-up candidates if brand): SVI, VCS. **Meta: low PE alone is ambiguous for commodity-consumers — must read it against margin-cycle position; and single-quarter PEG is base-effect noisy (TODO: switch PEG to TTM growth via ticker_financial NP_P0..P7).** Files: unified_screener.py (MARGIN overlay), rank_8l.py (L5_margin), data/margin_cycle_detector.csv.

Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). Next: ingest historical series for steel HRC (SunSirs China), phosphorus (SunSirs), urea (TradingEconomics/IndexMundi) and repeat the event study. Files: `rubber_cyclical.py`, `data/rubber_monthly.csv`, `data/rubber_cyclical_obs.csv`.

content.text:
Đã lưu memory. 

Một điểm tôi muốn nói thẳng để bạn quyết: gốc rễ của vụ BMP/NTP có **2 lớp** — (1) BMP đỉnh biên (đã vá bằng L5), và (2) **PEG dùng tăng trưởng 1 quý nên dính hiệu ứng nền**. Tôi mới vá lớp (1). Lớp (2) nên sửa bằng cách đổi PEG sang **tăng trưởng TTM** (4 quý gộp, dùng `NP_P0..P7` trong `ticker_financial`) để khỏi bị nhiễu nền — đây là cải tiến giúp toàn bộ lăng kính L1 công bằng hơn cho mọi mã, không riêng BMP.

Bạn muốn tôi làm tiếp lớp (2) — chuyển PEG sang TTM growth — không? Nếu có, tôi sẽ chạy lại và đối chiếu top‑20 trước/sau để xem mã nào đổi thứ hạng.

lastPrompt: bạn xem lại tình huống NTP với BMP. Hai cổ phiếu cùng một ngành, mỗi công ty chiếm cứ thị phần ở 1 vùng, BMP thì miền nam, NTP thì miền Bắc. Sao NTP lại nằm trong gợi ý, khi BMP lại bị loại

content: bạn thử lớp (2) lại, xem thực sự có hiệu quả không. SELECT f.quarter,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN f.ticker='BMP' THEN f.GPM_P0 END),1) BMP_GPM,
  ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN f.ticker='NTP' THEN f.GPM_P0 END),1) NTP_GPM
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f
WHERE f.ticker IN ('BMP','NTP') AND f.time>='2018-01-01'
GROUP BY f.quarter ORDER BY f.quarter"

cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && export CLOUDSDK_PYTHON="/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/platform/bundledpython/python.exe" && python -c "
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
d=pd.read_csv('data/bmp_ntp_gpm.csv').dropna()
b,n=d['BMP_GPM'],d['NTP_GPM']
print('period',d['quarter'].iloc[0],'->',d['quarter'].iloc[-1],'| n=',len(d))
print()
print('=== AMPLITUDE (cyclicality) ===')
print(f'BMP GPM: min{b.min():.1f} max{b.max():.1f} range{b.max()-b.min():.1f} std{b.std():.1f} mean{b.mean():.1f}')
print(f'NTP GPM: min{n.min():.1f} max{n.max():.1f} range{n.max()-n.min():.1f} std{n.std():.1f} mean{n.mean():.1f}')
print(f'BMP is {b.std()/n.std():.1f}x more volatile than NTP')
print()
print('=== LEVEL correlation (lead-lag): corr(NTP[t], BMP[t-k]) ===')
for k in [-2,-1,0,1,2]:
    if k>=0: x=b.shift(k); lbl=f'BMP leads NTP by {k}q' if k>0 else 'contemporaneous'
    else: x=b.shift(k); lbl=f'NTP leads BMP by {-k}q'
    c=pd.concat([n,x],axis=1).dropna(); r=c.iloc[:,0].corr(c.iloc[:,1])
    print(f'  k={k:+d} ({lbl:22s}): r={r:+.2f}')
print()
print('=== QoQ CHANGE correlation (does margin MOVE together?) ===')
db,dn=b.diff(),n.diff()
for k in [-1,0,1]:
    x=db.shift(k); c=pd.concat([dn,x],axis=1).dropna(); r=c.iloc[:,0].corr(c.iloc[:,1])
    lbl='contemporaneous' if k==0 else (f'BMP leads {k}q' if k>0 else f'NTP leads {-k}q')
    print(f'  dGPM k={k:+d} ({lbl:16s}): r={r:+.2f}')
print()
print('=== 2021 PVC-spike crash (downside co-move?) ===')
print(d[d.quarter.isin([\"2021Q1\",\"2021Q2\",\"2021Q3\",\"2021Q4\",\"2022Q1\"])].to_string(index=False))
print()
print('=== 2023-26 PVC-cheap windfall (upside DECOUPLE?) ===')
print(d[d.quarter.str[:4].isin([\"2023\",\"2025\",\"2026\"])].to_string(index=False))
"

lastPrompt: bạn thử lớp (2) lại, xem thực sự có hiệu quả không. Cái nữa, vì NTP với BMP là cùng chu kỳ hàng hóa, nên nếu BMP giảm biên thì vào quý tiếp theo tôi không tin NTP có thể duy trì được biên như vậy, bạn…

content.text:
Số liệu trả lời rất rõ trực giác của bạn. Để tôi tổng hợp rồi triển khai PEG‑TTM.

## (A) Tương quan biên BMP ↔ NTP — trực giác của bạn ĐÚNG, có lead‑lag ~1 quý

**Lead‑lag rõ rệt:** tương quan mạnh nhất ở **k=+1 (BMP dẫn NTP trước 1 quý): r=+0.39** (level) và **+0.33** (thay đổi QoQ). Đồng thời (k=0) yếu hơn (+0.27/+0.09); NTP‑dẫn‑BMP ≈ 0. → **Biên của BMP là chỉ báo sớm ~1 quý cho NTP** — đúng như bạn nói: BMP nén biên thì ~1 kỳ sau NTP mới ngấm.

**Bằng chứng 2021 (cú sốc giá PVC):** BMP chạm đáy 2021Q3 (4.46%), NTP chạm đáy 2021**Q4** (18.53%) — **trễ đúng 1 quý**.

**NHƯNG biên độ rất khác:**

| | Dải GPM | Std | Đáy 2021 |
|---|---|:--:|:--:|
| **BMP** | 4.5–47.9% | 10.6 | sụp về **4.5%** |
| **NTP** | 18.5–38.1% | 4.7 | chỉ về **18.5%** |

→ **BMP biến động gấp 2.3× NTP.** Quan trọng nhất: giai đoạn 2023–26 PVC rẻ, **BMP vọt lên 47%, NTP vẫn ~30% suốt 3 năm** (không khuếch đại theo). Nên:

- NTP's 31% **không phải đỉnh căng** — nó ổn định 28–33% nhiều năm (pctile 0.50). BMP's 47% **là đỉnh thật** (so với dải 4–48% của chính nó).
- Worry của bạn **đúng phần hướng**: cùng input PVC, BMP nén → NTP ngấm sau ~1 quý. Vì BMP vừa tạo đỉnh 47.9% (2025Q3) và đang chững (47.0→47.2), **NTP có rủi ro biên mềm đi trong 1–2 quý tới** — nhưng **mức độ nhẹ** (cùng lắm về ~18–20%, không sụp như BMP).
- Cảnh báo statistical: r=+0.39 với n~40 là *vừa phải*, phần lớn do cú 2021 — gợi ý, không tuyệt đối.

**Hàm ý framework:** với cặp commodity‑consumer dùng chung input, **một peer ở đỉnh biên mà DẪN trước (BMP) là cảnh báo sớm cho follower (NTP)** — NTP tự thân mid‑cycle nhưng peer dẫn đang đỉnh → nên gắn cờ "peer‑lead margin risk" thay vì coi NTP an toàn tuyệt đối.

Giờ triển khai (B) PEG‑TTM:

input.old_string:
finq AS (SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.NP_P0, f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0, f.FSCORE,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f WHERE f.ticker IN ('{tks}')),
fin AS (SELECT finq.ticker,
  SUM(CASE WHEN finq.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) neg_q8,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END) DebtEq,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.IntCov_P0 END) IntCov,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.FSCORE END) FSCORE
  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB,
 fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker""")
input.new_string:
finq AS (SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.NP_P0, f.NP_P1, f.NP_P2, f.NP_P3, f.NP_P4, f.NP_P5, f.NP_P6, f.NP_P7,
  f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0, f.FSCORE,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f WHERE f.ticker IN ('{tks}')),
fin AS (SELECT finq.ticker,
  SUM(CASE WHEN finq.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) neg_q8,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END) DebtEq,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.IntCov_P0 END) IntCov,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.FSCORE END) FSCORE,
  -- TTM growth (P0..P3 vs P4..P7) removes single-quarter base-effect noise in PEG
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN SAFE_DIVIDE(finq.NP_P0+finq.NP_P1+finq.NP_P2+finq.NP_P3,
       NULLIF(finq.NP_P4+finq.NP_P5+finq.NP_P6+finq.NP_P7,0))-1 END) ttm_g
  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(fin.ttm_g,3) ttm_g, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB,
 fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker""")

content.text: Now update `eval_compounder` to use TTM growth for PEG (with single-quarter fallback), keeping a diagnostic of both:

input.old_string:
def eval_compounder(t):
    if t not in val.index: return ("COMPOUNDER","?","no data","")
    r=val.loc[t]; pe,pez,pbz,npy,roe,dd=r["PE"],r["pe_z"],r["pb_z"],r["np_yoy"],r["ROE5Y"],r["dd52"]
    peg=(pe/(npy*100)) if (pd.notna(npy) and npy>0 and pe>0) else np.nan
    hist=(pez<-1) or (pbz<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(pe<10) or (r["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(npy) and npy<-0.15)
    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    if trap and (hist or absc): v="VALUE_TRAP"; act="AVOID"
    elif n>=2: v="CHEAP_QUALITY"; act="BUY-zone"
    elif n==1: v="CHEAP_1lens"; act="WATCH"
    else: v="NOT_CHEAP"; act="WATCH" if roe>=12 else "PASS"
    detail=f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%" if pd.notna(peg) else f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%"
    return (v,act,detail,"⚠" if trap else "")
input.new_string:
def eval_compounder(t):
    if t not in val.index: return ("COMPOUNDER","?","no data","")
    r=val.loc[t]; pe,pez,pbz,npy,roe,dd=r["PE"],r["pe_z"],r["pb_z"],r["np_yoy"],r["ROE5Y"],r["dd52"]
    # growth for PEG/trap = TTM (4q vs prior 4q) to remove single-quarter base-effect noise;
    # fall back to single-quarter YoY only if TTM unavailable.
    ttm=r.get("ttm_g"); g=ttm if pd.notna(ttm) else npy
    peg=(pe/(g*100)) if (pd.notna(g) and g>0 and pe>0) else np.nan
    hist=(pez<-1) or (pbz<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(pe<10) or (r["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(g) and g<-0.15)
    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    if trap and (hist or absc): v="VALUE_TRAP"; act="AVOID"
    elif n>=2: v="CHEAP_QUALITY"; act="BUY-zone"
    elif n==1: v="CHEAP_1lens"; act="WATCH"
    else: v="NOT_CHEAP"; act="WATCH" if roe>=12 else "PASS"
    gtag="ttm" if pd.notna(ttm) else "1q"
    detail=f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f}({gtag}g{g*100:+.0f}%) ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%" if pd.notna(peg) else f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} (g{(g*100 if pd.notna(g) else 0):+.0f}%) ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%"
    return (v,act,detail,"⚠" if trap else "")
