    detail=f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%" if pd.notna(peg) else f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%"
    return (v,act,detail,"⚠" if trap else "")

def eval_compounder(t):
    if t not in val.index: return ("COMPOUNDER","?","no data","")
    r=val.loc[t]; pe,pez,pbz,npy,roe,dd=r["PE"],r["pe_z"],r["pb_z"],r["np_yoy"],r["ROE5Y"],r["dd52"]
    # growth for PEG/trap = TTM (4q vs prior 4q) to remove single-quarter base-effect noise;
    # fall back to single-quarter YoY only if TTM unavailable.
    ttm=r.get("ttm_g"); g=ttm if pd.notna(ttm) else npy
    peg=(pe/(g*100)) if (pd.notna(g) and g>0 and pe>0) else np.nan
    hist=(pez<-1) or (pbz<-1); pegc=(0<peg<=1) if pd.notna(peg) else False; absc=(pe<10) or (r["PB"]<1.2)
    trap=(pd.notna(g) and g<-0.15)
    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc])
    if trap and (hist or absc): v="VALUE_TRAP"; act="AVOID"
    elif n>=2: v="CHEAP_QUALITY"; act="BUY-zone"
    elif n==1: v="CHEAP_1lens"; act="WATCH"
    else: v="NOT_CHEAP"; act="WATCH" if roe>=12 else "PASS"
    gtag="ttm" if pd.notna(ttm) else "1q"
    detail=f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} PEG{peg:.2f}({gtag}g{g*100:+.0f}%) ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%" if pd.notna(peg) else f"PE{pe} pe_z{pez:+.1f} (g{(g*100 if pd.notna(g) else 0):+.0f}%) ROE{roe:.0f}% dd{dd*100:+.0f}%"
    return (v,act,detail,"⚠" if trap else "")

SELECT f.ticker,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(f.NP_P0,f.NP_P4)-1,2) g_1q,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(f.NP_P0+f.NP_P1+f.NP_P2+f.NP_P3, NULLIF(f.NP_P4+f.NP_P5+f.NP_P6+f.NP_P7,0))-1,2) g_ttm
FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f
WHERE f.ticker IN ('IDC','NTC','HDG','CTR','DTD','VGC') AND f.time=(SELECT MAX(time) FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial x WHERE x.ticker=f.ticker)
ORDER BY f.ticker"

content.text:
Đã rõ — **PEG‑TTM là cải tiến đúng, hiệu quả rõ rệt**. Bằng chứng (tăng trưởng 1 quý vs TTM):

| Mã | g 1‑quý | g TTM | Verdict cũ → mới | Đánh giá |
|---|:--:|:--:|---|---|
| IDC | **‑21%** | **+13%** | VALUE_TRAP → CHEAP_QUALITY | ✅ sửa đúng — IP đất lãi lồi lõm |
| NTC | ‑43% | +11% | VALUE_TRAP → CHEAP_QUALITY | ✅ sửa đúng |
| DTD | ‑91% | +3% | VALUE_TRAP → CHEAP_1lens | ✅ |
| VGC | ‑33% | +6% | VALUE_TRAP → CHEAP_1lens | ✅ |
| HDG | ‑68% | +113% | VALUE_TRAP → BUY‑zone | ✅ (lưu ý YIELD+asset‑play) |
| CTR | +23% | +15% | CHEAP_1lens → **NOT_CHEAP** | ✅ sửa ngược — 1 quý mạnh "tô hồng" PE16 |
| BMP | +6% | +14% | (PEG 1.53→0.62) vẫn WATCH | ✅ L5 margin‑peak vẫn chặn đúng |

**PEG 1‑quý tạo ra hàng loạt VALUE_TRAP giả** ở nhóm bất động sản KCN/holdco (lãi lồi lõm theo kỳ bàn giao đất). TTM xóa nhiễu nền cả 2 chiều: gỡ trap‑giả (IDC/NTC) lẫn cheap‑giả (CTR).

## TOP‑20 sau cả 3 lớp vá (solvency + L5 margin‑cycle + PEG‑TTM)

| # | Mã | Route | Điểm | # | Mã | Route | Điểm |
|---|-----|-------|:--:|---|-----|-------|:--:|
| 1 | CTG | Bank | 93 | 11 | **NTC** ⚑ | Compounder | 80 |
| 2 | ACB | Bank | 91 | 12 | TCB | Bank | 80 |
| 3 | HAH | Compounder | 91 | 13 | DHA | Compounder | 79 |
| 4 | NCT | Compounder | 90 | 14 | TCL | Compounder | 78.5 |
| 5 | NKG | Cyclical | 89 | 15 | PTB | Compounder | 77.5 |
| 6 | MBB | Bank | 87 | 16 | SCS | Compounder | 77.5 |
| 7 | SMC | Cyclical | 85 | 17 | FPT | Compounder | 72.5 |
| 8 | VCB | Bank | 84 | 18 | **NTP** | Compounder | 72 |
| 9 | NNC | Compounder | 83.5 | 19 | FMC | Compounder | 71.5 |
| 10 | **IDC** ⚑ | Compounder | 83 | 20 | BID | Bank | 71 |

**Thay đổi:** IDC, NTC vào (thay HSG, CTR). 

⚑ **Cảnh báo cho IDC/NTC:** chúng là **ASSET_PLAY** — khung 8L nói "định giá theo NAV/SOTP, KHÔNG theo PE". TTM gỡ trap‑giả đúng, nhưng điểm số vẫn chấm bằng L1 PE‑cheapness → **thứ hạng top‑10 của IDC/NTC bị thổi bởi chính cái PE mà framework bảo đừng tin**. Đây là điểm chưa nhất quán (asset‑play nên có lens riêng), không nên đọc IDC/NTC > NCT/NNC chỉ vì điểm.

## Về NTP (gắn với phát hiện phần A)
NTP ở lại đúng (TTM g +24%, thật, không base‑effect). Nhưng theo tương quan lead‑lag: **BMP vừa đạt đỉnh biên 47.9% và đang chững → NTP có rủi ro biên mềm trong 1–2 quý tới** (cùng input PVC, NTP trễ ~1 kỳ). Mức độ nhẹ (NTP biến động chỉ bằng ~44% BMP), nhưng đáng để **gắn cờ "peer‑lead margin risk"** thay vì coi NTP an toàn tuyệt đối.

Tôi cập nhật memory 2 phát hiện này.

input.old_string: ## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)
input.new_string:
## PEG → TTM growth (lớp 2 fix, 2026-05-31) — VALIDATED, material effect
Switched compounder L1 PEG/value-trap growth input from single-quarter YoY (NP_P0/NP_P4-1) to **TTM (NP_P0..P3 / NP_P4..P7 -1)** in unified_screener (SQL `fin.ttm_g`, fallback to 1q if null). **Single-quarter YoY generated FALSE VALUE_TRAPs en masse** for lumpy-earnings names (IP/holdco land-handover timing): IDC 1q -21%→TTM +13%, NTC -43%→+11%, DTD -91%→+3%, VGC -33%→+6%, HDG -68%→+113% — all flipped VALUE_TRAP→CHEAP. Also removed a false-CHEAP: CTR 1q +23%→TTM +15% (PE16.1 PEG 0.70→1.07 → CHEAP_1lens→NOT_CHEAP, correct — one strong quarter flattered it). BMP 1q +6%→TTM +14% (PEG 1.53→0.62, but still WATCH via L5 margin-peak — both layers compose correctly). Top-20 effect: IDC(#10)/NTC(#11) enter, HSG/CTR drop. **CAVEAT: IDC/NTC are ASSET_PLAY (value on NAV not PE) — TTM correctly de-flagged the false trap, but rank_8l still scores them on PE-cheapness → their top-10 rank is inflated by the very PE the framework says to distrust for asset-plays. Asset-play names need a NAV-based score, not PE-cheapness (open gap).** Combined with solvency gate (8q-loss catches real deterioration like POM), TTM lag-risk is covered. PEG-TTM = keep.

## BMP↔NTP margin lead-lag (user insight 2026-05-31, `data/bmp_ntp_gpm.csv`) — paired commodity-consumers
User: BMP (South) & NTP (North) = same plastic-pipe duopoly, SAME input (PVC resin) — if BMP's margin compresses, NTP can't sustain its margin into the next quarter. **VERIFIED (42q GPM 2015-2026)**: (1) **lead-lag REAL**: corr(NTP[t], BMP[t-1]) = +0.39 (level) / +0.33 (QoQ change) = STRONGEST at BMP-leads-NTP-by-1q; contemporaneous weaker (+0.27/+0.09); NTP-leads ≈0. 2021 PVC-spike: BMP troughed 2021Q3 (4.46%), NTP troughed 2021Q4 (18.5%) = exactly 1q lag. **So user's intuition confirmed: BMP GPM is a ~1-quarter LEADING indicator for NTP.** (2) **BUT amplitude very different**: BMP GPM range 4.5-47.9% (std 10.6), NTP 18.5-38.1% (std 4.7) → **BMP 2.3× more volatile**; 2023-26 PVC-cheap windfall BMP soared to 47% while NTP stayed flat ~30% (did NOT amplify). → NTP's 31% is genuinely stable mid-cycle (not a stretched peak like BMP's 47%); worst-case NTP dips to ~18-20%, not BMP-like collapse. **Framework implication: for paired commodity-consumers sharing an input, a LEADING peer at margin-PEAK (BMP) is an early-warning for the follower (NTP) ~1q out — NTP looks safe standalone (pctile 0.50) but carries "peer-lead margin risk" since BMP just topped. TODO: paired-peer overlay (map same-input consumers; if leader at MARGIN_PEAK, flag follower).** Caveat: r=+0.39 @ n~40 modest, 2021 episode drives much of it. File: data/bmp_ntp_gpm.csv.

file.content:
s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity
        cyc=MC.get(t)
        if cyc=="MARGIN_PEAK": comp["L5_margin"]=-12

if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t); is_ap="ASSET_PLAY" in eng
        if is_ap:
            # L8 NAV-lite: value asset-plays on P/B (book=conservative asset floor; true NAV/SOTP

            pbz=r["pb_z"]; pb=r["PB"]

            trap=-10 if v=="VALUE_TRAP" else 0
            comp["L8_NAV"]=zbon+pbabs+trap
        else:
            # L1 valuation (PE/PEG, TTM growth)
            base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
            pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
            peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
            comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity
        cyc=MC.get(t)
        if cyc=="MARGIN_PEAK": comp["L5_margin"]=-12
        elif cyc=="MARGIN_BOTTOM": comp["L5_margin"]=+8
        # paired-peer overlay: same-input peer at MARGIN_PEAK warns follower (~1q lag) — modest penalty
        if "PEER-LEAD" in str(r["detail"]): comp["peer_lead"]=-4

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()
try:
    MC=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","margin_cycle_detector.csv")).set_index("ticker")["cycle"].to_dict()
except Exception: MC={}

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t)
        # L1 valuation
        base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
        pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
        peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
        comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        if "ASSET_PLAY" in eng: comp["L8_assetplay_note"]=0  # PE misleading -> NAV; neutral, flag only
        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity
        cyc=MC.get(t)
        if cyc=="MARGIN_PEAK": comp["L5_margin"]=-12
        elif cyc=="MARGIN_BOTTOM": comp["L5_margin"]=+8
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()
try:
    MC=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","margin_cycle_detector.csv")).set_index("ticker")["cycle"].to_dict()
except Exception: MC={}

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t); is_ap="ASSET_PLAY" in eng
        if is_ap:
            # L8 NAV-lite: value asset-plays on P/B (book=conservative asset floor; true NAV/SOTP
            # usually > book cost), NOT on PE/PEG (lumpy non-op earnings mislead). Data caveat:
            # BQ has book-at-cost only, so this is a proxy floor, not a real SOTP.
            pbz=r["pb_z"]; pb=r["PB"]
            zbon=np.clip(-pbz,-1,2)*6 if pd.notna(pbz) else 0
            pbabs=18 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<1.0) else 12 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.3) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.7) else 2 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<2.2) else 0
            trap=-10 if v=="VALUE_TRAP" else 0
            comp["L8_NAV"]=zbon+pbabs+trap
        else:
            # L1 valuation (PE/PEG, TTM growth)
            base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
            pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
            peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
            comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity
        cyc=MC.get(t)
        if cyc=="MARGIN_PEAK": comp["L5_margin"]=-12
        elif cyc=="MARGIN_BOTTOM": comp["L5_margin"]=+8
        # paired-peer overlay: same-input peer at MARGIN_PEAK warns follower (~1q lag) — modest penalty
        if "PEER-LEAD" in str(r["detail"]): comp["peer_lead"]=-4
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

content.text:
Hoàn tất cả hai. Đây là kết quả cuối cùng.

## Đã xây 2 overlay mới

**(1) NAV‑lite cho asset‑play** — chấm bằng **P/B** (sổ sách = sàn tài sản bảo thủ; NAV thật thường > giá vốn) thay vì PE/PEG (lãi lồi lõm gây hiểu lầm). Hiệu lực:
- **IDC 83→55.8, NTC 80→53.6, HDG 70→50.2** — rớt mạnh & ra khỏi top‑20. Đúng: chúng giao dịch **trên** sổ sách (PB cao) → không rẻ trên tài sản, PE thấp chỉ là ảo giác lúc lãi xuống.
- **DTD 57.5→70.4 (vào #19)** — PB thấp (rẻ trên tài sản thật) → NAV‑lite tưởng thưởng đúng.

**(2) Paired‑peer margin overlay** — nhóm consumer cùng input; peer dẫn ở MARGIN_PEAK cảnh báo follower ~1 quý. Chỉ **NTP** bị bắn cờ (BMP/"PVC resin" đang đỉnh), không over‑fire (DRC↔CSM cùng "rubber+carbon black" nhưng cả hai mid → không cờ). NTP bị −4đ: 72→68, tụt xuống #20.

## TOP‑20 cuối cùng (sau 4 lớp: solvency + L5 margin + PEG‑TTM + NAV‑lite/peer)

| # | Mã | Route | Điểm | Action | Cờ |
|---|-----|-------|:--:|--------|-----|
| 1 | CTG | Bank | 93 | BUY‑zone | |
| 2 | ACB | Bank | 91 | BUY‑zone | |
| 3 | HAH | Compounder | 91 | BUY‑zone | cash‑machine◆ |
| 4 | NCT | Compounder | 90 | BUY‑zone | ROE54% |
| 5 | NKG | Cyclical | 89 | BUY‑zone | thép trough |
| 6 | MBB | Bank | 87 | BUY‑zone | |
| 7 | SMC | Cyclical | 85 | BUY‑zone | thép trough |
| 8 | VCB | Bank | 84 | BUY‑eligible | PB đắt |
| 9 | NNC | Compounder | 83.5 | BUY‑zone | |
| 10 | TCB | Bank | 80 | BUY‑eligible | |
| 11 | DHA | Compounder | 79 | BUY‑zone | |
| 12 | TCL | Compounder | 78.5 | BUY‑zone | |
| 13 | SCS | Compounder | 77.5 | BUY‑zone | ⭐moat STRONG |
| 14 | PTB | Compounder | 77.5 | BUY‑zone | cash‑machine◆ |
| 15 | FPT | Compounder | 72.5 | **WATCH** | |
| 16 | FMC | Compounder | 71.5 | BUY‑zone | moat WEAK |
| 17 | BID | Bank | 71 | BUY‑eligible | |
| 18 | BMP | Compounder | 70.5 | **WATCH** | ⚠ MARGIN‑PEAK |
| 19 | DTD | Compounder | 70.4 | **WATCH** | NAV‑lite(P/B) |
| 20 | NTP | Compounder | 68 | BUY‑zone | ⚑ PEER‑LEAD |

**17/20 là BUY‑zone/BUY‑eligible**; 3 mã WATCH (FPT, BMP, DTD) — gắn cờ rõ.

## Điểm cần lưu ý thành thật
- **BMP ở #18 dù WATCH**: composite cho 70.5 vì chất lượng thật (ROE32% + PEG‑TTM rẻ) **vượt** phạt −12 margin‑peak. Đây là "DN tốt, sai thời điểm" → điểm phản ánh *chất lượng*, nhãn action phản ánh *timing*. Không nên mua lúc biên đỉnh.
- **NAV‑lite là proxy book‑at‑cost**, không phải SOTP thật (BQ không có giá thị trường quỹ đất) — là sàn bảo thủ, không phải định giá đầy đủ.
- **Peer‑lead chỉ khớp input chính xác** ("PVC resin") — chưa liên kết chéo các nhóm nhựa khác nhau (bảo thủ, không tạo link giả).

Tôi cập nhật memory ghi nhận 2 overlay đã build & wired.

## BUILT: NAV-lite asset-play scoring + paired-peer margin overlay (2026-05-31)
Closed the two gaps from the BMP/NTP + TTM session. **(1) NAV-lite for asset-plays (rank_8l.py)**: asset-play names (ASSET_PLAY in engine) now scored on **P/B** (pb_z vs own history + absolute PB tiers: <1.0=+18 … >2.2=0), NOT PE/PEG (lumpy non-op earnings mislead). Effect: IDC 83→55.8, NTC 80→53.6, HDG 70→50.2 (drop OUT of top-20 — they trade ABOVE book, PE-cheapness was an artifact of a down-quarter); DTD 57.5→70.4 (rises IN — low PB = cheap on assets). Caveat: BQ has book-at-cost only → P/B is a conservative NAV FLOOR proxy, not a true SOTP (real land NAV usually > book; PHR-type still needs external estimate). **(2) Paired-peer margin overlay (unified_screener.py)**: group commodity-consumers by `input` (margin_cycle_detector.csv); if a same-input peer is MARGIN_PEAK, flag the follower "⚑ PEER-LEAD margin risk ~1q lag" + rank_8l −4. Fires ONLY on exact-input-match → currently only NTP (BMP/'PVC resin' peak); DRC↔CSM share 'rubber+carbon black' but both MID so no flag (not over-firing). Limitation: input strings inconsistent ('PVC resin' vs 'plastic resin' vs 'plastic/petro') so cross-plastic links not captured (conservative). **FINAL top-20 (4 layers: solvency + L5 margin + PEG-TTM + NAV-lite/peer)**: CTG ACB HAH NCT NKG MBB SMC VCB NNC TCB DHA TCL SCS PTB FPT FMC BID BMP DTD NTP. 17/20 BUY-zone/eligible; FPT/BMP/DTD = WATCH (flagged). Note: BMP ranks #18 DESPITE margin-peak WATCH because ROE32%+TTM-cheap outweigh the −12 penalty → score reflects QUALITY, action label reflects TIMING (great franchise, wrong time). Files: rank_8l.py (is_ap branch, peer_lead), unified_screener.py (INPUT_PEAKERS, PEER-LEAD note + pb_z/PB in compounder detail).

lines: ## BMP↔NTP margin lead-lag (user insight 2026-05-31, `data/bmp_ntp_gpm.csv`) — paired commodity-consumers

User: BMP (South) & NTP (North) = same plastic-pipe duopoly, SAME input (PVC resin) — if BMP's margin compresses, NTP can't sustain its margin into the next quarter. **VERIFIED (42q GPM 2015-2026)**: (1) **lead-lag REAL**: corr(NTP[t], BMP[t-1]) = +0.39 (level) / +0.33 (QoQ change) = STRONGEST at BMP-leads-NTP-by-1q; contemporaneous weaker (+0.27/+0.09); NTP-leads ≈0. 2021 PVC-spike: BMP troughed 2021Q3 (4.46%), NTP troughed 2021Q4 (18.5%) = exactly 1q lag. **So user's intuition confirmed: BMP GPM is a ~1-quarter LEADING indicator for NTP.** (2) **BUT amplitude very different**: BMP GPM range 4.5-47.9% (std 10.6), NTP 18.5-38.1% (std 4.7) → **BMP 2.3× more volatile**; 2023-26 PVC-cheap windfall BMP soared to 47% while NTP stayed flat ~30% (did NOT amplify). → NTP's 31% is genuinely stable mid-cycle (not a stretched peak like BMP's 47%); worst-case NTP dips to ~18-20%, not BMP-like collapse. **Framework implication: for paired commodity-consumers sharing an input, a LEADING peer at margin-PEAK (BMP) is an early-warning for the follower (NTP) ~1q out — NTP looks safe standalone (pctile 0.50) but carries "peer-lead margin risk" since BMP just topped. TODO: paired-peer overlay (map same-input consumers; if leader at MARGIN_PEAK, flag follower).** Caveat: r=+0.39 @ n~40 modest, 2021 episode drives much of it. File: data/bmp_ntp_gpm.csv.

Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). lastPrompt: bạn làm cả hai đi nhé

content.text:
Xong cả hai overlay, đã kiểm chứng và lưu memory.

**Tổng kết phiên này** — hệ 8L giờ có 4 lớp gate/overlay mới, tất cả khởi nguồn từ các lỗ hổng bạn chỉ ra:
1. **Solvency gate** (POM) — chặn falling‑knife vốn‑chủ‑âm.
2. **L5 margin‑cycle wired** (BMP/TLG) — PE thấp trên biên đỉnh = bẫy.
3. **PEG‑TTM** — xóa nhiễu base‑effect 1‑quý (gỡ value‑trap giả ở nhóm IP/holdco).
4. **NAV‑lite + paired‑peer** — asset‑play chấm theo P/B; peer dẫn đỉnh biên cảnh báo follower.

Mỗi lỗ hổng đều là kiểu lỗi mà screener cơ học dễ mắc nhưng người trong ngành nhìn ra ngay — cảm ơn bạn đã đẩy từng tình huống. File đã cập nhật: `unified_screener.py`, `rank_8l.py`; output `data/rank_8l.{md,csv}`, `data/unified_screener.{md,csv}`.

Nếu muốn đi tiếp, hai hướng tự nhiên còn lại: (a) **nguồn NAV/SOTP thật** cho asset‑play (quỹ đất theo giá thị trường — cần feed ngoài BQ), hoặc (b) **chuẩn hóa input‑map** để liên kết chéo nhóm nhựa/cao su cho overlay peer‑lead bắt rộng hơn. Cho tôi biết khi bạn muốn làm.

content.text: Đây là một challenge rất sắc — bạn đang chỉ ra một chiều mà gate solvency của tôi **chưa** kiểm: **dòng tiền kinh doanh (CFO)**. Gate hiện tại chỉ xét lợi nhuận (NP), vốn chủ âm, và khả năng trả lãi (IntCov) — SMC lọt qua vì vừa có lãi lại (+18.6 tỷ), vốn chủ dương mỏng, IntCov 1.85. Nhưng một **công ty thương mại thép** có thể có lãi kế toán mà vẫn cạn tiền vì vốn lưu động (tồn kho + phải thu) ngốn sạch dòng tiền. Để tôi kiểm số liệu thật.

input.description: Check SMC cash flow & liquidity vs steel peers

content.text:
Số liệu xác nhận **bạn hoàn toàn đúng** — và SMC là trường hợp căng thẳng thanh khoản *duy nhất* trong nhóm thép:

| | TTM CFO (tỷ) | Tiền+ĐTTC | Nợ ngắn hạn | **Current Ratio** | Cash Ratio |
|---|---:|---:|---:|:---:|:---:|
| HPG | **+25,289** | 11,455 | 62,800 | 1.21 | 0.13 |
| NKG | **+1,370** | 601 | 4,646 | 1.48 | 0.10 |
| HSG | −543 | 963 | 8,268 | 1.28 | 0.08 |
| **SMC** | **−365** | **34** | **1,735** | **0.62** ⚠ | **0.01** ⚠ |

SMC: **Current Ratio 0.62 < 1** → vốn lưu động ÂM (tài sản ngắn hạn không đủ trả nợ ngắn hạn); tiền mặt 34 tỷ chỉ phủ **2%** nợ ngắn hạn 1,735 tỷ; CFO TTM âm 365 tỷ. Đúng như bạn nói — nó **buộc phải** huy động 368 tỷ từ cổ đông để trả nhà cung cấp/nợ vay (con số 368 tỷ khớp gần đúng với lỗ hổng thanh khoản). Đây là **raise cứu nguy**, không phải vốn tăng trưởng.

Gate của tôi bỏ sót vì chỉ xét lợi nhuận/vốn chủ/lãi vay, **không xét dòng tiền & vốn lưu động**. Tôi vá ngay — thêm chiều thanh khoản vào solvency gate.

input.old_string:
finq AS (SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.NP_P0, f.NP_P1, f.NP_P2, f.NP_P3, f.NP_P4, f.NP_P5, f.NP_P6, f.NP_P7,
  f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0, f.FSCORE,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f WHERE f.ticker IN ('{tks}')),
fin AS (SELECT finq.ticker,
  SUM(CASE WHEN finq.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) neg_q8,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END) DebtEq,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.IntCov_P0 END) IntCov,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.FSCORE END) FSCORE,
  -- TTM growth (P0..P3 vs P4..P7) removes single-quarter base-effect noise in PEG
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN SAFE_DIVIDE(finq.NP_P0+finq.NP_P1+finq.NP_P2+finq.NP_P3,
       NULLIF(finq.NP_P4+finq.NP_P5+finq.NP_P6+finq.NP_P7,0))-1 END) ttm_g
  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(fin.ttm_g,3) ttm_g, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB,
 fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker""")

  -- TTM growth (P0..P3 vs P4..P7) removes single-quarter base-effect noise in PEG
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN SAFE_DIVIDE(finq.NP_P0+finq.NP_P1+finq.NP_P2+finq.NP_P3,
       NULLIF(finq.NP_P4+finq.NP_P5+finq.NP_P6+finq.NP_P7,0))-1 END) ttm_g,
  -- LIQUIDITY: TTM operating cash flow (raw VND) + current ratio + cash ratio (working-capital health)
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.CF_OA_P0+finq.CF_OA_P1+finq.CF_OA_P2+finq.CF_OA_P3 END) ttm_cfo,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.CR_P0 END) CR, MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.CashR_P0 END) CashR
  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(fin.ttm_g,3) ttm_g, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB,
 fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE,
 ROUND(fin.ttm_cfo/1e9,0) ttm_cfo_bn, ROUND(fin.CR,2) CR, ROUND(fin.CashR,2) CashR
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker""")

input.old_string: ## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)
input.new_string:
## LIQUIDITY / working-capital gate (2026-05-31, user caught SMC) — 3rd solvency dimension
User (insider): SMC = steel TRADER (high working-capital need), TTM CFO deeply negative, cash+ST/LT-investments can't sustain ops, raising 368bn from shareholders to pay suppliers + repay debt → not safe to operate, shouldn't be a BUY. SMC had PASSED the solvency gate (PB 0.91>0, Debt/Eq 1.73>0, IntCov 1.85>1, just returned to profit NP+18.6) because the gate only checked profitability/equity/interest — **NOT cash flow or working capital**. A trader can show accounting profit while bleeding cash (inventory+receivables absorb it). **VERIFIED BQ (vs steel peers)**: SMC TTM CFO −365bn, cash+STinv only 34bn, ST-debt 1,735bn (cash covers 2%), **Current Ratio 0.62<1 (NEGATIVE working capital)**, CashR 0.01 — uniquely stressed; NKG (CFO+1370, CR1.48) / HPG (CFO+25289, CR1.21) healthy; HSG (CFO−543 but CR1.28, cash963) = one-period WC drain not crisis. **FIX: added LIQUIDITY dimension to distressed() — HARD gate: CR<1.0 AND TTM CFO<0 (negative working capital + cash burn → external-rescue risk) → DISTRESSED/AVOID; SOFT flag: TTM CFO<0 but CR≥1 → "⚠ CFO-watch" note, not excluded.** Pulled CF_OA_P0..P3 (TTM CFO, raw VND), CR_P0, CashR_P0 into val SQL. Result: SMC→AVOID (out of top-20), HSG→soft CFO-watch (kept, CR healthy), NKG/HPG clean. Surgical (only SMC newly gated). **Meta-lesson: solvency has 3 dimensions, all needed — (1) equity/balance-sheet (PB≤0, neg equity), (2) earnings+debt-service (sustained losses + IntCov<1), (3) LIQUIDITY/cash-flow (CR<1 + CFO burn). A contrarian cyclical-trough buy must clear ALL three; trading/distribution businesses fail on (3) while looking fine on (1)+(2). Accounting profit ≠ cash solvency.** SMC's 368bn rights-issue = textbook rescue-raise (cash 34bn, CFO neg, must fund suppliers externally). FINAL top-20: CTG ACB HAH NCT NKG MBB VCB NNC TCB DHA TCL SCS PTB FPT FMC BID BMP DTD NTP HSG (SMC removed, HSG enters #20). Files: unified_screener.py (distressed() liquidity branch + CFO-watch soft flag).

## LIQUIDITY / working-capital gate (2026-05-31, user caught SMC) — 3rd solvency dimension
User (insider): SMC = steel TRADER (high working-capital need), TTM CFO deeply negative, cash+ST/LT-investments can't sustain ops, raising 368bn from shareholders to pay suppliers + repay debt → not safe to operate, shouldn't be a BUY. SMC had PASSED the solvency gate (PB 0.91>0, Debt/Eq 1.73>0, IntCov 1.85>1, just returned to profit NP+18.6) because the gate only checked profitability/equity/interest — **NOT cash flow or working capital**. A trader can show accounting profit while bleeding cash (inventory+receivables absorb it). **VERIFIED BQ (vs steel peers)**: SMC TTM CFO −365bn, cash+STinv only 34bn, ST-debt 1,735bn (cash covers 2%), **Current Ratio 0.62<1 (NEGATIVE working capital)**, CashR 0.01 — uniquely stressed; NKG (CFO+1370, CR1.48) / HPG (CFO+25289, CR1.21) healthy; HSG (CFO−543 but CR1.28, cash963) = one-period WC drain not crisis. **FIX: added LIQUIDITY dimension to distressed() — HARD gate: CR<1.0 AND TTM CFO<0 (negative working capital + cash burn → external-rescue risk) → DISTRESSED/AVOID; SOFT flag: TTM CFO<0 but CR≥1 → "⚠ CFO-watch" note, not excluded.** Pulled CF_OA_P0..P3 (TTM CFO, raw VND), CR_P0, CashR_P0 into val SQL. Result: SMC→AVOID (out of top-20), HSG→soft CFO-watch (kept, CR healthy), NKG/HPG clean. Surgical (only SMC newly gated). **Meta-lesson: solvency has 3 dimensions, all needed — (1) equity/balance-sheet (PB≤0, neg equity), (2) earnings+debt-service (sustained losses + IntCov<1), (3) LIQUIDITY/cash-flow (CR<1 + CFO burn). A contrarian cyclical-trough buy must clear ALL three; trading/distribution businesses fail on (3) while looking fine on (1)+(2). Accounting profit ≠ cash solvency.** SMC's 368bn rights-issue = textbook rescue-raise (cash 34bn, CFO neg, must fund suppliers externally). FINAL top-20: CTG ACB HAH NCT NKG MBB VCB NNC TCB DHA TCL SCS PTB FPT FMC BID BMP DTD NTP HSG (SMC removed, HSG enters #20). Files: unified_screener.py (distressed() liquidity branch + CFO-watch soft flag).

## Framework template (for extending to steel/phosphorus/urea)

lines: ## BUILT: NAV-lite asset-play scoring + paired-peer margin overlay (2026-05-31)

Closed the two gaps from the BMP/NTP + TTM session. **(1) NAV-lite for asset-plays (rank_8l.py)**: asset-play names (ASSET_PLAY in engine) now scored on **P/B** (pb_z vs own history + absolute PB tiers: <1.0=+18 … >2.2=0), NOT PE/PEG (lumpy non-op earnings mislead). Effect: IDC 83→55.8, NTC 80→53.6, HDG 70→50.2 (drop OUT of top-20 — they trade ABOVE book, PE-cheapness was an artifact of a down-quarter); DTD 57.5→70.4 (rises IN — low PB = cheap on assets). Caveat: BQ has book-at-cost only → P/B is a conservative NAV FLOOR proxy, not a true SOTP (real land NAV usually > book; PHR-type still needs external estimate). **(2) Paired-peer margin overlay (unified_screener.py)**: group commodity-consumers by `input` (margin_cycle_detector.csv); if a same-input peer is MARGIN_PEAK, flag the follower "⚑ PEER-LEAD margin risk ~1q lag" + rank_8l −4. Fires ONLY on exact-input-match → currently only NTP (BMP/'PVC resin' peak); DRC↔CSM share 'rubber+carbon black' but both MID so no flag (not over-firing). Limitation: input strings inconsistent ('PVC resin' vs 'plastic resin' vs 'plastic/petro') so cross-plastic links not captured (conservative). **FINAL top-20 (4 layers: solvency + L5 margin + PEG-TTM + NAV-lite/peer)**: CTG ACB HAH NCT NKG MBB SMC VCB NNC TCB DHA TCL SCS PTB FPT FMC BID BMP DTD NTP. 17/20 BUY-zone/eligible; FPT/BMP/DTD = WATCH (flagged). Note: BMP ranks #18 DESPITE margin-peak WATCH because ROE32%+TTM-cheap outweigh the −12 penalty → score reflects QUALITY, action label reflects TIMING (great franchise, wrong time). Files: rank_8l.py (is_ap branch, peer_lead), unified_screener.py (INPUT_PEAKERS, PEER-LEAD note + pb_z/PB in compounder detail).
+## LIQUIDITY / working-capital gate (2026-05-31, user caught SMC) — 3rd solvency dimension

A trader can show accounting profit while bleeding cash (inventory+receivables absorb it). **VERIFIED BQ (vs steel peers)**: SMC TTM CFO −365bn, cash+STinv only 34bn, ST-debt 1,735bn (cash covers 2%), **Current Ratio 0.62<1 (NEGATIVE working capital)**, CashR 0.01 — uniquely stressed; NKG (CFO+1370, CR1.48) / HPG (CFO+25289, CR1.21) healthy; HSG (CFO−543 but CR1.28, cash963) = one-period WC drain not crisis. **FIX: added LIQUIDITY dimension to distressed() — HARD gate: CR<1.0 AND TTM CFO<0 (negative working capital + cash burn → external-rescue risk) → DISTRESSED/AVOID; SOFT flag: TTM CFO<0 but CR≥1 → "⚠ CFO-watch" note, not excluded.** Pulled CF_OA_P0..P3 (TTM CFO, raw VND), CR_P0, CashR_P0 into val SQL. Surgical (only SMC newly gated). **Meta-lesson: solvency has 3 dimensions, all needed — (1) equity/balance-sheet (PB≤0, neg equity), (2) earnings+debt-service (sustained losses + IntCov<1), (3) LIQUIDITY/cash-flow (CR<1 + CFO burn). A contrarian cyclical-trough buy must clear ALL three; trading/distribution businesses fail on (3) while looking fine on (1)+(2). Accounting profit ≠ cash solvency.** SMC's 368bn rights-issue = textbook rescue-raise (cash 34bn, CFO neg, must fund suppliers externally). FINAL top-20: CTG ACB HAH NCT NKG MBB VCB NNC TCB DHA TCL SCS PTB FPT FMC BID BMP DTD NTP HSG (SMC removed, HSG enters #20). Files: unified_screener.py (distressed() liquidity branch + CFO-watch soft flag).

Signal = commodity at TROUGH (price < trailing-3Y median / low percentile) AND stock cheap (low PB) AND dislocated (deep dd, ideally CRISIS/BEAR) → buy; sell when commodity at peak / valuation rich. Use PB not PE (cyclical PE trap: low PE at peak earnings = sell signal). Next: ingest historical series for steel HRC (SunSirs China), phosphorus (SunSirs), urea (TradingEconomics/IndexMundi) and repeat the event study. Files: `rubber_cyclical.py`, `data/rubber_monthly.csv`, `data/rubber_cyclical_obs.csv`.

content.text:
## Kết luận: bạn đúng — SMC KHÔNG nên nằm trong danh sách mua

Và nó phơi bày một chiều thứ ba mà gate solvency của tôi còn thiếu. Số liệu BQ xác nhận trọn vẹn lập luận của bạn: **CFO TTM −365 tỷ, tiền 34 tỷ, Current Ratio 0.62 (vốn lưu động ÂM), tiền chỉ phủ 2% nợ ngắn hạn** → buộc phải huy động 368 tỷ cứu nguy. Với một công ty **thương mại thép** ngốn vốn lưu động, đây là rủi ro mất khả năng vận hành, không phải "đáy chu kỳ để mua".

### Đã vá — gate solvency giờ có 3 chiều
1. **Bảng cân đối** (vốn chủ âm, PB≤0) → bắt POM
2. **Lợi nhuận + trả lãi** (lỗ kéo dài + IntCov<1)
3. **🆕 Thanh khoản/dòng tiền**: CR<1 **VÀ** CFO TTM<0 → DISTRESSED (bắt SMC); CFO<0 nhưng CR≥1 → chỉ cờ mềm "CFO‑watch" (HSG được giữ)

**Bài học cốt lõi: lãi kế toán ≠ khả năng thanh toán bằng tiền.** Một lệnh mua đáy chu kỳ phải vượt **cả ba** cổng; doanh nghiệp thương mại/phân phối thường gãy ở chiều (3) trong khi trông ổn ở (1)+(2).

### TOP‑20 cuối cùng (SMC ra, HSG vào #20)

| # | Mã | Route | Điểm | Action | # | Mã | Route | Điểm | Action |
|---|-----|-----|:--:|-----|---|-----|-----|:--:|-----|
| 1 | CTG | Bank | 93 | BUY | 11 | TCL | Comp | 78.5 | BUY |
| 2 | ACB | Bank | 91 | BUY | 12 | SCS | Comp | 77.5 | BUY |
| 3 | HAH | Comp | 91 | BUY | 13 | PTB | Comp | 77.5 | BUY |
| 4 | NCT | Comp | 90 | BUY | 14 | FPT | Comp | 72.5 | WATCH |
| 5 | NKG | Cyclical | 89 | BUY | 15 | FMC | Comp | 71.5 | BUY |
| 6 | MBB | Bank | 87 | BUY | 16 | BID | Bank | 71 | BUY‑elig |
| 7 | VCB | Bank | 84 | BUY‑elig | 17 | BMP | Comp | 70.5 | WATCH (margin‑peak) |
| 8 | NNC | Comp | 83.5 | BUY | 18 | DTD | Comp | 70.4 | WATCH (NAV‑lite) |
| 9 | TCB | Bank | 80 | BUY‑elig | 19 | NTP | Comp | 68 | BUY (peer‑lead⚑) |
| 10 | DHA | Comp | 79 | BUY | 20 | HSG | Cyclical | 67 | ACCUM (CFO‑watch⚠) |

Ghi chú: tôi kiểm chứng tình trạng kiệt quệ trực tiếp từ BQ (CFO/CR/tiền) chứ không dựa mỗi vào con số 368 tỷ — và các chỉ số đó tự thân đã đủ để gate loại SMC. Đã lưu memory.

Qua 3 challenge của bạn (POM → vốn chủ âm, BMP/NTP → margin‑cycle & lead‑lag, SMC → thanh khoản), hệ 8L đã chắc hơn hẳn ở đúng chỗ mà screener cơ học hay sập: **phân biệt "rẻ vì đáy chu kỳ" với "rẻ vì sắp chết".**

content.text: Đây là một metric tốt và rất "đồng điệu" với hệ 8L — nhưng có vài cái bẫy đáng nói. Trước khi cho ý kiến, để tôi tính thử **CFO/Market Cap (TTM)** cho danh sách hiện tại xem nó có phân biệt được gì không (đúng tinh thần "không tin chỉ số khi chưa test").

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/bin" && export CLOUDSDK_PYTHON="/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/platform/bundledpython/python.exe" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv "
WITH px AS (SELECT t.ticker, t.Close, t.time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY t.ticker ORDER BY t.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker t WHERE t.ticker IN ('HAH','NCT','NNC','DHA','TCL','SCS','PTB','FMC','NTP','DTD','QTP','VCS','DGC','MWG','HPG','NKG') AND t.Close IS NOT NULL),
f AS (SELECT x.ticker, x.OShares, x.EPS_P0,
   (x.CF_OA_P0+x.CF_OA_P1+x.CF_OA_P2+x.CF_OA_P3) ttm_cfo,
   (x.NP_P0+x.NP_P1+x.NP_P2+x.NP_P3) ttm_np,
   (x.CF_Invest_P0+x.CF_Invest_P1+x.CF_Invest_P2+x.CF_Invest_P3) ttm_capex,
   ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY x.ticker ORDER BY x.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial x WHERE x.ticker IN ('HAH','NCT','NNC','DHA','TCL','SCS','PTB','FMC','NTP','DTD','QTP','VCS','DGC','MWG','HPG','NKG'))
SELECT f.ticker,
  ROUND(px.Close*f.OShares/1e9,0) MktCap_bn,
  ROUND(f.ttm_cfo/1e9,0) CFO_bn,
  ROUND(100*f.ttm_cfo/NULLIF(px.Close*f.OShares,0),1) CFO_yield_pct,
  ROUND(100*(f.ttm_cfo+f.ttm_capex)/NULLIF(px.Close*f.OShares,0),1) FCF_yield_pct,
  ROUND(f.ttm_cfo/NULLIF(f.ttm_np,0),2) CFO_NP
FROM f JOIN px ON px.ticker=f.ticker AND px.rn=1 WHERE f.rn=1
ORDER BY CFO_yield_pct DESC"
input.description: Compute CFO/MV and FCF/MV yields for key names

lastPrompt: okie. Hợp lý hơn rùi. ngoài ra đôi khi tôi còn nhìn thước đo CFO/Market value để đánh giá doanh nghiệp có tạo tiền tốt hay không? Tất nhiên chỉ số này có thể bị nhiễu, do chu kỳ ngành, nhưng tựu trung…

content.text:
Tôi tính CFO/Market‑Cap (TTM) + thêm FCF/MV (trừ capex) để lộ bẫy. Dữ liệu xác nhận **vừa hay vừa có cạm bẫy**:

| Mã | CFO yield | **FCF yield** | CFO/NP | Đọc |
|----|---:|---:|---:|------|
| DTD | 58.2% | **6.7%** | 3.93 | Asset‑play — CFO phình do bán đất/giải phóng vốn LĐ, FCF mới là thật |
| TCL | 38.6% | 28.7% | 2.18 | ✅ máy tạo tiền thật, rẻ |
| FMC | 33.9% | 30.6% | 2.04 | ✅ thật |
| QTP | 30.9% | 30.7% | 1.55 | ✅ tiền khỏe **nhưng = YIELD** (cash‑cow, không tái đầu tư) |
| NKG | 22.4% | **−33.9%** | 8.89 | ⚠ CFO ổn nhưng capex ngốn sạch → FCF âm |
| HPG | 13.7% | **0.1%** | 1.2 | Compounder thâm dụng vốn — tái đầu tư hết (Dung Quất 2) |
| **PTB** | **4.7%** | **−15.4%** | 0.28 | ⚠ CFO yield thấp **nhưng là COMPOUNDER◆** — đang tái đầu tư tăng trưởng |
| DGC | 3.4% | −1.7% | 0.23 | CFO yếu = đúng sự kiện mỏ (tạm thời) |

## Tôi nghĩ sao — metric tốt, lấp đúng khoảng trống, nhưng phải dùng như "tam giác hóa" không phải ranker

**Vì sao nó hợp với 8L:** hệ hiện chấm rẻ bằng PE (lợi nhuận) và PB (tài sản) — **thiếu chiều tiền mặt**. CFO/MV chính là *lợi suất tiền mặt* — khó xào nấu hơn lợi nhuận kế toán, và ghép hoàn hảo với gate cash‑machine◆ (L3): **cash‑machine hỏi "có tạo tiền thật không", CFO/MV hỏi "tiền đó có rẻ không"** → cùng nhau = "máy tạo tiền thật, giá rẻ". TTM smooth nhiễu vốn lưu động — đúng như bạn nói.

**3 bẫy đã xác nhận bằng số (phải có lan can):**
1. **Đảo ngược tái‑đầu‑tư** (nghiêm trọng nhất): PTB (4.7%) và HPG (FCF 0.1%) — compounder thâm dụng vốn tái đầu tư tăng trưởng bị CFO/MV chấm *thấp*, đúng những mã hệ muốn giữ. **→ không được phạt CFO‑yield thấp nếu là COMPOUNDER ROIC cao đang tái đầu tư** (chính là reinvestment‑runway). Phải đọc cùng engine class.
2. **CFO ≠ FCF**: với mã capex‑nặng, khoảng cách CFO−FCF rất lớn (NKG +22%→−34%). CFO yield *thổi phồng* tiền chủ sở hữu thực có. Bản thân **khoảng cách CFO−FCF là thông tin** (lớn = thâm dụng vốn/đang đầu tư).
3. **Đỉnh chu kỳ**: CFO yield cao ở đỉnh hàng hóa = bẫy (giống PE thấp trên lãi đỉnh) → phải gate bằng L7/L5. Và QTP minh họa: CFO+FCF yield cao nhất nhưng là **YIELD** — metric này thiên về *value/income*, không phải *growth*.

## Cách tôi sẽ tích hợp (nếu bạn đồng ý)
Thêm **CFO_yield + FCF_yield (TTM)** vào L1 như **lăng kính tiền mặt thứ 3 để tam giác hóa**, không phải trọng số nặng:
- **Thưởng** chỉ khi *xác nhận chéo*: CFO yield cao **và** FCF yield dương **và** cash‑machine◆ → "cheap genuine cash generator" (TCL/FMC).
- **Lan can**: KHÔNG phạt CFO/FCF yield thấp nếu engine = COMPOUNDER + ROIC≥12% + asset‑growth>0 (đang tái đầu tư, PTB/HPG).
- **Cyclical**: bỏ qua CFO yield ở đỉnh hàng hóa.
- Hiển thị cả hai số như chẩn đoán để bạn tự đọc (CFO−FCF gap).

Đây là cách dùng nhất quán với meta‑nguyên tắc của hệ ("rẻ phải tam giác hóa", "chất lượng = gate không phải ranker").

Bạn muốn tôi **wire nó vào** theo hướng trên (CFO+FCF yield làm lăng kính tiền mặt L1, có lan can engine/cycle), hay để tôi **test IC của CFO‑yield** trên forward returns trước (xem nó có thật sự thêm signal hay chỉ trùng với PB/cash‑machine) rồi mới quyết?

content.text: `ticker_prune` has **OShares** — tôi tính được market cap trực tiếp (Close × OShares), không cần proxy PE. Dựng panel month‑end 2015+ với forward outcomes O3M/O6M/O1Y:

input.command:
cd "/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" && export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/bin" && export CLOUDSDK_PYTHON="/c/Users/hotro/AppData/Local/Google/Cloud SDK/google-cloud-sdk/platform/bundledpython/python.exe" && bq query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id=[REDACTED] --format=csv --max_rows=200000 "
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ticker, time, Close, OShares,
    (CF_OA_P0+CF_OA_P1+CF_OA_P2+CF_OA_P3) cfo,
    (CF_Invest_P0+CF_Invest_P1+CF_Invest_P2+CF_Invest_P3) capex,
    (NP_P0+NP_P1+NP_P2+NP_P3) np,
    PB, SAFE_DIVIDE(PB-PB_MA5Y,PB_SD5Y) pb_z,
    Volume_3M_P50*Close liq, O3M, O6M, O1Y, profit_3M,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker, DATE_TRUNC(time, MONTH) ORDER BY time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune
  WHERE time>='2015-01-01' AND Close IS NOT NULL AND OShares>0)
SELECT ticker, time,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(cfo, Close*OShares),4) cfo_yield,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(cfo+capex, Close*OShares),4) fcf_yield,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(np, Close*OShares),4) ey,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(cfo, NULLIF(np,0)),3) cfo_np,
  ROUND(PB,3) PB, ROUND(pb_z,3) pb_z,
  O3M, O6M, O1Y, profit_3M
FROM base WHERE rn=1 AND liq>=1e9" > data/cfo_yield_panel.csv 2>/dev/null && wc -l data/cfo_yield_panel.csv && head -3 data/cfo_yield_panel.csv

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""cfo_yield_ic.py — does CFO/MarketCap (TTM) add forward-return signal? IC test before wiring in.
Cross-sectional Spearman IC by date (proper IC, removes time trend), excl banks (CFO meaningless).
Tests: cfo_yield, fcf_yield, earnings_yield(ey), pb_z, cfo_np vs fwd O3M/O6M/O1Y. Incremental vs PE/PB."""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
from scipy.stats import spearmanr
W=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
d=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","cfo_yield_panel.csv"))
banks=set(pd.read_csv(os.path.join(W,"data","bank_lens_v3.csv"))["ticker"])
d=d[~d["ticker"].isin(banks)].copy()
d["time"]=pd.to_datetime(d["time"]); d["yr"]=d["time"].dt.year
# fwd return columns: O* are price-relatives (~1.0), profit_3M is %; Spearman is scale/offset-invariant
FWD=["O3M","O6M","O1Y"]
METRICS=["cfo_yield","fcf_yield","ey","cfo_np","pb_z"]
# direction note: higher yield = cheaper = expect +IC; pb_z lower = cheaper = expect -IC

def xs_ic(df, m, f):
    """cross-sectional Spearman by date, averaged; returns mean IC, t-stat, n_dates"""
    ics=[]
    for _,g in df.groupby("time"):
        g2=g[[m,f]].dropna()
        if len(g2)>=8:
            r,_=spearmanr(g2[m],g2[f])
            if not np.isnan(r): ics.append(r)
    ics=np.array(ics)
    if len(ics)<6: return (np.nan,np.nan,len(ics))
    return (ics.mean(), ics.mean()/ics.std()*np.sqrt(len(ics)), len(ics))

print(f"panel: {len(d)} obs, {d['ticker'].nunique()} non-bank tickers, {d['time'].nunique()} month-dates, {d['yr'].min()}-{d['yr'].max()}")
print()
print("=== Cross-sectional IC (mean Spearman by date, t-stat) ===")
print(f"{'metric':<11}"+"".join(f"{f:>22}" for f in FWD))
for m in METRICS:
    row=f"{m:<11}"
    for f in FWD:
        ic,t,n=xs_ic(d,m,f); row+=f"{ic:+.3f} (t={t:+.1f},n{n})".rjust(22)
    print(row)
print("  [higher yield=cheaper→expect +IC; pb_z lower=cheaper→expect −IC]")
print()
# ---- redundancy: how correlated is cfo_yield with ey and pb (rank space)? ----
print("=== Redundancy (pooled Spearman between predictors) ===")
for a,b in [("cfo_yield","ey"),("cfo_yield","pb_z"),("cfo_yield","fcf_yield"),("fcf_yield","ey"),("cfo_np","ey")]:
    g=d[[a,b]].dropna(); r,_=spearmanr(g[a],g[b]); print(f"  {a:<11} vs {b:<11}: {r:+.2f}")
print()
# ---- INCREMENTAL: residualize cfo_yield on (ey, pb_z) per date, test residual IC ----
print("=== Incremental IC: cfo_yield AFTER removing earnings-yield & PB (rank-residual) ===")
def resid_ic(df,f):
    ics=[]
    for _,g in df.groupby("time"):
        g2=g[["cfo_yield","ey","pb_z",f]].dropna()
        if len(g2)<10: continue
        R=g2.rank()
        # residual of cfo_yield rank vs [ey rank, pb_z rank]
        X=np.column_stack([np.ones(len(R)),R["ey"],R["pb_z"]]); y=R["cfo_yield"].values
        try: beta,_,_,_=np.linalg.lstsq(X,y,rcond=None); res=y-X@beta
        except Exception: continue
        r,_=spearmanr(res,g2[f]);
        if not np.isnan(r): ics.append(r)
    ics=np.array(ics); return (ics.mean(), ics.mean()/ics.std()*np.sqrt(len(ics)), len(ics)) if len(ics)>=6 else (np.nan,np.nan,len(ics))
for f in FWD:
    ic,t,n=resid_ic(d,f); print(f"  resid cfo_yield vs {f:<5}: IC {ic:+.3f} (t={t:+.1f}, n={n})")
print()
# ---- by-year stability (O6M) ----
print("=== cfo_yield IC vs O6M by year (cyclicality check) ===")
for yr in sorted(d["yr"].unique()):
    sub=d[d["yr"]==yr]; ic,t,n=xs_ic(sub,"cfo_yield","O6M")
    if not np.isnan(ic): print(f"  {yr}: IC {ic:+.3f} (n_dates {n})")

content.text:
IC đã rõ và **thuận lợi**. Kết quả:

## Kết quả test IC (Spearman cross‑sectional theo ngày, loại bank, 455 mã, 2015‑2026)

| Metric | IC 3M | IC 6M | **IC 1Y** | Đọc |
|--------|:--:|:--:|:--:|------|
| **cfo_yield** | +0.075 | +0.091 | **+0.124** (t=10.6) | ✅ thật, mạnh, **tăng theo horizon** |
| ey (1/PE, TTM) | +0.088 | +0.106 | +0.135 | Nhỉnh hơn cfo_yield một chút |
| fcf_yield | +0.062 | +0.071 | +0.086 | Yếu hơn — capex thêm nhiễu |
| cfo_np (chất lượng tiền) | +0.043 | +0.053 | +0.085 | Dương, yếu hơn, vẫn tăng theo horizon |
| pb_z | +0.006 | −0.015 | −0.049 | PB gần như **vô dụng** ở VN (xác nhận lại) |

**Test quyết định — IC tăng thêm sau khi loại bỏ ảnh hưởng PE & PB (rank‑residual):**
- cfo_yield còn **+0.062 (3M) / +0.075 (6M) / +0.094 (1Y)**, đều ý nghĩa mạnh (t=5.6→7.9).
- Tức cfo_yield giữ **~75% sức mạnh** kể cả khi đã kiểm soát PE và PB.

**Độ trùng lặp (redundancy):** cfo_yield vs PB = **−0.02 (trực giao hoàn toàn)**; vs ey = +0.23 (chỉ trùng nhẹ). → cfo_yield mang thông tin **độc lập**, không phải PE/PB ngụy trang.

**Ổn định theo năm:** dương 9/11 năm; chỉ âm 2017 (−0.07) và 2019 (−0.01) — đúng 2 năm bull/momentum mạnh (khớp phát hiện "FA edge ≈ 0 trong BULL"). Không bị một episode chi phối.

## Quyết định của tôi: **CÓ — nên wire vào, nhưng như lăng kính bổ trợ (confirming), không phải ranker chính**

Lý do, dựa trên số:
1. **Tín hiệu THẬT & độc lập**: orthogonal với PB, giữ IC tăng thêm sau khi kiểm soát PE/PB → lấp đúng "khoảng trống chiều tiền mặt" mà L1 đang thiếu. Magnitude (+0.09–0.12 ở 6M–1Y) ngang ngửa total_score FA.
2. **Edge dài hạn** (tốt nhất ở 1Y) → hợp với triết lý "giữ dài" của 8L; dùng làm tín hiệu *value/income*, không phải timing ngắn hạn.
3. **fcf_yield yếu hơn** → dùng CFO_yield làm chính, FCF_yield chỉ làm *chẩn đoán cường độ capex* (khoảng cách CFO−FCF), không chấm điểm.
4. **cfo_np dương & orthogonal với ey** → củng cố việc giữ gate cash‑machine◆.

**Lan can bắt buộc** (từ phần phân tích trước, IC pooled không thấy được): KHÔNG phạt cfo_yield thấp với COMPOUNDER ROIC cao đang tái đầu tư (PTB/HPG, FCF âm); cyclical bỏ qua cfo_yield ở đỉnh hàng hóa.

**Một cảnh báo trung thực:** đây là IC *signal‑level* (xếp hạng cross‑sectional) — đúng thước cho **screener/8L ranking** (công cụ ý‑tưởng). Memory FA‑audit cho thấy IC signal‑level hay *thất bại* khi đưa vào book NAV capacity‑bound; nên tôi **không** tuyên bố nó cải thiện book momentum BA — chỉ khẳng định nó xứng đáng là lăng kính tiền mặt trong screener.

Đề xuất tích hợp: thêm **cfo_yield (TTM)** vào L1 như cheap‑lens thứ 4 — cộng vào "multi‑lens cheap count" + điểm `rank_8l` (thưởng khi cfo_yield cao xác nhận cùng cash‑machine◆), kèm lan can engine/cycle; hiển thị cfo_yield + fcf_yield làm chẩn đoán.

Tôi lưu kết quả IC vào memory. Bạn cho tôi **wire vào theo hướng trên** chứ?

content.text: Được. Tôi wire `cfo_yield` (+ `fcf_yield` làm chẩn đoán) vào như cheap‑lens tiền mặt thứ 4, kèm lan can. Trước tiên bổ sung dữ liệu vào screener SQL (cần OShares + capex để tính market cap & FCF):

input.old_string:
finq AS (SELECT f.ticker, f.time, f.NP_P0, f.NP_P1, f.NP_P2, f.NP_P3, f.NP_P4, f.NP_P5, f.NP_P6, f.NP_P7,
  f.CF_OA_P0, f.CF_OA_P1, f.CF_OA_P2, f.CF_OA_P3, f.CR_P0, f.CashR_P0,
  f.STLTDebt_Eq_P0, f.IntCov_P0, f.FSCORE,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.ticker ORDER BY f.time DESC) rn
  FROM tav2_bq.ticker_financial f WHERE f.ticker IN ('{tks}')),
fin AS (SELECT finq.ticker,
  SUM(CASE WHEN finq.NP_P0<0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) neg_q8,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.STLTDebt_Eq_P0 END) DebtEq,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.IntCov_P0 END) IntCov,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.FSCORE END) FSCORE,
  -- TTM growth (P0..P3 vs P4..P7) removes single-quarter base-effect noise in PEG
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN SAFE_DIVIDE(finq.NP_P0+finq.NP_P1+finq.NP_P2+finq.NP_P3,
       NULLIF(finq.NP_P4+finq.NP_P5+finq.NP_P6+finq.NP_P7,0))-1 END) ttm_g,
  -- LIQUIDITY: TTM operating cash flow (raw VND) + current ratio + cash ratio (working-capital health)
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.CF_OA_P0+finq.CF_OA_P1+finq.CF_OA_P2+finq.CF_OA_P3 END) ttm_cfo,
  MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.CR_P0 END) CR, MAX(CASE WHEN finq.rn=1 THEN finq.CashR_P0 END) CashR
  FROM finq WHERE finq.rn<=8 GROUP BY finq.ticker)
SELECT t.ticker, ROUND(t.PE,1) PE, ROUND((t.PE-t.PE_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PE_SD5Y,0),2) pe_z,
 ROUND(t.PB,2) PB, ROUND((t.PB-t.PB_MA5Y)/NULLIF(t.PB_SD5Y,0),2) pb_z,
 ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(t.NP_P0,t.NP_P4)-1,3) np_yoy, ROUND(fin.ttm_g,3) ttm_g, ROUND(t.ROE5Y*100,1) ROE5Y,
 ROUND(t.Close/NULLIF(hi.hi52,0)-1,3) dd52, ROUND(t.Volume_3M_P50*t.Close/1e9,1) liqB,
 fin.neg_q8, ROUND(fin.DebtEq,2) DebtEq, ROUND(fin.IntCov,2) IntCov, fin.FSCORE,
 ROUND(fin.ttm_cfo/1e9,0) ttm_cfo_bn, ROUND(fin.CR,2) CR, ROUND(fin.CashR,2) CashR
FROM tav2_bq.ticker t JOIN latest l ON l.ticker=t.ticker AND l.mx=t.time JOIN hi ON hi.ticker=t.ticker
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.ticker=t.ticker""")

    trap=(pd.notna(g) and g<-0.15)
    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc])

    cashc=(pd.notna(cfy) and cfy>=0.12)  # 4th cheap-lens: strong operating-cash yield
    trap=(pd.notna(g) and g<-0.15)
    n=sum([hist,pegc,absc,cashc])

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
rank_8l.py — composite 8L score → prioritized top-N ranking
============================================================
Scores every ticker in data/unified_screener.csv with a ROUTE-AWARE 8L composite
(each company graded by its correct lens, then placed on a common 0-100 scale),
and ranks them. Weights encode this research stream's validated findings:
  - cheapness (L1) + engine/runway COMPOUNDER>>YIELD>>LOWROIC (L2/L6)
  - cash-machine ◆ (L3), moat via ROE proxy (L4)
  - contrarian dislocation = buy fear (deep dd rewarded for quality & cyclicals)
  - banks: NPL-gate + coverage/CAR/ROE + PB-vs-ROE cheapness (own lens)
  - cyclicals: commodity-trough (low pctile) + dislocation + low PB (own lens)
  - VALUE_TRAP penalised; SPECIAL_SITUATION scored separately (event risk)
Input: data/unified_screener.csv, data/engine_class.csv
Output: data/rank_8l.{md,csv}
"""
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import sys, os, re
try: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8")
except Exception: pass
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
WORKDIR=r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
S=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","unified_screener.csv"))
# drop names the screener gated out (insolvency/falling-knife, bank AVOID, commodity-peak AVOID)
_drop=S["action"].astype(str).str.startswith("AVOID")|(S["verdict"]=="DISTRESSED")
print(f"excluded {int(_drop.sum())} gated names: "+", ".join(S[_drop]['ticker'].tolist()))
S=S[~_drop].reset_index(drop=True)
try:
    E=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","engine_class.csv")).set_index("ticker")
except Exception: E=pd.DataFrame()
try:
    MC=pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","margin_cycle_detector.csv")).set_index("ticker")["cycle"].to_dict()
except Exception: MC={}

def num(pat,s,d=np.nan):
    m=re.search(pat,str(s));
    return float(m.group(1)) if m else d

def parse(r):
    s=r["detail"]; out={}
    out["PE"]=num(r"PE([\d.]+)",s); out["pe_z"]=num(r"pe_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["PEG"]=num(r"PEG([\d.]+)",s); out["ROE"]=num(r"ROE(\d+)%",s)
    out["dd"]=num(r"dd([+-]?\d+)%",s); out["PB"]=num(r"PB([\d.]+)",s)
    out["pb_z"]=num(r"pb_z([+-][\d.]+)",s)
    out["pctile"]=num(r"pctile([\d.]+)",s)
    out["NPL"]=num(r"NPL([\d.]+)%",s); out["cov"]=num(r"cov(\d+)%",s)
    out["CAR"]=num(r"CAR(\d+)%",s); out["NPLchg"]=num(r"4qNPL([+-][\d.]+)pp",s)
    return pd.Series(out)

P=S.join(S.apply(parse,axis=1))

def asset_roic(t):
    if t in E.index: return E.loc[t,"asset_cagr"], E.loc[t,"roic5y"]
    return np.nan,np.nan

def score_row(r):
    t=r["ticker"]; route=r["route"]; v=r["verdict"]; eng=str(r["engine"]); comp={}
    liq=r["liqB"] if pd.notna(r["liqB"]) else 0
    # ---- liquidity (deployability, modest; applies to all) ----
    comp["liq"]=8 if liq>=50 else 6 if liq>=10 else 4 if liq>=4 else 2 if liq>=2 else 0
    if route=="COMPOUNDER":
        ac,roic=asset_roic(t); is_ap="ASSET_PLAY" in eng
        if is_ap:
            # L8 NAV-lite: value asset-plays on P/B (book=conservative asset floor; true NAV/SOTP
            # usually > book cost), NOT on PE/PEG (lumpy non-op earnings mislead). Data caveat:
            # BQ has book-at-cost only, so this is a proxy floor, not a real SOTP.
            pbz=r["pb_z"]; pb=r["PB"]
            zbon=np.clip(-pbz,-1,2)*6 if pd.notna(pbz) else 0
            pbabs=18 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<1.0) else 12 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.3) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.7) else 2 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<2.2) else 0
            trap=-10 if v=="VALUE_TRAP" else 0
            comp["L8_NAV"]=zbon+pbabs+trap
        else:
            # L1 valuation (PE/PEG, TTM growth)
            base={"CHEAP_QUALITY":25,"CHEAP_1lens":12,"NOT_CHEAP":2,"VALUE_TRAP":-15,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":8}.get(v,0)
            pez=r["pe_z"]; zbon=np.clip(-pez,-1,2)*5 if pd.notna(pez) else 0           # cheaper-than-own-history
            peg=r["PEG"]; pegbon=8 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=0.5) else 5 if (pd.notna(peg) and 0<peg<=1) else 0
            comp["L1_value"]=base+zbon+pegbon
        # L2/L6 engine + runway
        comp["L2_engine"]={"COMPOUNDER":22,"YIELD":8,"LOWROIC_GROWTH":3}.get(eng.split()[0].replace("◆","") if eng and eng!="-" else "-",6)
        comp["L6_runway"]=8 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.12) else 5 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0.05) else 1 if (pd.notna(ac) and ac>0) else -2
        # L3 cash-machine
        comp["L3_cash"]=10 if "◆" in eng else 0
        # L4 moat (ROE proxy)
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["L4_moat"]=15 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=30) else 10 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=18) else 5 if (pd.notna(roe) and roe>=12) else 0
        # contrarian dislocation (buy fear in quality)
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 5 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 2 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        # L5 margin-cycle: peak margin = cyclically-inflated EPS (penalty); crushed margin = revert↑ opportunity
        cyc=MC.get(t)
        if cyc=="MARGIN_PEAK": comp["L5_margin"]=-12
        elif cyc=="MARGIN_BOTTOM": comp["L5_margin"]=+8
        # paired-peer overlay: same-input peer at MARGIN_PEAK warns follower (~1q lag) — modest penalty
        if "PEER-LEAD" in str(r["detail"]): comp["peer_lead"]=-4
    elif route=="BANK":
        gate=v
        comp["gate"]={"CLEAN":40,"WATCH":15,"AVOID":-20}.get(gate,0)
        npl=r["NPL"]; comp["npl"]=15 if npl<1 else 12 if npl<1.5 else 8 if npl<2 else 4 if npl<2.5 else 2 if npl<3 else -5
        cov=r["cov"]; comp["coverage"]=10 if cov>=150 else 8 if cov>=100 else 5 if cov>=80 else 2 if cov>=50 else 0
        car=r["CAR"]; comp["CAR"]=6 if car>=14 else 5 if car>=12 else 3 if car>=10 else 1
        roe=r["ROE"]; comp["roe"]=10 if roe>=20 else 8 if roe>=17 else 5 if roe>=14 else 2 if roe>=10 else 0
        ch=r["NPLchg"]; comp["npl_trend"]=8 if ch<=-0.4 else 5 if ch<0 else -3 if ch>0.3 else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; rpb=(roe/pb) if (pd.notna(pb) and pb>0) else 0
        comp["pb_vs_roe"]=10 if rpb>=15 else 7 if rpb>=12 else 4 if rpb>=10 else 1   # ROE%/PB
    elif route=="CYCLICAL":
        comp["regime"]={"TROUGH_BUY":45,"cmdty_CHEAP":30,"ELEVATED-SUPPORTED":18,"cmdty_MID":10,
                        "cmdty_PEAK":-5,"SPECIAL_SITUATION":12}.get(v.split("(")[0],8)
        pct=r["pctile"]; comp["cmdty_pctile"]=round((1-pct)*20,1) if pd.notna(pct) else 0  # trough=high
        dd=r["dd"]; comp["dislocation"]=15 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-30) else 12 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-25) else 8 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-20) else 4 if (pd.notna(dd) and dd<=-10) else 0
        pb=r["PB"]; comp["PB"]=-10 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<=0) else 10 if (pd.notna(pb) and 0<pb<0.9) else 6 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.2) else 3 if (pd.notna(pb) and pb<1.6) else 0
    score=sum(comp.values())
    return pd.Series({"score":round(score,1),**{f"_{k}":round(v,1) for k,v in comp.items()}})

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1

# ---- output ----
cols=["rank","ticker","route","verdict","engine","score","liqB"]
lines=[]; pr=lambda s="":(print(s),lines.append(s))
pr("# 8L composite ranking — route-aware score (snapshot ~2026-05-29, market state NEUTRAL)")
pr(f"scored {len(R)} tickers | weights encode: cheapness + engine/runway + cash-machine + moat + dislocation; banks=NPL-gate+PB/ROE; cyclicals=trough+dislocation+PB")
pr("")
pr(f"{'#':>3} {'tkr':<5}{'route':<11}{'verdict':<20}{'engine':<16}{'score':>6} {'liqB':>6}  components")
for _,r in R.head(35).iterrows():
    comps=" ".join(f"{k[1:]}{r[k]:+.0f}" for k in R.columns if k.startswith("_") and pd.notna(r[k]) and r[k]!=0)
    pr(f"{r['rank']:>3} {r['ticker']:<5}{r['route']:<11}{str(r['verdict'])[:19]:<20}{str(r['engine'])[:15]:<16}{r['score']:>6.1f} {(r['liqB'] if pd.notna(r['liqB']) else 0):>6.0f}  {comps}")
pr("")
pr("## Prioritized TOP-20 (by 8L composite)")
top=R.head(20)
pr("  "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in top.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("## TOP-20 by route")
for rt in ["BANK","CYCLICAL","COMPOUNDER"]:
    g=top[top["route"]==rt]
    pr(f"  {rt} ({len(g)}): "+", ".join(f"{r['ticker']}({r['score']:.0f})" for _,r in g.iterrows()))
pr("")
pr("Caveat: composite is a PRIORITIZATION aid, not a buy signal. NEUTRAL state (FA/quality edge strongest in CRISIS/BEAR per fa-horizon study). Liquidity small names hard to deploy. SPECIAL_SITUATION (DGC/PAT) carry event risk not in score.")
R[cols+[c for c in R.columns if c.startswith("_")]].to_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.csv"),index=False)
with open(os.path.join(WORKDIR,"data","rank_8l.md"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write("\n".join(lines))
pr("Saved data/rank_8l.{md,csv}")

`cfo_yield` lens hoạt động đúng và lan can cũng đúng:
- **PTB**: CFO yield chỉ +5% / **FCF −15%** (đang tái đầu tư) → chỉ +1, **không bị phạt** → giữ nguyên hạng. Lan can chuẩn.
- **TCL +39%, FMC +34%, QTP +31%, NCT +19%, HAH +18%** → được thưởng đúng (máy tạo tiền rẻ thật).
- HPG/cyclical & bank: lens không áp dụng (đúng — CFO vô nghĩa cho bank, gây bẫy cho cyclical đỉnh).

Nhưng tôi phát hiện **một tác dụng phụ về hiệu chỉnh** cần báo bạn ngay. Lấy bảng cuối:

content.text:
`cfo_yield` đã được validate và wire vào đúng. Nhưng tôi phải báo trung thực một **tác dụng phụ về hiệu chỉnh**: lens này chỉ cộng điểm cho **compounder** (bank/cyclical bị loại đúng vì CFO vô nghĩa với chúng), nên nó **thổi điểm tuyệt đối của compounder lên** → route mix lệch từ 12/6/2 thành **14/5/1**. BID và HSG bị đẩy ra **không phải vì chúng xấu đi**, mà vì compounder được cộng thêm một thành phần mà bank/cyclical không có (HAH lên 101, vượt thang 100).

Đây là méo hiệu chỉnh, không phải tín hiệu thật. Cách đúng: cfo_yield đã được đo IC **cross‑sectional** (xếp hạng tương đối *trong nhóm* compounder) → nó nên **tái xếp hạng nội bộ compounder** chứ không nâng mặt bằng tuyệt đối so với bank. Tôi center (demean) thành phần cfo trong nhóm compounder:

R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)

R=P.join(P.apply(score_row,axis=1))
# CALIBRATION: cfo_yield (IC measured cross-sectionally = within-cohort ranking) only applies to
# non-asset-play compounders. Adding it raw would inflate their ABSOLUTE score vs banks/cyclicals
# (which can't be cash-yield-scored) and tilt the route mix. Demean it within the compounder cohort
# so it RE-RANKS compounders among themselves (preserves variation) without cross-route inflation.
if "_L1_cash" in R.columns:
    msk=R["_L1_cash"].notna(); m=R.loc[msk,"_L1_cash"].mean()
    R.loc[msk,"score"]=(R.loc[msk,"score"]-m).round(1)
    print(f"cfo_yield centered within compounder cohort (mean {m:.1f} removed, zero-sum re-rank)")
R=R.sort_values("score",ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
R["rank"]=R.index+1
